text_a: Iti ngai' no ngaran di komolohingan di Yesus Kristus , i sinakagon di Daud , om i sinakagon di Abraham . Mantad nopo di Abraham om di gisom do napaganak i Daud om iti ngai' no ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis :
text_b: The book of the generations of Jesus Christ , the son of David , the son of Abraham .

text_a: I Abraham , i Isak , i Yakub , i Yohuda om i piro-piro tobpinai di Yohuda , i Piris om i Sira ( ngaran nopod tina' diyolo' om i Tamar ) , i Hisron , i Ram , i Aminadab , i Nahason , i Salmon , i Buas ( tina' nopo dau om i Rahab ) , i Obid ( tina' nopo dau om i Rut ) , i Isai , om i Raja' Daud .
text_b: The son of Abraham was Isaac ; and the son of Isaac was Jacob ; and the sons of Jacob were Judah and his brothers ;

text_a: Mantad no di Daud om gisom di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis : I Suliman ( tina' nopo dau om i sawo daa di Uria di gulu po ) , i Rihabiam , i Abia , i Asa , i Yosapat , i Yoram , i Usia , i Yotam , i Ahas , i Hiskia , i Manasi , i Amon , i Yosia , i Yikonia om i piro-piro tobpinai dau .
text_b: And the son of Jesse was David the king ; and the son of David was Solomon by her who had been the wife of Uriah ;

text_a: Mantad no di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom di kinosusuon di Yesus om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan dau do nokotulis : i Yikonia , i Salatiol , i Sorubabil , i Abihud , i Iliakim , i Asur , i Sadok , i Akhim , i Iliud , i Iliasar , i Matan , i Yakub , om i Yusup i sawo di Maria . Om i Maria no minogkosusu di Yesus , i roitan do Kristus .
text_b: And after the taking away to Babylon , Jechoniah had a son Shealtiel ; and Shealtiel had Zerubbabel ;

text_a: Om mantad no di Abraham om gisom do napaganak i Daud , om hopod om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di Daud om gisom di tinanggayan do pisangod o bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di tinanggayan do pisangod i bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom do korikot di kinosusuon di Kristus om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan .
text_b: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; and from David to the taking away to Babylon , fourteen generations ; and from the taking away to Babylon to the coming of Christ , fourteen generations .

text_a: Poingkaa no susui di kinosusuon di Yesus Kristus . I Maria nopo i tina' dau , om nokopitunang no di Yusup . Nga' tontok dit a' po iyolo' nokopikawin , om monontian no i Maria . Nga' a' i' di Yusup oilaan do monontian i Maria do mantad id sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .
text_b: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was in this way : when his mother Mary was going to be married to Joseph , before they came together the discovery was made that she was with child by the Holy Spirit .

text_a: I Yusup nopo , i tunang di Maria diri nga' tulun dit otorodok do tumanud dot oturan do tugama' . Om pututon daa'ddi dau i pitunangan diyolo' di Maria . Nga' lisok-lisokon i' daa dau do momutut om a' i' ointingayam dot id toguang do tulun dot ogumu' i Maria .
text_b: And Joseph , her husband , being an upright man , and not desiring to make her a public example , had a mind to put her away privately .

text_a: Nga' maso' po di Yusup do momusorou'ddi , om pongipi no iyau . Om id suang nopo di nipi dau nga' nokokito iyau dot iso' o moloikat do Tuhan do minoro-boros dau do poingkaa , “ Oi Yusup , i sinakagon di Daud , kada' kooris do mangawin di Maria ; tu' iri nopo tanak di ponontianon dau om mantad i' do sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .
text_b: But when he was giving thought to these things , an angel of the Lord came to him in a dream , saying , Joseph , son of David , have no fear of taking Mary as your wife ; because that which is in her body is of the Holy Spirit .

text_a: Osusu nondo i Maria om kusai o tanak dau . Om pungaranan no kopio i tanak diri dot i Yesus , tu' iyau no popoidu' di tulun dau do mantad id dusa diyolo' , ” ka .
text_b: And she will give birth to a son ; and you will give him the name Jesus ; for he will give his people salvation from their sins .

text_a: Om nosiliu ngai' pogi' o miagal diri nga' mamayaan di boros do Tuhan do pinolombus di nabi dau do poingkaa ,
text_b: Now all this took place so that the word of the Lord by the prophet might come true ,

text_a: “ Haro nondo tondu' dit a' po nodudun do kusai do monontian om mogkosusu dot iso' o tanak do kusai . Om pungaranan nondo i tanak diri dot i Imanuil , ” ka . ( Imanuil nopo om boros dot Ibrani do komoyon nopo om “ moyo-woyo' o Kinorohingan dati' , ” ka . )
text_b: See , the virgin will be with child , and will give birth to a son , and they will give him the name Immanuel , that is , God with us .

text_a: Om koposik poddi i Yusup , om wonsoyo' no dau o miagal di pinoboros di moloikat do Tuhan dot id dau . Om kowino' no dau i Maria .
text_b: And Joseph did as the angel of the Lord had said to him , and took her as his wife ;

text_a: Nga' solinaid nopo dit a' po i Maria nosusu di tanak diri , om a' po i Yusup duminudun di Maria do miagal di wonsoyon do tulun di misasawo . Om kosusu noddi i tanak diri , om pungaranai no di Yusup iyau dot i Yesus .
text_b: And he had no connection with her till she had given birth to a son ; and he gave him the name Jesus .

text_a: I Yesus nopo om pinogkosusu do hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , it id pomogunan do Yudia . Iri nopo raja' do tontok diri om i Horudis . Om tontok noddi do ruminikot do hilo'd Yorusalim o piro-piro tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon . Tadon nopo diyolo' om hilo'd ponong id koulayon .
text_b: Now when the birth of Jesus took place in Beth-lehem of Judaea , in the days of Herod the king , there came wise men from the east to Jerusalem ,

text_a: Om boros ka diyolo' , “ Hinonggo i tanak di nosusu do sumiliu'd raja' do tulun do Yohudi ? Nokito dahai i rombituon dau do minimbulai do ponong id koulayon , om ruminikot diri iyahai'd hiti do mongoi tuku' dot id dau , ” ka diyolo' .
text_b: Saying , Where is the King of the Jews whose birth has now taken place ? We have seen his star in the east and have come to give him worship .

text_a: Om kotigowo nopoddi i Raja' Horudis do nokorongou'ddi , om iri i tulun do hilo'd Yorusalim nga' nongkotigowo ngai' nogi' .
text_b: And when it came to the ears of Herod the king , he was troubled , and all Jerusalem with him .

text_a: Om lohowo' ngai' noddi di Horudis i boyoon dot imam om i guru do Tourat do tumimung . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' , “ Honggo kosusuon di Raja' di pinabatos mantad do Kinorohingan ? ” ka dau .
text_b: And he got together all the chief priests and scribes of the people , questioning them as to where the birth-place of the Christ would be .

text_a: Om simbar ka diyolo' , “ Hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia . Tu' poingkaa tinulis do songulun o nabi ,
text_b: And they said to him , In Beth-lehem of Judaea ; for so it is said in the writings of the prophet ,

text_a: ‘ Baitlahim nopo , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia , om okon i' ko' it okoro' kopio dot id pogialatan di bandar dot angagayo do hilo' . Tu' Baitlahim no tadon do songulun o boyoon di sumiliu'd gompomogompi' dot Israil , i tulun ku , ’ ka . ”
text_b: You Beth-lehem , in the land of Judah , are not the least among the chiefs of Judah : out of you will come a ruler , who will be the keeper of my people Israel .

text_a: Om koilo poddi i Horudis di boros do miagal diri , om pomolisok-lisok no iyau do minomolohou di tulun dit ongoilo diri . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' ondung soira' kopio diyolo' kokito i rombituon diri .
text_b: Then Herod sent for the wise men privately , and put questions to them about what time the star had been seen .

text_a: Om suhuo' no dau iyolo' do minongoi do hilo'd Baitlahim om bilinai no dau iyolo' , “ Pamanau kou no , om ihumon no kopio dokoyu i tanak diri . Om abantalan nopondo dokoyu , om sunudan oku no , om koongoi oku i' iyoho' kotuku' dot id tanak diri , ” ka dau .
text_b: And he sent them to Beth-lehem and said , Go and make certain where the young child is ; and when you have seen him , let me have news of it , so that I may come and give him worship .

text_a: Om pamanau noddi iyolo' . Om hiri noddid tanga'd ralan , om kokito no kawagu diyolo' i rombituon di nokito diyolo' di gulu po do minulai do ponong id koulayon . Om otood tomod diri iyolo' do nokokito di rombituon diri do hiri'd doburuan diyolo' . Om undorong no i rombituon do hiri'd hapak di nokoiyonon di tanak .
text_b: And after hearing the king , they went on their way ; and the star which they saw in the east went before them , till it came to rest over the place where the young child was .

text_a: Om suang no iyolo' do hiri'd walai'ddi , om kokito no diyolo' i tanak om i Maria , i tina' di tanak . Om otud no iyolo' do tuminuku' di tanak . Om ukabai no diyolo' i pinoiyanan di nigitan diyolo' , om popuhawango' no diyolo' o tamas , om kominyan om mur dot id tanak diri .
text_b: And they came into the house , and saw the young child with Mary , his mother ; and falling down on their faces they gave him worship ; and from their store they gave him offerings of gold , perfume , and spices .

text_a: Om poinsano' no iyolo'd Kinorohingan dot id suang do nipi dot a' gumuli' dot id di Horudis . Om uli' noddi iyolo' do minaya' do ralan do suwai .
text_b: And it was made clear to them by God in a dream that they were not to go back to Herod ; so they went into their country by another way .

text_a: Om kapamanau poddi i tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon , om intalang no moloikat do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi di Yusup . Om boros ka di moloikat , “ Ihumon motindo di Horudis ilo tanak do maan dau patayo' . Nga' tungag nogi' om tanggayan no ilo tanak om ilo tina' dau do mogidu' , om mongoi do hilo'd Masir . Om mundorong nopondod hilo' do gisom do moro-boros kawagu oku diya' , ” ka .
text_b: And when they had gone , an angel of the Lord came to Joseph in a dream , saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into Egypt , and do not go from there till I give you word ; for Herod will be searching for the young child to put him to death .

text_a: Om tungag no i Yusup , om totuong iddi do tinanggayan dau i tanak om i tina' di tanak do minongoi do hilo'd Masir .
text_b: So he took the young child and his mother by night , and went into Egypt ;

text_a: Om undorong nopoddi iyolo' do hilo'd Masir do gisom do napatai i Horudis . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros do Tuhan do pinolombus di nabi dau do poingkaa , “ Lohowon ku i Tanak ku do mantad hilo'd Masir , ” ka .
text_b: And was there till the death of Herod ; so that the word of the Lord through the prophet might come true , Out of Egypt have I sent for my son .

text_a: Om koilaai poddi di Horudis do nakalan iyau di tulun dit ongoilo di mantad hilo'd koulayon diri , om kotogod tomod no iyau . Om ponuhu' no iyau do mamatai do koinsanai di tangaanak do kusai di duwo toun om it id siriba' ko' duwo toun do tumur do hilo'd Baitlahim om hiri'd posorili' do kinoiyonon diri . Tu' iyo noddi o koloido' do tumanud di norongou dau di pinoboros do tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon , do mantad di kokito i' diyolo' i rombituon .
text_b: Then Herod , when he saw that he had been tricked by the wise men , was very angry ; and he sent out , and put to death all the male children in Beth-lehem and in all the parts round about it , from two years old and under , acting on the knowledge which he had got with care from the wise men .

text_a: Om iyo noddi do nosiliu i pinoboros di Nabi Yoromia , do poingkaa ,
text_b: Then the word of Jeremiah the prophet came true ,

text_a: “ Haro o mihad dot orongou do mantad hilo'd Rama do minglompud do mihad do mogihad . Mogihad i Rasil di tangaanak dau ; om a' no iyau milo dot insasamadan , tu' nangapatai ngai' no iyolo' , ” ka .
text_b: In Ramah there was a sound of weeping and great sorrow , Rachel weeping for her children , and she would not be comforted for their loss .

text_a: Om kapatai poddi i Horudis , om intalang no kawagu o moloikat do Tuhan dot id di Yusup dot id suang do nipi , di hilo' pod Masir i Yusup .
text_b: But when Herod was dead , an angel of the Lord came in a dream to Joseph in Egypt ,

text_a: Boros ka di moloikat , “ Iri nopo tulun di mamatai daa dilo tanak om nangapatai no . Om tungag nogi' om ngoyo' ilo tanak om ilo tina' dau , om gumuli' kou i' do hilo'd Israil , ” ka .
text_b: Saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into the land of Israel : because they who were attempting to take the young child's life are dead .

text_a: Om tungag noddi i Yusup , om tanggayai no dau i tanak diri om i Maria do guminuli' do hilo'd Israil .
text_b: And he got up , and took the young child and his mother , and came into the land of Israel .

text_a: Nga' korongou noddi i Yusup dot i Arkilaus i tanak di Horudis , o suminowoli di Horudis do suminiliu'd raja' do pomogunan do Yudia . Om moddosi iddi i Yusup do mongoi'd hilo' . Om kosunudai poddi iyau do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd watas do Galilia .
text_b: But when it came to his ears that Archelaus was ruling over Judaea in the place of his father Herod , he was in fear of going there ; and God having given him news of the danger in a dream , he went out of the way into the country parts of Galilee .

text_a: Om undorong no iyau'd hilo' , dot id iso' bandar di roitan do Nasarit . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros di piro-piro nabi dot i tanak o komoyon , “ Roitan nondo iyau do Tulun do Nasarit , ” ka .
text_b: And he came and was living in a town named Nazareth : so that the word of the prophets might come true , He will be named a Nazarene .

text_a: Om tontok noddi do ruminikot i Yohanis Gampamatis do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan do Yudia , om timpuun no iyau do monuduk .
text_b: And in those days John the Baptist came preaching in the waste land of Judaea ,

text_a: Boros ka dau , “ Korologo kou no do momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka .
text_b: Saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin ; for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Om i Yohanis no i tulun di komoyon di Nabi Yosaya , do tontok di minomoros iyau do poingkaa , “ Haro o tulun do mimboros dot opuhod do hilo'd tana' do kowotuan do poingkaa , ‘ Rontisan no ralan do wayaan do Tuhan ; potingon no i ralan do wayaan dau , ’ ka , ” ka dau .
text_b: For this is he of whom Isaiah the prophet said , The voice of one crying in the waste land , Make ready the way of the Lord , make his roads straight .

text_a: Pakayan nopo di Yohanis om winonsoi mantad id hulu dot unta , om tagkos no dau om mantad id kulit do nintorusan . Om kanon nopo dau om godu om paha' do mantad hiri'd gouton .
text_b: Now John was clothed in camel's hair , with a leather band about him ; and his food was locusts and honey .

text_a: Om ogumu' o tulun do mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , om mantad id pointongkop do pomogunan do Yudia om mantad id piro-piro watas di potoropis di Bawang do Yordan , do ruminikot dot id di Yohanis .
text_b: Then Jerusalem and all Judaea went out to him , and all the people from near Jordan ;

text_a: Om okuno' no diyolo' i dusa diyolo' , om botisai noddi iyolo' di Yohanis do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan .
text_b: And they were given baptism by him in the river Jordan , saying openly that they had done wrong .

text_a: Om ogumu' i' daa o tulun do Parisi om Saduki do ruminikot do mongoi pokibatis . Nga' soira' di nokito di Yohanis iyolo' do rumikot , om boros ka dau , “ Iyokoyu no tulun dit angaraat ! Isai o minomisunud dokoyu do milo kou do moggidu'd mantad id hukuman do Kinorohingan dit oruhai no dau do porikoton ?
text_b: But when he saw a number of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to his baptism , he said to them , Offspring of snakes , at whose word are you going in flight from the wrath to come ?

text_a: Pointalango' po dokoyu do nokorologo kopio kou do momonsoi'd dusa .
text_b: Let your change of heart be seen in your works :

text_a: Kada' nogi' dokoyu soroho' do koidu' kou do mantad id hukuman , do momoros kou piya dot i Abraham o taki dokoyu . Ilaai no dokoyu , dot iti piya watu nga' milo id Kinorohingan do silihon do sinakagon di Abraham !
text_b: And say not to yourselves , We have Abraham for our father ; because I say to you that God is able from these stones to make children for Abraham .

text_a: Nokosodia' no kapak do panagad di kayu do porotopon do tana' o pananagad . Pointikid-tikid do kayu dit a' mongua' dot osonong om tagadon no om pataamon do hiri'd tapui .
text_b: And even now the axe is put to the root of the trees ; every tree then which does not give good fruit is cut down , and put into the fire .

text_a: Iyoho' nopo om waig noo pamatis ku dokoyu do popointalang do nokorologo kou do momonsoi'd dusa ; nga' iyau nopo i rumikot do kosusuhut doho' , om mamatis indo dokoyu do Rusod do Kinorohingan om tapui . Iyau nopo om agayo po ko' iyoho' . Om a' oku i' osorupai do mongigit piya di kasut dau .
text_b: Truly , I give baptism with water to those of you whose hearts are changed ; but he who comes after me is greater than I , whose shoes I am not good enough to take up : he will give you baptism with the Holy Spirit and with fire :

text_a: Poingigit no dau o bakul do pangatap di gandum do gisom dot osompipian . Timungon nondo dau i gandum do posuangon do hiri'd sulap , nga' iri nopondo i tapol om tutudan dau do hiri'd tapui dit a' milo'd pisokon , ” ka .
text_b: In whose hand is the instrument with which he will make clean his grain ; he will put the good grain in his store , but the waste will be burned up in the fire which will never be put out .

text_a: Om tongkiad no i Yesus do mantad hilo'd Galilia om pakayaai no do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan do mongoi pokibatis di Yohanis .
text_b: Then Jesus came from Galilee to John at the Jordan , to be given baptism by him .

text_a: Nga' mada' i' daa i Yohanis do mamatis di Yesus . Boros ka di Yohanis , “ Iyoho' nogi' o tosorupai do botisan nu . Nga' iya' nogiddi o rumikot dot id doho' ! ” ka dau .
text_b: But John would have kept him back , saying , It is I who have need of baptism from you , and do you come to me ?

text_a: Nga' boros ka di Yesus do suminimbar , “ Botisai oku nopo diya' do baino' poo . Om owonsoi ngai' to indo i korohian do Kinorohingan , ” ka dau . Om botisai noddi di Yohanis i Yesus .
text_b: But Jesus made answer , saying to him , Let it be so now : because so it is right for us to make righteousness complete . Then he gave him baptism .

text_a: Om kobotisai poddi i Yesus , om tilombus nopo iyau do tuminindal . Om sigog nopoddi do miniangkang o tawan om kokito no di Yesus i Rusod do Kinorohingan do luminintuhun dot id dau do miagal do punai o kowoyo-woyoo' do suminondot .
text_b: And Jesus , having been given baptism , straight away went up from the water ; and , the heavens opening , he saw the Spirit of God coming down on him as a dove ;

text_a: Om korongou noddi o boros do Kinorohingan do mantad hilo'd tawan do poingkaa , “ Iti no i Tanak ku di kosianan ku . Om iyau no i kohubayaan kopio do ginawo ku , ” ka .
text_b: And a voice came out of heaven , saying , This is my dearly loved Son , with whom I am well pleased .

text_a: Om angatai noddi i Yesus di Rusod do Kinorohingan do kuminaa do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan , om opogumbalan i' iyau do Rogon .
text_b: Then Jesus was sent by the Spirit into the waste land to be tested by the Evil One .

text_a: Om a' i Yesus minakan do solinaid dot apat nohopod o tadau om apat nohopod o totuong . Om louson tomod diri iyau .
text_b: And after going without food for forty days and forty nights , he was in need of it .

text_a: Om rikot noddi i Rogon om boro-boros no di Yesus , “ Okon toi ko' Tanak ko'd Kinorohingan ? Suhuo' pogi' ilo watu do sumiliu'd roti , ” ka dau .
text_b: And the Evil One came and said to him , If you are the Son of God , give the word for these stones to become bread .

text_a: Nga' boros kad i Yesus , “ Nokotulis no dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan o poingkaa : Okon i' ko' roti noo o kapasi'd tulun , suwai ko' iri nogi' i pointikid-tikid do boros di poboroson do Kinorohingan , ” ka dau .
text_b: But he made answer and said , It is in the Writings , Bread is not man's only need , but every word which comes out of the mouth of God .

text_a: Om igitai po di Rogon i Yesus do minongoi do hilo'd Yorusalim , i bandar dot olidang . Om hirio' no di Rogon i Yesus id timpak di Walai'd Sasambayangan dot Agayo .
text_b: Then the Evil One took him to the holy town ; and he put him on the highest point of the Temple and said to him ,

text_a: Om boros kaddi di Rogon dot id di Yesus , “ Okon toi ko' Tanak ko'd Kinorohingan ? Tuhun pogi' , tu' haro i' o nokotulis dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan do poingkaa , ‘ Suhuon indo do Kinorohingan i moloikat dau do mongintirung diya' , om kahangan ko indo diyolo' om a' i' kootung do watu o gakod nu , ’ ka , ” ka dau .
text_b: If you are the Son of God , let yourself go down ; for it is in the Writings , He will give his angels care over you ; and , In their hands they will keep you up , so that your foot may not be crushed against a stone .

text_a: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Nga' haro i' o nokotulis dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' pogumbal do Tuhan i Kinorohingan nu , ’ ka , ” ka dau .
text_b: Jesus said to him , Again it is in the Writings , You may not put the Lord your God to the test .

text_a: Om igitai po kawagu di Rogon i Yesus do minongoi dot id iso' o nuluhon dit akawas kopio . Om potuduko' no di Rogon dot id dau o koinsanai'd pomorintaan do hiti'd pomogunan om koinsanai di kakayaan do hiri .
text_b: Again , the Evil One took him up to a very high mountain , and let him see all the kingdoms of the world and the glory of them ;

text_a: Om boros ka di Rogon dot id di Yesus , “ Patahakon ngai' ku nopo daa iti dot id diya' , ondung motud ko no do tumuku' doho' , ” ka dau .
text_b: And he said to him , All these things will I give you , if you will go down on your face and give me worship .

text_a: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Poggidu' no oi Gampamalid ! Nokotulis no dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan o poingkaa , ‘ Tuku' no dot id Tuhan , i Kinorohingan nu , om iyau noo pogobi-obian ! ’ ka , ” ka dau .
text_b: Then said Jesus to him , Away , Satan : for it is in the Writings , Give worship to the Lord your God and be his servant only .

text_a: Om tongkiad noddi di Yesus i Rogon . Om rikot no piro-piro moloikat do minongoi ponguhup di Yesus .
text_b: Then the Evil One went away from him , and angels came and took care of him .

text_a: Om korongou poddi i Yesus do nokogiil i Yohanis , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd Galilia .
text_b: Now when it came to his ears that John had been put in prison , he went away to Galilee ;

text_a: Om undaliu no iyau do mantad hilo'd Nasarit om ongoi no iyau iyon do hiri'd bandar do Kapornaum , i tid disan di Tasik Galilia , id watas do Sibulon om Naptali .
text_b: And going away from Nazareth , he came and made his living-place in Capernaum , which is by the sea , in the country of Zebulun and Naphtali :

text_a: Om kabayaai noddi i pinoboros di Nabi Yosaya , di nowonsoi di Yesus o miagal diri . Poingkaa o pinoboros di Nabi Yosaya ,
text_b: So that the word of the prophet Isaiah might come true ,

text_a: “ Iri nopo tana' do Sibulon om tana' do Naptali , i ralan do kumaa hilo'd tasik , i tid soborong do Bawang do Yordan , iri no i pomogunan do Galilia , i tana' do tulun dot okon ko' Yohudi !
text_b: The land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali , by the way of the sea , the other side of Jordan , Galilee of the Gentiles ,

text_a: Kokito indo do tanawau di kosorong kopio i tulun di poingiyon dot id totuong ! Oulinahan indo do tanawau di kosorong kopio i tulun di poingiyon do hiri'd dasahawan do kapatayon ! ” ka .
text_b: The people who were in the dark saw a great light , and to those in the land of the shade of death did the dawn come up .

text_a: Om mantad poddi om popinsusui no i Yesus do poingkaa , “ Korologo kou nod momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka dau .
text_b: From that time Jesus went about preaching and saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin , for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Om tontok di manau-panau i Yesus do hiri'd tisan di Tasik Galilia , om kokito no dau o duwo tulun do monginginsada' di miobpinai . Iyolo' nopo om i Simun ( i pinungaranan dot i Pitrus ) om i Andarias , i tadi' dau . Om tontok nopoddi nga' maso diyolo' do mirrambot do hiri'd tasik .
text_b: And when he was walking by the sea of Galilee , he saw two brothers , Simon , whose other name was Peter , and Andrew , his brother , who were putting a net into the sea ; for they were fishermen .

text_a: Om boros ka di Yesus dot id diyolo' , “ Tanud kou pogi' doho' , om tudukan ku i' iyokoyu do mamarambot do tulun , ” ka dau .
text_b: And he said to them , Come after me , and I will make you fishers of men .

text_a: Om olomus nopoddi iyolo' do tuminongkiad di rambot om tanud no di Yesus .
text_b: And straight away they let go the nets and went after him .

text_a: Om lombus po kawagu i Yesus do minamanau , om kokito no dau o duwo kawagu tulun do miobpinai . Iyolo' nopo nga' i Yakub om i Yohanis , i tangaanak di Sabidi . Om maso diyolo' om i tapa' diyolo' do monombir di rambot do hiri'd parau' . Om iyolo' nga' linohou i' di Yesus .
text_b: And going on from there he saw two other brothers , James , the son of Zebedee , and John , his brother , in the boat with their father , stitching up their nets ; and he said , Come .

text_a: Om diiri i' om diiri do tinongkiadan diyolo' i parau' om i tapa' diyolo' , om tanud no iyolo' di Yesus .
text_b: And they went straight from the boat and their father and came after him .

text_a: Om tongkop no i Yesus di pomogunan do Galilia . Om minonuduk iyau do hiri'd walai'd sasambayangan om pinopopinsusui iyau di Habar dot Osonong do Pomorintaan do Kinorohingan . Om ogumu' o tulun do liningasan dau do mantad id mogisuwayan o toruol .
text_b: And Jesus went about in all Galilee , teaching in their Synagogues and preaching the good news of the kingdom , and making well those who were ill with any disease among the people .

text_a: Om nokotongkop o habar di Yesus dot id do pomogunan do Siria , gisom dot ogumu' tomod diri o tulun do ruminikot dot id dau . Om pootodo' no diyolo' dot id dau o koinsanai'd tulun di mogisuayan o toruol om kosusaan . I tulun di norusadan do rusod dot araat , om i kakaran , om it a' koundaliu nga' liningasan ngai' nopo di Yesus .
text_b: And news of him went out through all Syria ; and they took to him all who were ill with different diseases and pains , those having evil spirits and those who were off their heads , and those who had no power of moving . And he made them well .

text_a: Iri nopo tulun di minoyo' di Yesus do maso'ddi nga' ogumu' kopio . Haro mantad hilo'd Galilia , om haro mantad hilo'd Hopod o Bandar , om haro mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , Yudia , om haro po mantad id pomogunan dit id soborong do Yordan .
text_b: And there went after him great numbers from Galilee and Decapolis and Jerusalem and Judaea and from the other side of Jordan .

text_a: Om soira' di nokito di Yesus i tulun dot ogumu'ddi , om takad no iyau do hiri'd nulu-nulu , om irikau no . Om rikot ngai' no i tumatanud dau dot id dau ,
text_b: And seeing great masses of people he went up into the mountain ; and when he was seated his disciples came to him .

text_a: om timpuun no iyau do minonuduk diyolo' :
text_b: And with these words he gave them teaching , saying ,

text_a: Boros ka dau , “ Olumaag no i tulun di kopuriman do mosikin dot id suang do rusod ; tu' kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !
text_b: Happy are the poor in spirit : for the kingdom of heaven is theirs .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun di tumongob ; tu' insasamadan i' iyolo'd Kinorohingan !
text_b: Happy are those who are sad : for they will be comforted .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit osiriba' o ginawo ; tu' asanganu indo diyolo' iti pomogunan .
text_b: Happy are the gentle : for the earth will be their heritage .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit orohian do momonsoi'd korohian do Kinorohingan , do poinghalib mantad ko' korohiano' do minum ko' makan ; tu' pohubayaan indo i korohian do ginawo diyolo' .
text_b: Happy are those whose heart's desire is for righteousness : for they will have their desire .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit osianan do tulun do suwai ; tu' iyolo' nga' kosianan indo do Kinorohingan !
text_b: Happy are those who have mercy : for they will be given mercy .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit olidang o ginawo ; tu' kokito indo iyolo'd Kinorohingan .
text_b: Happy are the clean in heart : for they will see God .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun di popiulud ; tu' roitan indo iyolo'd tangaanak do Kinorohingan !
text_b: Happy are the peacemakers : for they will be named sons of God .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit inggoriton tu' momonsoi iyolo'd korohian do Kinorohingan ; kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !
text_b: Happy are those who are attacked on account of righteousness : for the kingdom of heaven will be theirs .

text_a: Olumaag kou no dot indaraaton kou piya , om inggoriton , om pinsingudutan , dot i tumanud kou doho' o kopongiyo'ddian .
text_b: Happy are you when men give you a bad name , and are cruel to you , and say all evil things against you falsely , because of me .

text_a: Tu' iri piro-piro nabi dit id gulu ko' iyokoyu nga' noinggorit i' do miagal diri . Kotood kou no om kooropod kou no kopio , tu' agayo i' o tisomuli' do nokoopi'd Tuhan do hilo'd surga do patahakon dokoyu , ” ka dau .
text_b: Be glad and full of joy ; for great is your reward in heaven : for so were the prophets attacked who were before you .

text_a: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Iyokoyu no miagal do silaon dot id toinsanan o tulun do hiti'd pomogunan . Nga' ondung manau i silaon , om a' no kopio milo do mosin kawagu . Om aiso' no guna'ddi , suwai ko' pataamon poo , om pingulakan pondo'd tulun .
text_b: You are the salt of the earth ; but if its taste goes from the salt , how will you make it salt again ? it is then good for nothing but to be put out and crushed under foot by men .

text_a: Iyokoyu no miagal do tanawau diti pomogunan . Iri nopo bandar dit id timpak do nulu-nulu om a' no milo'd lisokon .
text_b: You are the light of the world . A town put on a hill may be seen by all .

text_a: Aiso' i' o tulun di modtutud do lampung om tinggouban nogindod kakanan . Suwai ko' potimpakon i' dau i lampung diri dot id podtitimpakan kasai' do lampung , om otitihan ngai' indo o koinsanai'd tulun do hiri'd suang di walai .
text_b: And a burning light is not put under a vessel , but on its table ; so that its rays may be shining on all who are in the house .

text_a: Om iyo nogiddi tu' potitihon no kopio o tanawau dokoyu dot id tulun do suwai , om okito indo diyolo' i wonsoyon dokoyu dit osonong , om royohon nondo diyolo' i Tapa' dokoyu di hilo'd surga , ” ka dau .
text_b: Even so let your light be shining before men , so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven .

text_a: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Kada' kou pomusorou do kinorikatan ku nopo om mongoi pananus ngai' di Tourat di Musa om i ponudukan di nabi . Okon i' ko' mongoi pananus diri o kinorikatan ku , suwai ko' mongoi pamayaan di komoyon kopio'ddi .
text_b: Let there be no thought that I have come to put an end to the law or the prophets . I have not come for destruction , but to make complete .

text_a: Ilaai no dokoyu ! Do solinaid nopod haro o tawan om pomogunan , om iso' pod hurup ko' titik do hurup dit okooro' dot id Tourat nga' aiso' i' o tonuson , dot a' po angabayaan ngai' iri !
text_b: Truly I say to you , Till heaven and earth come to an end , not the smallest letter or part of a letter will in any way be taken from the law , till all things are done .

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om isai nopo tulun di tumolibamban dot ongoiso' piya di toturan diri , dot iri piya daa i toturan dit okooro' , om i tulun di monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi do miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit aiso' kopio o ngaran-ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga . Nga' isai nopo tulun di tumanud di Tourat om i monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi'd miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit agayo o ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga .
text_b: Whoever then goes against the smallest of these laws , teaching men to do the same , will be named least in the kingdom of heaven ; but he who keeps the laws , teaching others to keep them , will be named great in the kingdom of heaven .

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om soro-soroho' no dokoyu : Milo kou id sumuang di Pomorintaan do surga , ondung poimaha' o kotorodoko' dokoyu ko' i guru do Tourat om i tulun do Parisi , do momonsoi di korohian do Kinorohingan ! ” ka dau .
text_b: For I say to you , If your righteousness is not greater than the righteousness of the scribes and Pharisees , you will never go into the kingdom of heaven .

text_a: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Koilo kou i' di ponudukan di taki-aki toko' do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' kou pamatai ; tu' isai nopo i mamatai om bisaraon no , ’ ka .
text_b: You have knowledge that it was said in old times , You may not put to death ; and , Whoever puts to death will be in danger of being judged :

text_a: Nga' baino' nopo om poingkaa o doho'd poboroson dot id dokoyu : Isai nopo i tumogod do tulun do suwai , om bisaraon no ; om isai nopo i momolupu' do tulun do suwai , om mositi' nod bisaraon dot id toguang di momimisara' do tumanud di toturan do tugama' . Om isai nopo o momoros do , ‘ Basug ! ’ ka , do tulun do suwai o komoyon , om apatut no do pataamon do hilo'd tapui naraka .
text_b: But I say to you that everyone who is angry with his brother will be in danger of being judged ; and he who says to his brother , Raca , will be in danger from the Sanhedrin ; and whoever says , You foolish one , will be in danger of the hell of fire .

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om ondung haro o tiso' dokoyu di maso'd papatahak do porsombahan dot id Kinorohingan , om sigog indo dot osorou dau do haro o katagadan do tulun do suwai dot id dau ,
text_b: If then you are making an offering at the altar and there it comes to your mind that your brother has something against you ,

text_a: Iti ngai' no ngaran di komolohingan di Yesus Kristus , i sinakagon di Daud , om i sinakagon di Abraham . Mantad nopo di Abraham om di gisom do napaganak i Daud om iti ngai' no ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis :
text_b: I Abraham , i Isak , i Yakub , i Yohuda om i piro-piro tobpinai di Yohuda , i Piris om i Sira ( ngaran nopod tina' diyolo' om i Tamar ) , i Hisron , i Ram , i Aminadab , i Nahason , i Salmon , i Buas ( tina' nopo dau om i Rahab ) , i Obid ( tina' nopo dau om i Rut ) , i Isai , om i Raja' Daud .

text_a: I Abraham , i Isak , i Yakub , i Yohuda om i piro-piro tobpinai di Yohuda , i Piris om i Sira ( ngaran nopod tina' diyolo' om i Tamar ) , i Hisron , i Ram , i Aminadab , i Nahason , i Salmon , i Buas ( tina' nopo dau om i Rahab ) , i Obid ( tina' nopo dau om i Rut ) , i Isai , om i Raja' Daud .
text_b: Mantad no di Daud om gisom di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis : I Suliman ( tina' nopo dau om i sawo daa di Uria di gulu po ) , i Rihabiam , i Abia , i Asa , i Yosapat , i Yoram , i Usia , i Yotam , i Ahas , i Hiskia , i Manasi , i Amon , i Yosia , i Yikonia om i piro-piro tobpinai dau .

text_a: Mantad no di Daud om gisom di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis : I Suliman ( tina' nopo dau om i sawo daa di Uria di gulu po ) , i Rihabiam , i Abia , i Asa , i Yosapat , i Yoram , i Usia , i Yotam , i Ahas , i Hiskia , i Manasi , i Amon , i Yosia , i Yikonia om i piro-piro tobpinai dau .
text_b: Mantad no di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom di kinosusuon di Yesus om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan dau do nokotulis : i Yikonia , i Salatiol , i Sorubabil , i Abihud , i Iliakim , i Asur , i Sadok , i Akhim , i Iliud , i Iliasar , i Matan , i Yakub , om i Yusup i sawo di Maria . Om i Maria no minogkosusu di Yesus , i roitan do Kristus .

text_a: Mantad no di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom di kinosusuon di Yesus om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan dau do nokotulis : i Yikonia , i Salatiol , i Sorubabil , i Abihud , i Iliakim , i Asur , i Sadok , i Akhim , i Iliud , i Iliasar , i Matan , i Yakub , om i Yusup i sawo di Maria . Om i Maria no minogkosusu di Yesus , i roitan do Kristus .
text_b: Om mantad no di Abraham om gisom do napaganak i Daud , om hopod om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di Daud om gisom di tinanggayan do pisangod o bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di tinanggayan do pisangod i bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom do korikot di kinosusuon di Kristus om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan .

text_a: Om mantad no di Abraham om gisom do napaganak i Daud , om hopod om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di Daud om gisom di tinanggayan do pisangod o bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di tinanggayan do pisangod i bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom do korikot di kinosusuon di Kristus om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan .
text_b: Poingkaa no susui di kinosusuon di Yesus Kristus . I Maria nopo i tina' dau , om nokopitunang no di Yusup . Nga' tontok dit a' po iyolo' nokopikawin , om monontian no i Maria . Nga' a' i' di Yusup oilaan do monontian i Maria do mantad id sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: Poingkaa no susui di kinosusuon di Yesus Kristus . I Maria nopo i tina' dau , om nokopitunang no di Yusup . Nga' tontok dit a' po iyolo' nokopikawin , om monontian no i Maria . Nga' a' i' di Yusup oilaan do monontian i Maria do mantad id sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .
text_b: I Yusup nopo , i tunang di Maria diri nga' tulun dit otorodok do tumanud dot oturan do tugama' . Om pututon daa'ddi dau i pitunangan diyolo' di Maria . Nga' lisok-lisokon i' daa dau do momutut om a' i' ointingayam dot id toguang do tulun dot ogumu' i Maria .

text_a: I Yusup nopo , i tunang di Maria diri nga' tulun dit otorodok do tumanud dot oturan do tugama' . Om pututon daa'ddi dau i pitunangan diyolo' di Maria . Nga' lisok-lisokon i' daa dau do momutut om a' i' ointingayam dot id toguang do tulun dot ogumu' i Maria .
text_b: Nga' maso' po di Yusup do momusorou'ddi , om pongipi no iyau . Om id suang nopo di nipi dau nga' nokokito iyau dot iso' o moloikat do Tuhan do minoro-boros dau do poingkaa , “ Oi Yusup , i sinakagon di Daud , kada' kooris do mangawin di Maria ; tu' iri nopo tanak di ponontianon dau om mantad i' do sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: Nga' maso' po di Yusup do momusorou'ddi , om pongipi no iyau . Om id suang nopo di nipi dau nga' nokokito iyau dot iso' o moloikat do Tuhan do minoro-boros dau do poingkaa , “ Oi Yusup , i sinakagon di Daud , kada' kooris do mangawin di Maria ; tu' iri nopo tanak di ponontianon dau om mantad i' do sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .
text_b: Osusu nondo i Maria om kusai o tanak dau . Om pungaranan no kopio i tanak diri dot i Yesus , tu' iyau no popoidu' di tulun dau do mantad id dusa diyolo' , ” ka .

text_a: Osusu nondo i Maria om kusai o tanak dau . Om pungaranan no kopio i tanak diri dot i Yesus , tu' iyau no popoidu' di tulun dau do mantad id dusa diyolo' , ” ka .
text_b: Om nosiliu ngai' pogi' o miagal diri nga' mamayaan di boros do Tuhan do pinolombus di nabi dau do poingkaa ,

text_a: Om nosiliu ngai' pogi' o miagal diri nga' mamayaan di boros do Tuhan do pinolombus di nabi dau do poingkaa ,
text_b: “ Haro nondo tondu' dit a' po nodudun do kusai do monontian om mogkosusu dot iso' o tanak do kusai . Om pungaranan nondo i tanak diri dot i Imanuil , ” ka . ( Imanuil nopo om boros dot Ibrani do komoyon nopo om “ moyo-woyo' o Kinorohingan dati' , ” ka . )

text_a: “ Haro nondo tondu' dit a' po nodudun do kusai do monontian om mogkosusu dot iso' o tanak do kusai . Om pungaranan nondo i tanak diri dot i Imanuil , ” ka . ( Imanuil nopo om boros dot Ibrani do komoyon nopo om “ moyo-woyo' o Kinorohingan dati' , ” ka . )
text_b: Om koposik poddi i Yusup , om wonsoyo' no dau o miagal di pinoboros di moloikat do Tuhan dot id dau . Om kowino' no dau i Maria .

text_a: Om koposik poddi i Yusup , om wonsoyo' no dau o miagal di pinoboros di moloikat do Tuhan dot id dau . Om kowino' no dau i Maria .
text_b: Nga' solinaid nopo dit a' po i Maria nosusu di tanak diri , om a' po i Yusup duminudun di Maria do miagal di wonsoyon do tulun di misasawo . Om kosusu noddi i tanak diri , om pungaranai no di Yusup iyau dot i Yesus .

text_a: Nga' solinaid nopo dit a' po i Maria nosusu di tanak diri , om a' po i Yusup duminudun di Maria do miagal di wonsoyon do tulun di misasawo . Om kosusu noddi i tanak diri , om pungaranai no di Yusup iyau dot i Yesus .
text_b: I Yesus nopo om pinogkosusu do hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , it id pomogunan do Yudia . Iri nopo raja' do tontok diri om i Horudis . Om tontok noddi do ruminikot do hilo'd Yorusalim o piro-piro tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon . Tadon nopo diyolo' om hilo'd ponong id koulayon .

text_a: I Yesus nopo om pinogkosusu do hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , it id pomogunan do Yudia . Iri nopo raja' do tontok diri om i Horudis . Om tontok noddi do ruminikot do hilo'd Yorusalim o piro-piro tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon . Tadon nopo diyolo' om hilo'd ponong id koulayon .
text_b: Om boros ka diyolo' , “ Hinonggo i tanak di nosusu do sumiliu'd raja' do tulun do Yohudi ? Nokito dahai i rombituon dau do minimbulai do ponong id koulayon , om ruminikot diri iyahai'd hiti do mongoi tuku' dot id dau , ” ka diyolo' .

text_a: Om boros ka diyolo' , “ Hinonggo i tanak di nosusu do sumiliu'd raja' do tulun do Yohudi ? Nokito dahai i rombituon dau do minimbulai do ponong id koulayon , om ruminikot diri iyahai'd hiti do mongoi tuku' dot id dau , ” ka diyolo' .
text_b: Om kotigowo nopoddi i Raja' Horudis do nokorongou'ddi , om iri i tulun do hilo'd Yorusalim nga' nongkotigowo ngai' nogi' .

text_a: Om kotigowo nopoddi i Raja' Horudis do nokorongou'ddi , om iri i tulun do hilo'd Yorusalim nga' nongkotigowo ngai' nogi' .
text_b: Om lohowo' ngai' noddi di Horudis i boyoon dot imam om i guru do Tourat do tumimung . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' , “ Honggo kosusuon di Raja' di pinabatos mantad do Kinorohingan ? ” ka dau .

text_a: Om lohowo' ngai' noddi di Horudis i boyoon dot imam om i guru do Tourat do tumimung . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' , “ Honggo kosusuon di Raja' di pinabatos mantad do Kinorohingan ? ” ka dau .

text_a: Om simbar ka diyolo' , “ Hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia . Tu' poingkaa tinulis do songulun o nabi ,
text_b: ‘ Baitlahim nopo , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia , om okon i' ko' it okoro' kopio dot id pogialatan di bandar dot angagayo do hilo' . Tu' Baitlahim no tadon do songulun o boyoon di sumiliu'd gompomogompi' dot Israil , i tulun ku , ’ ka . ”

text_a: ‘ Baitlahim nopo , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia , om okon i' ko' it okoro' kopio dot id pogialatan di bandar dot angagayo do hilo' . Tu' Baitlahim no tadon do songulun o boyoon di sumiliu'd gompomogompi' dot Israil , i tulun ku , ’ ka . ”
text_b: Om koilo poddi i Horudis di boros do miagal diri , om pomolisok-lisok no iyau do minomolohou di tulun dit ongoilo diri . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' ondung soira' kopio diyolo' kokito i rombituon diri .

text_a: Om koilo poddi i Horudis di boros do miagal diri , om pomolisok-lisok no iyau do minomolohou di tulun dit ongoilo diri . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' ondung soira' kopio diyolo' kokito i rombituon diri .
text_b: Om suhuo' no dau iyolo' do minongoi do hilo'd Baitlahim om bilinai no dau iyolo' , “ Pamanau kou no , om ihumon no kopio dokoyu i tanak diri . Om abantalan nopondo dokoyu , om sunudan oku no , om koongoi oku i' iyoho' kotuku' dot id tanak diri , ” ka dau .

text_a: Om suhuo' no dau iyolo' do minongoi do hilo'd Baitlahim om bilinai no dau iyolo' , “ Pamanau kou no , om ihumon no kopio dokoyu i tanak diri . Om abantalan nopondo dokoyu , om sunudan oku no , om koongoi oku i' iyoho' kotuku' dot id tanak diri , ” ka dau .
text_b: Om pamanau noddi iyolo' . Om hiri noddid tanga'd ralan , om kokito no kawagu diyolo' i rombituon di nokito diyolo' di gulu po do minulai do ponong id koulayon . Om otood tomod diri iyolo' do nokokito di rombituon diri do hiri'd doburuan diyolo' . Om undorong no i rombituon do hiri'd hapak di nokoiyonon di tanak .

text_b: Om suang no iyolo' do hiri'd walai'ddi , om kokito no diyolo' i tanak om i Maria , i tina' di tanak . Om otud no iyolo' do tuminuku' di tanak . Om ukabai no diyolo' i pinoiyanan di nigitan diyolo' , om popuhawango' no diyolo' o tamas , om kominyan om mur dot id tanak diri .

text_b: Om poinsano' no iyolo'd Kinorohingan dot id suang do nipi dot a' gumuli' dot id di Horudis . Om uli' noddi iyolo' do minaya' do ralan do suwai .

Om mundorong nopondod hilo' do gisom do moro-boros kawagu oku diya' , ” ka .

text_b: Om tungag no i Yusup , om totuong iddi do tinanggayan dau i tanak om i tina' di tanak do minongoi do hilo'd Masir .
