text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit orohian do momonsoi'd korohian do Kinorohingan , do poinghalib mantad ko' korohiano' do minum ko' makan ; tu' pohubayaan indo i korohian do ginawo diyolo' .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit orohian do momonsoi'd korohian do Kinorohingan , do poinghalib mantad ko' korohiano' do minum ko' makan ; tu' pohubayaan indo i korohian do ginawo diyolo' .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit osianan do tulun do suwai ; tu' iyolo' nga' kosianan indo do Kinorohingan !

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit osianan do tulun do suwai ; tu' iyolo' nga' kosianan indo do Kinorohingan !
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit olidang o ginawo ; tu' kokito indo iyolo'd Kinorohingan .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit olidang o ginawo ; tu' kokito indo iyolo'd Kinorohingan .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun di popiulud ; tu' roitan indo iyolo'd tangaanak do Kinorohingan !

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun di popiulud ; tu' roitan indo iyolo'd tangaanak do Kinorohingan !
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit inggoriton tu' momonsoi iyolo'd korohian do Kinorohingan ; kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit inggoriton tu' momonsoi iyolo'd korohian do Kinorohingan ; kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !
text_b: Olumaag kou no dot indaraaton kou piya , om inggoriton , om pinsingudutan , dot i tumanud kou doho' o kopongiyo'ddian .

text_a: Olumaag kou no dot indaraaton kou piya , om inggoriton , om pinsingudutan , dot i tumanud kou doho' o kopongiyo'ddian .
text_b: Tu' iri piro-piro nabi dit id gulu ko' iyokoyu nga' noinggorit i' do miagal diri . Kotood kou no om kooropod kou no kopio , tu' agayo i' o tisomuli' do nokoopi'd Tuhan do hilo'd surga do patahakon dokoyu , ” ka dau .

text_a: Tu' iri piro-piro nabi dit id gulu ko' iyokoyu nga' noinggorit i' do miagal diri . Kotood kou no om kooropod kou no kopio , tu' agayo i' o tisomuli' do nokoopi'd Tuhan do hilo'd surga do patahakon dokoyu , ” ka dau .
text_b: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Iyokoyu no miagal do silaon dot id toinsanan o tulun do hiti'd pomogunan . Nga' ondung manau i silaon , om a' no kopio milo do mosin kawagu . Om aiso' no guna'ddi , suwai ko' pataamon poo , om pingulakan pondo'd tulun .

text_a: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Iyokoyu no miagal do silaon dot id toinsanan o tulun do hiti'd pomogunan . Nga' ondung manau i silaon , om a' no kopio milo do mosin kawagu . Om aiso' no guna'ddi , suwai ko' pataamon poo , om pingulakan pondo'd tulun .
text_b: Iyokoyu no miagal do tanawau diti pomogunan . Iri nopo bandar dit id timpak do nulu-nulu om a' no milo'd lisokon .

text_a: Iyokoyu no miagal do tanawau diti pomogunan . Iri nopo bandar dit id timpak do nulu-nulu om a' no milo'd lisokon .
text_b: Aiso' i' o tulun di modtutud do lampung om tinggouban nogindod kakanan . Suwai ko' potimpakon i' dau i lampung diri dot id podtitimpakan kasai' do lampung , om otitihan ngai' indo o koinsanai'd tulun do hiri'd suang di walai .

text_a: Aiso' i' o tulun di modtutud do lampung om tinggouban nogindod kakanan . Suwai ko' potimpakon i' dau i lampung diri dot id podtitimpakan kasai' do lampung , om otitihan ngai' indo o koinsanai'd tulun do hiri'd suang di walai .
text_b: Om iyo nogiddi tu' potitihon no kopio o tanawau dokoyu dot id tulun do suwai , om okito indo diyolo' i wonsoyon dokoyu dit osonong , om royohon nondo diyolo' i Tapa' dokoyu di hilo'd surga , ” ka dau .

text_a: Om iyo nogiddi tu' potitihon no kopio o tanawau dokoyu dot id tulun do suwai , om okito indo diyolo' i wonsoyon dokoyu dit osonong , om royohon nondo diyolo' i Tapa' dokoyu di hilo'd surga , ” ka dau .
text_b: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Kada' kou pomusorou do kinorikatan ku nopo om mongoi pananus ngai' di Tourat di Musa om i ponudukan di nabi . Okon i' ko' mongoi pananus diri o kinorikatan ku , suwai ko' mongoi pamayaan di komoyon kopio'ddi .

text_a: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Kada' kou pomusorou do kinorikatan ku nopo om mongoi pananus ngai' di Tourat di Musa om i ponudukan di nabi . Okon i' ko' mongoi pananus diri o kinorikatan ku , suwai ko' mongoi pamayaan di komoyon kopio'ddi .
text_b: Ilaai no dokoyu ! Do solinaid nopod haro o tawan om pomogunan , om iso' pod hurup ko' titik do hurup dit okooro' dot id Tourat nga' aiso' i' o tonuson , dot a' po angabayaan ngai' iri !

text_a: Ilaai no dokoyu ! Do solinaid nopod haro o tawan om pomogunan , om iso' pod hurup ko' titik do hurup dit okooro' dot id Tourat nga' aiso' i' o tonuson , dot a' po angabayaan ngai' iri !
text_b: Iyo nopoddi , om isai nopo tulun di tumolibamban dot ongoiso' piya di toturan diri , dot iri piya daa i toturan dit okooro' , om i tulun di monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi do miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit aiso' kopio o ngaran-ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga . Nga' isai nopo tulun di tumanud di Tourat om i monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi'd miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit agayo o ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga .

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om isai nopo tulun di tumolibamban dot ongoiso' piya di toturan diri , dot iri piya daa i toturan dit okooro' , om i tulun di monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi do miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit aiso' kopio o ngaran-ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga . Nga' isai nopo tulun di tumanud di Tourat om i monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi'd miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit agayo o ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga .
text_b: Iyo nopoddi , om soro-soroho' no dokoyu : Milo kou id sumuang di Pomorintaan do surga , ondung poimaha' o kotorodoko' dokoyu ko' i guru do Tourat om i tulun do Parisi , do momonsoi di korohian do Kinorohingan ! ” ka dau .

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om soro-soroho' no dokoyu : Milo kou id sumuang di Pomorintaan do surga , ondung poimaha' o kotorodoko' dokoyu ko' i guru do Tourat om i tulun do Parisi , do momonsoi di korohian do Kinorohingan ! ” ka dau .
text_b: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Koilo kou i' di ponudukan di taki-aki toko' do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' kou pamatai ; tu' isai nopo i mamatai om bisaraon no , ’ ka .

text_a: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Koilo kou i' di ponudukan di taki-aki toko' do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' kou pamatai ; tu' isai nopo i mamatai om bisaraon no , ’ ka .
text_b: Nga' baino' nopo om poingkaa o doho'd poboroson dot id dokoyu : Isai nopo i tumogod do tulun do suwai , om bisaraon no ; om isai nopo i momolupu' do tulun do suwai , om mositi' nod bisaraon dot id toguang di momimisara' do tumanud di toturan do tugama' . Om isai nopo o momoros do , ‘ Basug ! ’ ka , do tulun do suwai o komoyon , om apatut no do pataamon do hilo'd tapui naraka .

text_a: Nga' baino' nopo om poingkaa o doho'd poboroson dot id dokoyu : Isai nopo i tumogod do tulun do suwai , om bisaraon no ; om isai nopo i momolupu' do tulun do suwai , om mositi' nod bisaraon dot id toguang di momimisara' do tumanud di toturan do tugama' . Om isai nopo o momoros do , ‘ Basug ! ’ ka , do tulun do suwai o komoyon , om apatut no do pataamon do hilo'd tapui naraka .
text_b: Iyo nopoddi , om ondung haro o tiso' dokoyu di maso'd papatahak do porsombahan dot id Kinorohingan , om sigog indo dot osorou dau do haro o katagadan do tulun do suwai dot id dau ,

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om ondung haro o tiso' dokoyu di maso'd papatahak do porsombahan dot id Kinorohingan , om sigog indo dot osorou dau do haro o katagadan do tulun do suwai dot id dau ,
text_b: om mositi' no do tongkiadan po dau i porsombahan dau'ddi do hiri'd dotimbabaan di pananaraban do porsombahan , om mongoi po ponokibabas di tulun dit otogod dau . Om gumuli' nogindo do mongoi papatahak di porsombahan dau dot id Kinorohingan .

text_a: Ã hã rob'ui'éré hã Zezu Cristuhu hi'rata norĩ za'ratazé . Ta hã Dawihi nhihudu , duré Abra'ãhã nhihudu .
text_b: The book of the generations of Jesus Christ , the son of David , the son of Abraham .

text_a: Abra'ã hã Izatihi mama . Izati hã Zacoho mama . Zaco hã Zuda norĩ mama , tisisãnawã norĩ me .
text_b: The son of Abraham was Isaac ; and the son of Isaac was Jacob ; and the sons of Jacob were Judah and his brothers ;

text_a: Zuda hã Perezihi mama , duré Zeraha mama . Ĩna zahuré hã Tama na ĩsisi hã . Duré Perezi hã Esirõhõ mama . Duré Esirõ hã Arãhã mama , ta hã .
text_b: And the sons of Judah were Perez and Zerah by Tamar ; and the son of Perez was Hezron ; and the son of Hezron was Ram ;

text_a: Arã hã Aminadabehe mama . Duré Aminadabe hã Nasõhõ mama . Duré Nasõ hã Samohõ mama .
text_b: And the son of Ram was Amminadab ; and the son of Amminadab was Nahshon ; and the son of Nahshon was Salmon ;

text_a: Samo hã Bu'azihi mama . Bu'azihi na hã Ra'abi na ĩsisi hã . Duré Bu'azi hã Obedihi mama . Obedihi na nhisi hã , Ruti na ĩsisi hã . Duré Obedi hã Zéséhé mama .
text_b: And the son of Salmon by Rahab was Boaz ; and the son of Boaz by Ruth was Obed ; and the son of Obed was Jesse ;

text_a: Zésé hã Dawihi mama , dama ĩpire mama . Dawi hã Saromahã mama . Uri'asi ĩdâ'â mro wa , ma podo , Saroma hã .
text_b: And the son of Jesse was David the king ; and the son of David was Solomon by her who had been the wife of Uriah ;

text_a: Saroma hã Robu'ãhã mama . Duré Robu'ã hã Abizaha mama . Duré Abiza hã Azaha mama .
text_b: And the son of Solomon was Rehoboam ; and the son of Rehoboam was Abijah ; and the son of Abijah was Asa ;

text_a: Aza hã Zosapaha mama . Duré Zosapa hã Zorãhã mama . Zorã hã Uzi'asihi hi'rada .
text_b: And the son of Asa was Jehoshaphat ; and the son of Jehoshaphat was Joram ; and the son of Joram was Uzziah ;

text_a: Uzi'asi hã Zotãhã mama . Duré Zotã hã Acasihi mama . Duré Acasi hã Ezetizaha mama , ta hã .
text_b: And the son of Uzziah was Jotham ; and the son of Jotham was Ahaz ; and the son of Ahaz was Hezekiah ;

text_a: Ezetiza hã Manaséhé mama . Duré Manasé hã Amosihi mama . Amosi hã Zozi'asihi mama , ta hã .
text_b: And the son of Hezekiah was Manasseh ; and the son of Manasseh was Amon ; and the son of Amon was Josiah ;

text_a: Zozi'asi hã Zeconiza norĩ mama , tisisãnawã norĩ me . Babironiza u Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , da te séme da , da te simroi mono ré , ma tô ta norĩ hã tipoto za'ra .
text_b: And the sons of Josiah were Jechoniah and his brothers , at the time of the taking away to Babylon .

text_a: Tawamhã Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , Babironiza u da te simroi mono za'u si , ma tô Zeconiza hã poto , Sarati'é hã . Sarati'é hã Zorobabéhé mama , ta hã .
text_b: And after the taking away to Babylon , Jechoniah had a son Shealtiel ; and Shealtiel had Zerubbabel ;

text_a: Zorobabé hã Abi'udihi mama . Duré Abi'udi hã Eri'atĩhĩ mama . Duré Eri'atĩ hã Azoho mama .
text_b: And Zerubbabel had Abiud ; and Abiud had Eliakim ; and Eliakim had Azor ;

text_a: Azo hã Sadotihi mama . Duré Sadoti hã Atĩhĩ mama . Duré Atĩ hã Eri'udihi mama .
text_b: And Azor had Zadok ; and Zadok had Achim ; and Achim had Eliud ;

text_a: Eri'udi hã Eri'azaha mama . Duré Eri'aza hã Matãhã mama . Duré Matã hã Zacoho mama , ta hã .
text_b: And Eliud had Eleazar ; and Eleazar had Matthan ; and Matthan had Jacob ;

text_a: Zaco hã Zuzéhé mama . Zuzé hã Marizaha mro . Mariza hã , Zezusihi na , ta hã . Zezusi hã , ta hã Cristu , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te ĩpisudu , Danho'reptui'wa da , da te 're ĩsisi za'ra mono .
text_b: And the son of Jacob was Joseph the husband of Mary , who gave birth to Jesus , whose name is Christ .

text_a: Ãne hã 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã , Abra'ãhã hawimhã , Dawihi u hã . Duré 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã Dawihi hawimhã , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , da te ĩsimroi mono zéb u hã , Babironiza u . Duré 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , da te ĩsimroi mono zém hawimhã , Cristu ĩpotozéb u hã .
text_b: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; and from David to the taking away to Babylon , fourteen generations ; and from the taking away to Babylon to the coming of Christ , fourteen generations .

text_a: Tawamhã ãne Zezu Cristuhu potozé hã : Mariza hã Zezusi , ãma ĩna da hã ma tô sima ropisutu zahuré Zuzéhé me , sina mro zahuré da . Tane nherẽ , sina mro zahuré õ ré , ma tô 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na tiwasã Mariza hã , te te sa'rese õ nherẽ .
text_b: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was in this way : when his mother Mary was going to be married to Joseph , before they came together the discovery was made that she was with child by the Holy Spirit .

text_a: Tawamhã aibâ hã Marizaha ãma ĩmro da hã 're morĩ wẽ di , Zuzé na ĩsisi hã . Ta hã marĩ ĩwẽ si te te 're 'manharĩ u'âsi . Taha wa , ma tô sima rosa'rata , ãma ĩmro da ropisudu hã pi'uriwi za te te siwi ĩpari na hã , duré danho'a ĩwasété na te te ãma hiri wa , da te dasiwi waihu'u za'ra tõ da .
text_b: And Joseph , her husband , being an upright man , and not desiring to make her a public example , had a mind to put her away privately .

text_a: Ãne na te te sima rosa'rata wamhã , hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa hã ma tô tãma sihâi'ré , sõtõ 'rowi . Ãne te tãma tinha : — Zuzé , Dawihi nhihudu , asina aihâtâ'â tõ , Marizaha ãma aimro tõ da hã . Ta hã ma tô tiwasã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na .
text_b: But when he was giving thought to these things , an angel of the Lord came to him in a dream , saying , Joseph , son of David , have no fear of taking Mary as your wife ; because that which is in her body is of the Holy Spirit .

text_a: Ĩ'ra hã 'watébrémi na te za tãma podo . Tawamhã Zezusi na te za ĩsisi . Danho'reptui'wa te wasu'u , ĩsisi hã . Taha si te za tinhib'a'uwẽ hã te te 're anho'reptu , ĩwasété hawi , duré 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te 're ĩdahâ za'ra mono zém hawi .
text_b: And she will give birth to a son ; and you will give him the name Jesus ; for he will give his people salvation from their sins .

text_a: Ãne da hã ma tô pisutu , Zezusihi ma , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã duréihã tizadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wai ma , Iza'izaha ma , te te ĩwaihu'uzém na te te ãma uwaimrami da . Ãne ma tô tãma waihu'u , duréihã : “ Pi'õi ubuni hã te za tiwasã . Duré ĩ'ra hã te za tãma waptãrã , aibâ na . Taha nhisi hã za , Emanuwé na ĩsisi hã . ” ( 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , wasiré 're ĩmorĩ u'â , te wasu'u , ĩsisi hã . ) Ãne 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te ãma ĩrowaihu'uzé hã , duréihã .
text_b: Now all this took place so that the word of the Lord by the prophet might come true ,

text_a: Tawamhã Zuzé hã utu wamhã , hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa te te tãma ĩwaihu'uzéb zarina , ma tô ãma timro oto , Marizaha ãma , awa'awi .
text_b: And Joseph did as the angel of the Lord had said to him , and took her as his wife ;

text_a: Tane nherẽ , Zuzé hã te te sima ãma rosa'rata õ di a'â Marizaha ãma , ĩ'ra tãma waptã'ã õ ré . Taré te ĩré 'madâ . Tawamhã ĩ'ra tãma waptã'ã wamhã , Zuzé hã ma tô sisi , Zezusi na .
text_b: And he had no connection with her till she had given birth to a son ; and he gave him the name Jesus .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã ma tô podo , Berẽ na 'ri nho'õmo nhisi ãma , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma . Apito Erodi hã , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ te te 're 'madâ'â za'ra mono ré , ma waptãrã . Waptã'ã parip si , ma tô wasi na romnhoré'wa norĩ hã aihutu Zeruzarẽ u , bâtâ pusizém hawi , rowaihu'u pese 'wa norĩ hã .
text_b: Now when the birth of Jesus took place in Beth-lehem of Judaea , in the days of Herod the king , there came wise men from the east to Jerusalem ,

text_a: Tawamhã te sô anharĩ za'ra , Zezusihi zô : — E mahãta 'watébrémi , zudezu norĩ nhib'apito da , ĩpodo hã . Wa norĩ hã wa tô 'madâ'â za'ra ni , wasi hã , bâtâ pusizém niwĩmhã , zudezu norĩ nhib'apito da , ĩpotozé te te ĩwasu'u hã . Taha wa , wa we ai'aba'ré ni , ãma wawata za'ra da . — Ãne ma tô sô anharĩ za'ra .
text_b: Saying , Where is the King of the Jews whose birth has now taken place ? We have seen his star in the east and have come to give him worship .

text_a: Tawamhã apito Erodi te te wapari wamhã , hâtâ'â uptabi di , uburé Zeruzarẽ ãma 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ zama .
text_b: And when it came to the ears of Herod the king , he was troubled , and all Jerusalem with him .

text_a: Tawamhã apito Erodi hã ma tô 'rã'õtõ , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma , da'ãma romhuri'wa ĩpire norĩ hã , duré ĩsimiroti na rob'ui'éré 'rata na dama rowahutu'wa norĩ hã te te sadanharĩ za'ra da : — E mame te za waptãrã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te ĩpisudu hã , Danho'reptui'wa da . — Ãne te sadanharĩ za'ra .
text_b: And he got together all the chief priests and scribes of the people , questioning them as to where the birth-place of the Christ would be .

text_a: Tawamhã ma ãma sada'âbâ za'ra : — Berẽ na 'ri nho'õmo nhisi ãma te za waptãrã , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma . Duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa hã ma tô ãne na ãma rob'ui'éré siro , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono mreme na :
text_b: And they said to him , In Beth-lehem of Judaea ; for so it is said in the writings of the prophet ,

text_a: “ A norĩ wa'wa hã Berẽ ãma 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono norĩ hã Zudaha nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai ãma 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono norĩ hã dama aiwapu na 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono newa , te za oto dama asisi za'ẽtẽ na dama 're aihâimana u'âsi za'ra wa'aba mo . E marĩ wa . Tame danhib'apito da hã za poto wa , ĩ̱nhib'a'uwẽ norĩ hã te te 're ab'madâ'â pese mono da , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ hã . ” Ãne duréihã ma tô ãma rob'ui'éré siro , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u'wa hã .
text_b: You Beth-lehem , in the land of Judah , are not the least among the chiefs of Judah : out of you will come a ruler , who will be the keeper of my people Israel .

text_a: Tawamhã Erodi hã ma tô sô tihârâ za'ra , bâtâ pusizém hawi ĩsihutu norĩ zô , pi'uriwi te te sadanharĩ za'ra da , ta norĩ hã : — E mahãna ma tô wasi hã watobro . — Ãne te sadanharĩ za'ra .
text_b: Then Herod sent for the wise men privately , and put questions to them about what time the star had been seen .

text_a: Te te sadanharĩ za'ra pari , ma tô tãma rob'ru za'ra , Berẽ u si'aba'ré da . Ãne te duré tãma rob'ru za'ra : — Mo oto ai'aba'réi wa'aba , 'watébrémi zô asinharĩ pese za'ra wa'aba da . Sõpẽtẽ za'ra wa'aba wamhã , ma'ãpé apâ we asiwi ĩ̱po're pu'u aba za , te waihu'u da , ĩtẽme ĩ̱morĩ da duré wa hã , ãma ĩ̱wata da , ĩ̱zama . — Ãne ma tô tãma waihu'u za'ra , apito Erodi hã .
text_b: And he sent them to Beth-lehem and said , Go and make certain where the young child is ; and when you have seen him , let me have news of it , so that I may come and give him worship .

text_a: Tawamhã apito mreme te te wapari za'ra parimhã , robzabui'wa norĩ hã te oto ai'aba'ré , Berẽ u . Tawamhã bâdâdi na si'aba'réi ré , ma tô wasi hã 'madâ'â za'ra , tô õ hã tirob ãma ré te te ĩ'madâ'â za'ra hã . Te ĩsõwa timorĩ za'ra . Tawamhã ma tô oto mazazâ . 'Watébrémi ĩsãmrazém nho'õmoi baba , te oto za , wasi hã .
text_b: And after hearing the king , they went on their way ; and the star which they saw in the east went before them , till it came to rest over the place where the young child was .

text_a: Tawamhã aibâ norĩ hã wasi te te 'madâ'â za'ra wamhã , toi uptabi za'ra di . Taha wa , te 're to za'ra .
text_b: And when they saw the star they were full of joy .

text_a: Tawamhã 'ri para u ma tô asisi . Sisisi wamhã , ma tô sabu za'ra 'watébrémi hã , ĩna ĩré sãmra ré , Mariza hã . Tawamhã hi'rãtitõ ma tô asimro , ãma wata za'ra da . Taha pari , ma tô 'ridawa za'ra , tinhimiro'wapézéb za'ra hã . Ma tô ãma sawi za'ra , tinhoprub za'ra zém na ; ẽtẽ'ubuzi pré oru hã , duré wedewati ĩsadaze hã , duré wedewati ĩsadaze si'u'ẽne hã . Taha na ma tô tãma tinhoprub za'ra .
text_b: And they came into the house , and saw the young child with Mary , his mother ; and falling down on their faces they gave him worship ; and from their store they gave him offerings of gold , perfume , and spices .

text_a: Tawamhã rosawẽrẽ na ma tô 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã tãma waihu'u za'ra , bâtâ pusizém hawi ĩsihutu norĩ ma , apâ si'aba'ré tõ da , Erodihi u . Taha wa , te bâdâdi amo na apâ ai'aba'ré , tirob u .
text_b: And it was made clear to them by God in a dream that they were not to go back to Herod ; so they went into their country by another way .

text_a: Tawamhã aibâ norĩ si'aba'ré za'u si , ma tô hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa hã Zuzéhé ma sihâi'ré , sõtõ 'rowi . Ãne te tãma rowasu'u : — Apito Erodi hã ma tô dama rob'ru , ai'uté zô danhopré mono da , ĩsadawa para da te wĩrĩ da . Taha wa , te za oto ai'u . Ai'uté hã sa'ra na . Duré ĩna zama ĩré saprõni Ezitu u , tame a'â ĩré aimasisi aba da , dawi . Tawamhã apâ we ĩ'ane wa'aba zéb da hã , wa hã te aima ĩwaihu'uzéb zô si , te za asina asimipa . — Ãne ma tãma waihu'u , hâiwa ãma romhuri'wa hã .
text_b: And when they had gone , an angel of the Lord came to Joseph in a dream , saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into Egypt , and do not go from there till I give you word ; for Herod will be searching for the young child to put him to death .

text_a: Tawamhã Zuzé hã ma tô udu . Utu wamhã , awa'awi ma tô ai'utére hã sa'ra . Ĩna hã ma tô ĩré saprõ barana , Ezitu u .
text_b: So he took the young child and his mother by night , and went into Egypt ;

text_a: Tawamhã tame te oto ĩré aimasisi zahuré , apito Erodi hã ĩdâ'âzéb u . Ãne ma tô tiromhâiba , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , tizadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wai ma , te te ĩwaihu'uzém na te te sina uwaimrami da . Ãne ma tô tãma waihu'u siro : “ Wa hã ĩ̱'ra , wa satõ , Ezitu hawi morĩ da . ” Ãne duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono mreme hã , ti'ra ãma hã .
text_b: And was there till the death of Herod ; so that the word of the Lord through the prophet might come true , Out of Egypt have I sent for my son .

text_a: Tawamhã apito Erodi hã aibâ norĩ , bâtâ pusizém hawi we ĩsi'aba'ré norĩ hã pi'uriwi tiwi ĩsi'aba'ré na te te ãma rowaihu'u za'ra wa , ma tô ab'rui pese . Sib'rui wa , tãma da'wapéi'wa norĩ hã ma tô satõrĩ za'ra Berẽ u , 'watébrémi zô si'aba'ré da , uburé te te dawi uprosi mono da , maparane ãma ĩwahu mono õ hã , Berẽ ãma 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono norĩ 'ra hã , duré Berẽ 'rata 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono norĩ 'ra zama . Aibâ norĩ hã wasi te te ĩ'madâ'â za'ra zém na te te tãma ĩwaihu'u za'ra zéb zarina , ma tô apito Erodi hã ãne 'manha .
text_b: Then Herod , when he saw that he had been tricked by the wise men , was very angry ; and he sent out , and put to death all the male children in Beth-lehem and in all the parts round about it , from two years old and under , acting on the knowledge which he had got with care from the wise men .

text_a: Ãne ma tô tiromhâiba , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa te te ĩrowasu'uzéb zarina , Zeremiasi hã . Ma tô ãne ãma rob'ui'éré siro , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono mreme na :
text_b: Then the word of Jeremiah the prophet came true ,

text_a: “ Rama na romnhisi ãma hã dawawa hã ma tô wapari za'ra ni , dazadari 'rãihâ hã . Raté hã te aiwa'õ , ti'ra norĩ ãma . Pẽ'ẽzé uptabi wa , te te sima wẽ õ di , da te ĩpẽ'ẽtété da hã , ĩ'ra norĩ hã uburé tiwi si'utõrĩ wa . ” Ãne ma tô Zeremiasi hã rowasu'u .
text_b: In Ramah there was a sound of weeping and great sorrow , Rachel weeping for her children , and she would not be comforted for their loss .

text_a: Tawamhã apito Erodi dâ'â parimhã , ma tô hâiwa ãma Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa hã Zuzéhé ma sihâi'ré , sõtõ 'rowi , Ezitu ãma sãmra ré .
text_b: But when Herod was dead , an angel of the Lord came in a dream to Joseph in Egypt ,

text_a: Ãne te tãma tinha : — Oto ai'utu . 'Watébrémi hã oto subzari aba . Ĩna ĩré saprõni , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai u . Aibâ norĩ hã 'watébrémi te te aré siwi wĩrĩ da , sô ĩsi'aba'ré norĩ hã ma tô tidâ'â za'ra . — Ãne te tãma rowasu'u .
text_b: Saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into the land of Israel : because they who were attempting to take the young child's life are dead .

text_a: Tawamhã Zuzé hã utu wamhã , ma tô apâ saprõni zahuré 'watébrémi hã , ĩna me , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai u .
text_b: And he got up , and took the young child and his mother , and came into the land of Israel .

text_a: Tane nherẽ , ma tô wapa Aterazu , apito Erodihi 'ra wasu'u hã , timama nhowa're're ĩsébré na hã Zudeza ãma te te 're ĩda'ab'madâ'â mono da hã . Taha wa , pahi di , tame ĩré 're ĩhâimana zahuré mono da hã . Tawamhã sõtõ 'rowi ma tô tãma waihu'u na sahu , hâiwa ãma 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma romhuri'wa hã , Zuzéhé ma , Zudeza u neb zahuré tõ da , Darireza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi u si neb da . Taha wa , ma tô tamomop si tineb zahuré , Zuzé norĩ hã .
text_b: But when it came to his ears that Archelaus was ruling over Judaea in the place of his father Herod , he was in fear of going there ; and God having given him news of the danger in a dream , he went out of the way into the country parts of Galilee .

text_a: Tame te oto 're simasisi zahuré , Nazaré na 'ri wa'õtõ nhisi ãma . Ãne ĩromhâimanazé hã , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa norĩ nhimi'ui'éré hã te te ãma uwaimrami da . Ãne duréihã ĩwasu'u na rob'ui'éré 'rada hã : “ Ta hã Nazaré ãma 're ĩsãmra mono na te za oto da te 're sisi za'ra . ” Ãne ma tô waihu'u sirõmo za'ra , za da te dasima 're ĩwasu'u za'ra mono zéb da na hã .
text_b: And he came and was living in a town named Nazareth : so that the word of the prophets might come true , He will be named a Nazarene .

text_a: Tawamhã wahub ahâ na ãma wahu pari , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã mo a'ubuni u , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u na te te dama ãma sãna'rata da .
text_b: And in those days John the Baptist came preaching in the waste land of Judaea ,

text_a: Ãne te dama rowasu'u : — Ma'ãpé , aiwasété wi aipizari za'ra wa'aba . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , da'ãma 're ĩsib'a'uwẽ mono zéb u hã romhuture di oto . — Ãne te dama rowahutu , Zuwã Batita hã .
text_b: Saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin ; for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Duréihã Iza'iza hã ma tô Zuwã Batitaha ãma rob'ui'éré siro , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa hã . Ãne ĩsimi'ui'éré hã : “ Ni'wa hã te za te te dama 're rob'mahârâ , a'ubuni wi : Bâdâdi hã asiwi ropese aba , Wanhib'apito zô . Ĩmana 'rãmi bâdâdi hã sô sa'ra wa'aba , awa'awi da . ” Ãne ma tô Iza'iza hã ãma rob'ui'éré , romhâ ré .
text_b: For this is he of whom Isaiah the prophet said , The voice of one crying in the waste land , Make ready the way of the Lord , make his roads straight .

text_a: Zuwã hã awaru ba'õmore zéré 'manharĩ na te 're si'uza . Duré romhâ 'manharĩ hâiwaré na te 're si'usisi . 'Riti na si te 're sa . Duré rom na ropĩni na zama te 're sa .
text_b: Now John was clothed in camel's hair , with a leather band about him ; and his food was locusts and honey .

text_a: Tawamhã Zeruzarẽ ãma 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ hã , duré Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma daza'rui mono bâ 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono hã , duré Zodã pa nhisi 'rata 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono norĩ zama , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito , daro mono bâ . Ĩsimirowasu'u hã da te 're wapari za'ra mono da , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito .
text_b: Then Jerusalem and all Judaea went out to him , and all the people from near Jordan ;

text_a: Taha wa , dawasété na ma tô 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra 'râwi , sõ'awi , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma . Dawasété na 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra mono sidâpâsi , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã â dawabzuri hã te te dama 're ab'manharĩ , Zodã pa ãma .
text_b: And they were given baptism by him in the river Jordan , saying openly that they had done wrong .

text_a: Tawamhã Zuwã hã ma tô 'madâ'â za'ra , parisezu norĩ hã ahâ uptabi na , duré sadusezu norĩ hã . Te ĩtẽme ai'aba'ré , â dawabzuri te te dame 'manharĩ za'ra da . Tawamhã Zuwã hã te te 'madâ'â za'ra wamhã , te tãma nharĩ za'ra , parisezu norĩ ma : — A norĩ wa'wa hã wahi ne te 're anomro aba mo . E 'wa simiroti zarina , te we ĩ̱tẽme ai'aba'réi wa'wa bété , â dawabzuri si ĩ'manharĩ za'ra wa'aba zém na , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzé wi , asisõ'reptu za'ra wa'aba da bâ , aiwasédé hã rẽme za'ra wa'aba õ nherẽ .
text_b: But when he saw a number of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to his baptism , he said to them , Offspring of snakes , at whose word are you going in flight from the wrath to come ?

text_a: Sena na aiwasédé hã ĩrẽme za'ra wa'aba zém na , da te 're aiwaihu'u za'ra wa'aba mono da , te za oto 're anomro wẽ wa'aba mo .
text_b: Let your change of heart be seen in your works :

text_a: Duré Abra'ãhã nhihudu wẽ te , asina 're rosa'rata za'ra wa'aba mono õ di za , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te 're ĩ'aihâ za'ra wa'aba mono õ na hã . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma , waihu'u pese di , ã ẽtẽ norĩ ma , te te nharĩ da , tãma si'a'uwẽ za'ra da , Abra'ãhã nhihudu oto 're hâimana za'ra mono da , ẽne hã .
text_b: And say not to yourselves , We have Abraham for our father ; because I say to you that God is able from these stones to make children for Abraham .

text_a: Hâtâra hã te za oto ni'wa hã sarõtõ , wedepa nhihârizéb da hã . Uburé wede hã 're ĩ'rãi pese za'ra mono õ hã te za te te ãma 're anhihâri . Tawamhã unhama u te za te te 're anhamra . — Ãne te dama ãma simiré'é Zuwã hã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzém na hã .
text_b: And even now the axe is put to the root of the trees ; every tree then which does not give good fruit is cut down , and put into the fire .

text_a: Te duré dama tinha : — Wa hã wa tô â uptabi na si te 're aihâiba ubu za'ra wa'wa , â dawabzuri hã te aima 're ab'manharĩ aba mono wamhã , aiwasété wi 're aipizari za'ra wa'aba mono zém na , da te oto ãma 're aiwaihu'u za'ra wa'aba mono da . Tane nherẽ , ĩ̱za'u si te za ĩ̱ma ĩpire uptabi hã wei wi . Taha si te za oto 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na te te duré 're aihâiba ubu za'ra wa'wa , unhama ne na zama , â na te aima 're ĩ'ab'manharĩ aba mono ne hã . Ta hã ĩ̱ma pire uptabi wa , ĩpara'uza hã te tãma mrami waihu'u õ di za , tãma ĩ̱wapure wa .
text_b: Truly , I give baptism with water to those of you whose hearts are changed ; but he who comes after me is greater than I , whose shoes I am not good enough to take up : he will give you baptism with the Holy Spirit and with fire :

text_a: Wei morĩ wapsi , te za da'ãma aipo'o . Buru nho , da te 're upõrĩ za'ra mono parimhã , te za da te 're sa'wari za'ra , ĩsa'warizéb 're . Tawamhã ĩtomhâ na te za da te ãma 're ro'o za'ra . Ĩro hã sa'ẽtẽ nherẽ , da te wĩrĩ waihu'u õ di za . Tane ĩ̱ma ĩpire hã wei morĩ wapsi , te za da'ãma aipo'o , tridu upõrĩ za'wari ne , ĩtomhâ za'wari ne . — Ãne ma tô dama rowasu'u , Zuwã Batita hã .
text_b: In whose hand is the instrument with which he will make clean his grain ; he will put the good grain in his store , but the waste will be burned up in the fire which will never be put out .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã ma tô mo , Darireza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi hawi , Zodã pa u , tame Zuwã Batita , â dawabzuri hã te te tãma 'manharĩ da .
text_b: Then Jesus came from Galilee to John at the Jordan , to be given baptism by him .

text_a: Tane nherẽ , ma tô pibu Zuwã Batita hã , ĩsimirosa'rada hã te te tiwi ãma saprĩ da , â dawabzuri te te tãma 'manharĩ tõ da . Ãne te tãma tinha : — E marĩ da , te ĩ̱ma aipire uptabi nherẽ , ĩ̱ma asi'ru , â dawabzuri hã te aima 'manharĩ da . A hã te aré ĩ̱ma ĩ'manha .
text_b: But John would have kept him back , saying , It is I who have need of baptism from you , and do you come to me ?

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã asa te tãma tinha : — Tane tô . Ĩbâ ma te asina ĩ̱ma ĩwaihu . Tane nherẽ , te za ĩ̱ma ĩ'manha , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te wama ĩpisutuzéb zarina , wa te wasina uwaimrami da . — Ãne ma tô tãma waihu'u Zezusi hã , Zuwã Batitaha ma . Taha wa , Zuwã hã ma tô ãma saze . Ma tô â dawabzuri hã tãma 'manha , Zezusihi ma .
text_b: But Jesus made answer , saying to him , Let it be so now : because so it is right for us to make righteousness complete . Then he gave him baptism .

text_a: Tawamhã â dawabzuri te te tãma 'manharĩ pari , ma tô â hawi watobro , Zezusi hã . Watobro wi , ma tô hâiwa hã tãma si'ridawa . Tawamhã Zezusi hã ma tô tisã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani hã we ĩtẽme ĩmorĩ hã hâiwa hawi , utu'u ne hã . Tawamhã ma tô ãma za .
text_b: And Jesus , having been given baptism , straight away went up from the water ; and , the heavens opening , he saw the Spirit of God coming down on him as a dove ;

text_a: Tawamhã hâiwa hawi te we ãma tinha : — Ã hã ĩ̱'ra . Ĩ̱ma sawi uptabi di . Tãma ĩ̱to za'ẽtẽ uptabi di . — Ãne te we tinha , Ĩmama hã .
text_b: And a voice came out of heaven , saying , This is my dearly loved Son , with whom I am well pleased .

text_a: Tawamhã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani hã ma tô Zezusi hã saprõ a'ubuni u , tame Wa'uburé hã te te nasi pibu da .
text_b: Then Jesus was sent by the Spirit into the waste land to be tested by the Evil One .

text_a: Tawamhã a'ubuni wi sãmra ré , ma tô bâdâ hã 40 na ãma ai'utõ , sai ãna sãmra ré hã . 40 na ma duré ãma timara . Tãma mrab uptabi di .
text_b: And after going without food for forty days and forty nights , he was in need of it .

text_a: Tawamhã Wa'uburé ma tô ĩtẽme wi . Ĩtẽme wisi wamhã , te tãma tinha : — Sena a hã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono 'ra wamhã , ma'ãpé ẽtẽ ma nharĩ , ĩ'u'ẽtẽ wapu na aima si'manharĩ za'ra da .
text_b: And the Evil One came and said to him , If you are the Son of God , give the word for these stones to become bread .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi asa te tãma tinha , ãne : — 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono mreme na rob'ui'éré hã ãne : “ Dasa na si 're danhiptete za'ra mono õ di za . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te dama 're ĩ'awaihu'u mono zém na zama , te za 're danhiptete za'ra . ” — Ãne te tãma tinha , Zezusi hã .
text_b: But he made answer and said , It is in the Writings , Bread is not man's only need , but every word which comes out of the mouth of God .

text_a: Taha pari , Wa'uburé hã ma tô Zezusi hã saprõ Zeruzarẽ u , 'ri nho'u ĩwẽ uptabi u , te te duré pibu da . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ãma 're ĩdawata za'ra mono zéb u , te saprõ , 'ri nhisi u , sab da hâimo , 'ri 'rãihâ uptabi nhisi .
text_b: Then the Evil One took him to the holy town ; and he put him on the highest point of the Temple and said to him ,

text_a: Tawamhã ãne te tãma tinha , Wa'uburé hã : — Sena a hã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono 'ra wamhã , ma'ãpé atobro , ti'ai u . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , te za , u , hâiwa hawi we atẽme satõrĩ za'ra , tãma ĩromhuri'wa norĩ hã , te te ai'madâ'â za'ra da . Tinhib'rata na te za , u , siwi asapa , ẽne hã te te ai'u'a õ'umnhasite , aipara wi . Ãne 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u'wa nhimi'ui'éré hã , duréihã , ĩbaihâ na hã .
text_b: If you are the Son of God , let yourself go down ; for it is in the Writings , He will give his angels care over you ; and , In their hands they will keep you up , so that your foot may not be crushed against a stone .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã te asa tãma tinha : — Mare di . “ Asib'apito za'ra wa'wa hã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã marĩ hã te te aima 're pisutu za'ra wa'aba mono õ nherẽ , 're pibu za'ra wa'aba mono õ di za , ta hã te te 're aipawaptob za'ra wa'aba mono zô . ” Ãne duré ĩmreme na rob'ui'éré , ĩbaihâ na hã . — Ãne te Zezusi hã tãma tinha .
text_b: Jesus said to him , Again it is in the Writings , You may not put the Lord your God to the test .

text_a: Taha pari , te duré Wa'uburé Zezusi hã saprõ , ẽtẽ 'rãihâ u , danhib'apito norĩ nhipti'ai mono bâ te te rob'madâ'â mono da , uburé ro ĩwẽ uptabi hã te te ab'madâ'â mono da .
text_b: Again , the Evil One took him up to a very high mountain , and let him see all the kingdoms of the world and the glory of them ;

text_a: Tawamhã Wa'uburé te ãne tãma ropisutu , Zezusihi ma : — Asib'apito na ĩ̱'ãma aiwata da , te za aihi'rãtitõ ĩ̱ma aime . Tawamhã ã hã uburé wa za aima tisõ , ate da .
text_b: And he said to him , All these things will I give you , if you will go down on your face and give me worship .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi te asa tãma tinha : — Satanasi , mo oto aimorĩ , ĩ̱nhiti . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u'wa , ma tô ãne rob'ui'éré : “ Uburé Danhib'apito uptabi ãma si , te za 're aiwata za'ra wa'aba mo , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ãma si . Taha ma si te za 're ĩromhuri za'ra wa'aba mo , Asib'apito za'ra wa'aba ma si . ” Ãne ĩmreme na rob'ui'éré , ĩbaihâ na hã . — Ãne te rob'ui'éré 'rada hã tãma 'rãzarõtõ Zezusi hã , Satanasihi ma .
text_b: Then said Jesus to him , Away , Satan : for it is in the Writings , Give worship to the Lord your God and be his servant only .

text_a: Tawamhã Wa'uburé ma tô ĩhawi mo . Morĩ wamhã , hâiwa ãma romhuri'wa norĩ hã ma tô we ĩtẽme aihutu , te te siwi pawaptob da , Zezusi hã .
text_b: Then the Evil One went away from him , and angels came and took care of him .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã Zuwã da te ĩsẽrẽzé wasu'u te te wapari wa , ma tô mo , Darireza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi u .
text_b: Now when it came to his ears that John had been put in prison , he went away to Galilee ;

text_a: Tawamhã Nazaré ãma 're ĩsãmra mono da hã , te te sima rowẽ õ di oto . Taha wa , Capana'u na 'ri nho'õmo nhisi u si ma tô mo , tame oto 're sãmra mono da , Darireza ãma ĩsõ'u zapoto 'rata , Zeburõhõ nhihudu norĩ nhipti'a niwĩ , duré Naptarihi nhihudu norĩ nhipti'a niwĩ .
text_b: And going away from Nazareth , he came and made his living-place in Capernaum , which is by the sea , in the country of Zebulun and Naphtali :

text_a: Ãne ma tô Zezusi hã 'manha , duréihã Iza'iza hã te te ãma ĩrob'ui'érézéb zarina te te sina uwaimrami da , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa hã . Ãne ĩsimi'ui'éré hã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono mreme na :
text_b: So that the word of the prophet Isaiah might come true ,

text_a: “ Zeburõhõ nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai ãma 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono , duré Naptarihi nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai ãma zama , ĩsõ'u tẽme bâdâdi wa , 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono hã , Zodã na pa nhisi zara niwĩ 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono hã , Darireza ãma zudezu'õ norĩ hã dawazari 're ĩhâimana za'ra mono norĩ hã te uburé robra na 're dahâimana za'ra . Tane nherẽ , te za oto rowa'a za'ẽne hã da te 're 'madâ'â za'ra , tame . Te za oto dama rowa'a , dapẽ'ẽ 're robra na 're ĩdanomro mono norĩ ma . ” Ãne Iza'izaha nhimi'ui'éré wasu'u hã , Zeburõhõ nhihudu norĩ 're ĩhâimana za'ra mono norĩ ãma hã , Naptarihi nhihudu norĩ ãma zama .
text_b: The land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali , by the way of the sea , the other side of Jordan , Galilee of the Gentiles ,

text_a: Tawamhã ta hawim haré ma oto romhuri na sãna'rata Zezusi hã , Timama zadawa wasu'u na . Ãne ma tinhimirowasu'u na dama ãma sãna'rata : — Aiwasété wi te za oto 're aipizari za'ra wa'aba mo . Ãhãna bâdâ hã ma tô oto ĩwa waptãrã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã da'ãma 're ĩsib'a'uwẽ mono zéb da hã .
text_b: From that time Jesus went about preaching and saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin , for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã Darireza na ĩsõ'u nhisi zaihâi baba 're morĩ wamhã , ma tô aibâ norĩ hã sãmri zahuré , tepe mrami na romhuri'wa norĩ hã , tisisãnawãi me : Sima na ĩsisi hã , Pedru na ĩsisi amo hã . Duré ĩno hã Ãdéré na ĩsisi hã . Ĩsõ'ui wa , te nasi abazipara hã wabzuri zahuré , tepe zô .
text_b: And when he was walking by the sea of Galilee , he saw two brothers , Simon , whose other name was Peter , and Andrew , his brother , who were putting a net into the sea ; for they were fishermen .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã te sô tihârâ zahuré : — We ane wa'aba , ĩ̱siré 're ane wa'aba da oto , romhuri na aima ĩ̱sisanho wa'aba da , ĩ̱ma 're ĩda'awaibui wa'aba mono zéb da hã . — Ãne te sô tihârâ zahuré , Zezusi hã .
text_b: And he said to them , Come after me , and I will make you fishers of men .

text_a: Taha wa , ma te awa'awi tãma marẽme zahuré abazipara ma , Zezusihi siré 're neb zahuré da oto .
text_b: And straight away they let go the nets and went after him .

text_a: Tawamhã syry na sina pahâ wi , ma duré 'madâ'â zahuré , Ti'adu norĩ hã Zuwãhã me . Ta norĩ hã Zebedehe 'ra zahuré . Timama siré te abazipara sisinarĩ hã te te ãma a'rã'õtõ zahuré apâ , uba're wa . Tawamhã te duré sô tihârâ zahuré .
text_b: And going on from there he saw two other brothers , James , the son of Zebedee , and John , his brother , in the boat with their father , stitching up their nets ; and he said , Come .

text_a: Sô hârâ zahuré wamhã , awa'awi ma tô tinhimiromhuri ma marẽme zahuré . Timama zama ma rẽme zahuré , Zezusihi siré 're neb zahuré da .
text_b: And they went straight from the boat and their father and came after him .

text_a: Tawamhã daza'rui mono bâ te 're mo Zezusi hã , Darireza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma hã . Zudezu norĩ te , rowahutuzé mono bâ , ma tô te te dama 're rowahutu . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , da'ãma 're ĩsib'a'uwẽ mono zé wasu'u na te duré te te dama 're rowasu'u , ĩwasu'uwẽ na . Dahâzé mono bâ ma duré da'apese . Hâzé u'âsi wa , sib'uware na 're ĩnomro mono norĩ zama ma apese , Zezusi hã .
text_b: And Jesus went about in all Galilee , teaching in their Synagogues and preaching the good news of the kingdom , and making well those who were ill with any disease among the people .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi te te ĩda'apesezém na , ma tô rowasu'u hã te te ropé , Siriza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma . Taha wa , ma tô ĩtẽme da te 're 'wasari dahâzé mono bâ , uburé aimawi hã dahâzé da te 're ĩsépata za'ra mono norĩ hã , wa'uburé te te 're ĩwamnarĩ za'ra mono norĩ hã , duré da'rã siwamnarĩ wa , 're ĩdahâiba popo'o za'ra mono norĩ hã , duré ĩmorĩ'õ norĩ hã . Uburé ma tô da'apese , Zezusi hã .
text_b: And news of him went out through all Syria ; and they took to him all who were ill with different diseases and pains , those having evil spirits and those who were off their heads , and those who had no power of moving . And he made them well .

text_a: Taha wa , ma tô da'ahâ uptabi na ĩsarina dasi'ré , Darireza hawi , duré Decapori hawimhã , duré Zeruzarẽ hawimhã , duré Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi hawimhã . Duré Zodã pa zara niwĩ 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ zama ma tô ĩtẽme dasito .
text_b: And there went after him great numbers from Galilee and Decapolis and Jerusalem and Judaea and from the other side of Jordan .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã da'ahâ uptabi na te te da'madâ'â wamhã , ẽtẽ 'rãihâ na ma tô sai'u , tame a'â sãmra da . Tawamhã ĩsiré 're ĩnomro mono norĩ hã ma tô 'râwi ĩtẽme ubumro .
text_b: And seeing great masses of people he went up into the mountain ; and when he was seated his disciples came to him .

text_a: Tawamhã tame ma tô Zezusi hã tinhimirowahutu na tãma sãna'rata za'ra , ãne :
text_b: And with these words he gave them teaching , saying ,

text_a: — Ni'wam norĩ hã umnhasi sina 'râwi 're ĩsipawapto waihu'u za'ra mono õ na 're siwaihu'u za'ra mono wamhã , duré 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono si za ta norĩ hã ĩ'upana te te 're ĩpawapto wẽ za'ra mono na te te sina 're waihu'u za'ra mono wamhã , ta norĩ si te za rowẽ na 're hâimana za'ra , ãma 're sib'a'uwẽ za'ra mono wa .
text_b: Happy are the poor in spirit : for the kingdom of heaven is theirs .

text_a: — Duré , ni'wam norĩ hã ti'ab ré dawasété u'âsi 're danomro mono wa , da'ãma 're ĩpẽ'ẽzé za'ra mono norĩ hã ta norĩ ma si tãma 're rowẽ za'ẽtẽ za'ra mono di za . Ta norĩ ma si te za 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã te te tãma 're pisutu za'ra , toi u'âsi 're ĩhâimana za'ra mono zéb da hã .
text_b: Happy are those who are sad : for they will be comforted .

text_a: — Duré , ni'wam norĩ hã tiwaihu'u pese na 'râwi 're ĩsi'madâ'â ze za'ra mono õ norĩ hã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono si te te sima 're ĩ'madâ'â za'ra mono norĩ hã , ta norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ za'ẽtẽ za'ra mono di za . Ta norĩ ma si te za 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã ĩwẽ hã te te 're tãma anhomri , te te tãma 're ĩropisutu za'ra mono zéb zarina .
text_b: Happy are the gentle : for the earth will be their heritage .

text_a: — Duré , ni'wam norĩ hã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te sima 're ĩwẽ za'ra mono zéb uwaibaba , uburé marĩ ĩwẽ hã te te tãma 're ĩ'manharĩ za'ra mono da si , te te sima 're wẽ za'ra mono wamhã , ta norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ za'ẽtẽ za'ra mono di za . Ta norĩ ma si , te za 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã te te tãma ãma 're a'uwaimrami , rowẽ te te tãma 're ĩ'apisutu mono zém na hã .
text_b: Happy are those whose heart's desire is for righteousness : for they will have their desire .

text_a: — Duré , ni'wam norĩ hã da'ãma 're ĩpẽ'ẽzé za'ra mono zéb zarina , da'ãma 're ĩsina mono norĩ hã , ta norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ za'ẽtẽ za'ra mono di za . Ta norĩ ãma si te za 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã ãma tipẽ'ẽzé za'ra , za da'ãma ĩsipo'ozéb ãma hã .
text_b: Happy are those who have mercy : for they will be given mercy .

text_a: — Duré , ni'wam norĩ hã marĩ wasété zô 're sipizari za'ra mono ãna 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma si , tãma 're ĩsihâiba nhomri u'âsi za'ra mono norĩ hã ta norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ za'ẽtẽ za'ra mono di za . Ta norĩ si te za titõmo na 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã te te 're 'madâ'â za'ra , 'râwi .
text_b: Happy are the clean in heart : for they will see God .

text_a: — Duré , rowẽ na dasiré 're dahâimana za'ra mono da , ni'wam norĩ hã tinhimiroti wẽ na te te 're dapawaptob u'âsi za'ra mono wamhã , ta norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ za'ẽtẽ za'ra mono di za . Ta norĩ si te za ti'ra na te te 're sisi za'ra , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã .
text_b: Happy are the peacemakers : for they will be named sons of God .

text_a: — Duré , ni'wam norĩ hã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te sima 're ĩwẽ za'ra mono zéb zarina , uburé marĩ ĩwẽ hã te te 're 'manharĩ za'ra mono da si , te te sima 're wẽ za'ra mono wa , da te tãma 're ĩrob'manharĩ wasété za'ra mono norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ uptabi za'ra mono di za . E marĩ wa . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã ta norĩ ãma 're sib'a'uwẽ za'ra mono wa . — Ãne ma tô Zezusi hã tãma rowasu'u za'ra , tisiré 're ĩnomro mono norĩ ma .
text_b: Happy are those who are attacked on account of righteousness : for the kingdom of heaven will be theirs .

text_a: Tawamhã ãne te duré tãma rowahutu za'ra : — Ĩ̱zazei'wa oto 're anomro aba mono wa , da te ai'ãma 're wasété za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , duré da te aima 're rob'manharĩ wasété za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , duré dazadawa nhipese na taré da te dama 're aiwasu'u wasété za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , ĩ̱wi 're aipizari za'ra wa'aba mono õ wamhã , aima 're rowẽ uptabi za'ra wa'aba mono di za .
text_b: Happy are you when men give you a bad name , and are cruel to you , and say all evil things against you falsely , because of me .

text_a: Taha wa , ma'ãpé atoi u'âsi , ãma 're anomro aba mono za . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã te za marĩ ĩwẽ hã sa'ẽtẽ na te te aima 're sõmri za'ra wa'wa , hâiwa ãma asô 're ĩsimi'wara aba mono hã . Duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa norĩ ma , ma tô da te tãma 're rob'manharĩ u'âsi za'ra , da te aima 're ĩrob'manharĩ wasété za'ra wa'aba mono ne . — Ãne na ma tô Zezusi hã tãma waihu'u sirõmo za'ra romhâ ré , te te waihu'u zara da .
text_b: Be glad and full of joy ; for great is your reward in heaven : for so were the prophets attacked who were before you .

text_b: Tawamhã aibâ hã Marizaha ãma ĩmro da hã 're morĩ wẽ di , Zuzé na ĩsisi hã . Ta hã marĩ ĩwẽ si te te 're 'manharĩ u'âsi . Taha wa , ma tô sima rosa'rata , ãma ĩmro da ropisudu hã pi'uriwi za te te siwi ĩpari na hã , duré danho'a ĩwasété na te te ãma hiri wa , da te dasiwi waihu'u za'ra tõ da .

text_a: Ĩ'ra hã 'watébrémi na te za tãma podo . Tawamhã Zezusi na te za ĩsisi . Danho'reptui'wa te wasu'u , ĩsisi hã . Taha si te za tinhib'a'uwẽ hã te te 're anho'reptu , ĩwasété hawi , duré 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te 're ĩdahâ za'ra mono zém hawi .
text_b: Ãne da hã ma tô pisutu , Zezusihi ma , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã duréihã tizadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wai ma , Iza'izaha ma , te te ĩwaihu'uzém na te te ãma uwaimrami da . Ãne ma tô tãma waihu'u , duréihã : “ Pi'õi ubuni hã te za tiwasã . Duré ĩ'ra hã te za tãma waptãrã , aibâ na . Taha nhisi hã za , Emanuwé na ĩsisi hã . ” ( 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , wasiré 're ĩmorĩ u'â , te wasu'u , ĩsisi hã . ) Ãne 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te ãma ĩrowaihu'uzé hã , duréihã .

text_a: Ãne da hã ma tô pisutu , Zezusihi ma , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã duréihã tizadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wai ma , Iza'izaha ma , te te ĩwaihu'uzém na te te ãma uwaimrami da . Ãne ma tô tãma waihu'u , duréihã : “ Pi'õi ubuni hã te za tiwasã . Duré ĩ'ra hã te za tãma waptãrã , aibâ na . Taha nhisi hã za , Emanuwé na ĩsisi hã . ” ( 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , wasiré 're ĩmorĩ u'â , te wasu'u , ĩsisi hã . ) Ãne 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te ãma ĩrowaihu'uzé hã , duréihã .
text_b: Tawamhã Zuzé hã utu wamhã , hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa te te tãma ĩwaihu'uzéb zarina , ma tô ãma timro oto , Marizaha ãma , awa'awi .

text_a: Tawamhã Zuzé hã utu wamhã , hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa te te tãma ĩwaihu'uzéb zarina , ma tô ãma timro oto , Marizaha ãma , awa'awi .
text_b: Tane nherẽ , Zuzé hã te te sima ãma rosa'rata õ di a'â Marizaha ãma , ĩ'ra tãma waptã'ã õ ré . Taré te ĩré 'madâ . Tawamhã ĩ'ra tãma waptã'ã wamhã , Zuzé hã ma tô sisi , Zezusi na .

Waptã'ã parip si , ma tô wasi na romnhoré'wa norĩ hã aihutu Zeruzarẽ u , bâtâ pusizém hawi , rowaihu'u pese 'wa norĩ hã .

text_a: Tawamhã ma ãma sada'âbâ za'ra : — Berẽ na 'ri nho'õmo nhisi ãma te za waptãrã , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma . Duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa hã ma tô ãne na ãma rob'ui'éré siro , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono mreme na :
text_b: “ A norĩ wa'wa hã Berẽ ãma 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono norĩ hã Zudaha nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai ãma 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono norĩ hã dama aiwapu na 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono newa , te za oto dama asisi za'ẽtẽ na dama 're aihâimana u'âsi za'ra wa'aba mo . text_b: Te te sadanharĩ za'ra pari , ma tô tãma rob'ru za'ra , Berẽ u si'aba'ré da . Ãne te duré tãma rob'ru za'ra : — Mo oto ai'aba'réi wa'aba , 'watébrémi zô asinharĩ pese za'ra wa'aba da . Tane duré , a norĩ wa'wa hã ĩ̱zadawa wasu'u na dama 're romhuri wẽ za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , oto romhuri hã 're sahâri za'ra wa'aba mono wamhã , marĩ dai õ di oto , 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono zé hã za , ĩ̱ma hã .

text_a: Nin ye Yesu Krisita buruju sɛbɛn ye . Yesu bɔra Dawuda bɔnsɔn na , Dawuda bɔra Ibrahima bɔnsɔn na .
text_b: The book of the generations of Jesus Christ , the son of David , the son of Abraham .

text_a: Ibrahima ye Isaka bange . Isaka ye Yakuba bange . Yakuba ye Juda ni a balimakɛw bange .
text_b: The son of Abraham was Isaac ; and the son of Isaac was Jacob ; and the sons of Jacob were Judah and his brothers ;

text_a: Juda ye Farɛs ni Zara bange . Tamar tun ye olu ba ye . Farɛs ye Esrɔm bange . Esrɔm ye Aram bange .
text_b: And the sons of Judah were Perez and Zerah by Tamar ; and the son of Perez was Hezron ; and the son of Hezron was Ram ;

text_a: Aram ye Aminadab bange . Aminadab ye Nasɔn bange . Nasɔn ye Salmɔn bange .
text_b: And the son of Ram was Amminadab ; and the son of Amminadab was Nahshon ; and the son of Nahshon was Salmon ;

text_a: Salmɔn ye Boaz bange . Rahab tun ye o ba ye . Boaz ye Obɛd bange . Ruti tun ye o ba ye . Obɛd ye Isayi bange .
text_b: And the son of Salmon by Rahab was Boaz ; and the son of Boaz by Ruth was Obed ; and the son of Obed was Jesse ;

text_a: Isayi ye masakɛ Dawuda bange . Masakɛ Dawuda ye Solomani bange . Ale ba tun ye Uri muso ye fɔlɔ .
text_b: And the son of Jesse was David the king ; and the son of David was Solomon by her who had been the wife of Uriah ;

text_a: Solomani ye Roboam bange . Roboam ye Abiya bange . Abiya ye Asaf bange .
text_b: And the son of Solomon was Rehoboam ; and the son of Rehoboam was Abijah ; and the son of Abijah was Asa ;

text_a: Asaf ye Josafat bange . Josafat ye Joram bange . Joram ye Oziyasi bange .
text_b: And the son of Asa was Jehoshaphat ; and the son of Jehoshaphat was Joram ; and the son of Joram was Uzziah ;

text_a: Oziyasi ye Joatam bange . Joatam ye Akaz bange . Akaz ye Ezekiyasi bange .
text_b: And the son of Uzziah was Jotham ; and the son of Jotham was Ahaz ; and the son of Ahaz was Hezekiah ;

text_a: Ezekiyasi ye Manase bange . Manase ye Amɔn bange . Amɔn ye Josiyasi bange .
text_b: And the son of Hezekiah was Manasseh ; and the son of Manasseh was Amon ; and the son of Amon was Josiah ;

text_a: Josiyasi ye Jekoniyasi ni a balimakɛw bange . O tuma la Israɛl mɔgɔw cɛra ka taa Babilonɛ jamana la .
text_b: And the sons of Josiah were Jechoniah and his brothers , at the time of the taking away to Babylon .

text_a: O mɔgɔ cɛli kɛlen kɔ ka taa Babilonɛ , Jekoniyasi ye Salatiɛl bange . Salatiɛl ye Zorobabɛl bange .
text_b: And after the taking away to Babylon , Jechoniah had a son Shealtiel ; and Shealtiel had Zerubbabel ;

text_a: Zorobabɛl ye Abiudi bange . Abiudi ye Eliyakim bange . Eliyakim ye Azɔr bange .
text_b: And Zerubbabel had Abiud ; and Abiud had Eliakim ; and Eliakim had Azor ;

text_a: Azɔr ye Sadɔk bange . Sadɔk ye Akim bange . Akim ye Eliudi bange .
text_b: And Azor had Zadok ; and Zadok had Achim ; and Achim had Eliud ;

text_a: Eliudi ye Eleazar bange . Eleazar ye Matan bange . Matan ye Yakuba bange .
text_b: And Eliud had Eleazar ; and Eleazar had Matthan ; and Matthan had Jacob ;

text_a: Yakuba ye Yusufu bange . Yusufu kɛra Mariyama cɛ ye . Yesu min bɛ wele Krisita , Mariyama ye o bange .
text_b: And the son of Jacob was Joseph the husband of Mary , who gave birth to Jesus , whose name is Christ .

text_a: Bɔnsɔn yɛlɛma ko tan ni naani kɛra Ibrahima ni Dawuda cɛ . O kɔ , bɔnsɔn yɛlɛma ko tan ni naani kɛra Dawuda ni Israɛl mɔgɔw cɛli waati cɛ ka taa Babilonɛ . Bɔnsɔn yɛlɛma ko tan ni naani kɛra o tuma ni Krisita bange tuma cɛ .
text_b: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; and from David to the taking away to Babylon , fourteen generations ; and from the taking away to Babylon to the coming of Christ , fourteen generations .

text_a: Yesu Krisita bange cogo filɛ . A ba Mariyama maminɛlen tun bɛ Yusufu fɛ . Sani u ka jɛ , Mariyama y'a sɔrɔ ko a ye kɔnɔ ta Ni Senu ka sebaaya la .
text_b: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was in this way : when his mother Mary was going to be married to Joseph , before they came together the discovery was made that she was with child by the Holy Spirit .

text_a: A cɛ Yusufu tun ye mɔgɔ tilennen ye , a tun t'a fɛ ka Mariyama tɔgɔ tiɲɛ . A y'a latigɛ a yɛrɛ kɔnɔ ko a na o furu ko dabila dogo la .
text_b: And Joseph , her husband , being an upright man , and not desiring to make her a public example , had a mind to put her away privately .

text_a: Ka Yusufu to o miirili la , Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ dɔ y'i jira a la sugo la k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Dawuda bɔnsɔn Yusufu , i kana siran ka Mariyama furu , k'a masɔrɔ a ye kɔnɔ ta Ni Senu ka sebaaya la .
text_b: But when he was giving thought to these things , an angel of the Lord came to him in a dream , saying , Joseph , son of David , have no fear of taking Mary as your wife ; because that which is in her body is of the Holy Spirit .

text_a: A na denkɛ bange , i na o tɔgɔ da Yesu , katuguni ale na a ka mɔgɔw kisi u ka jurumuw ma . »
text_b: And she will give birth to a son ; and you will give him the name Jesus ; for he will give his people salvation from their sins .

text_a: O kow bɛɛ kɛra ten walisa Matigi tun ye min fɔ kira dɔ da la , o ka dafa , ko :
text_b: Now all this took place so that the word of the Lord by the prophet might come true ,

text_a: « A filɛ , npogotigi cɛ dɔnbali na kɔnɔ ta ka denkɛ bange , o tɔgɔ na da ko Emanuɛl , » o kɔrɔ ko Ala bɛ an cɛma .
text_b: See , the virgin will be with child , and will give birth to a son , and they will give him the name Immanuel , that is , God with us .

text_a: Yusufu wulila ka bɔ sunɔgɔ la , a y'a kɛ ka kɛɲɛ ni Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ ka kuma fɔlen ye . A ye Mariyama furu siri ,
text_b: And Joseph did as the angel of the Lord had said to him , and took her as his wife ;

text_a: nka u ma jɛ sani Mariyama ka jigin a denkɛ fɔlɔ la . Yusufu ye den tɔgɔ da Yesu .
text_b: And he had no connection with her till she had given birth to a son ; and he gave him the name Jesus .

text_a: Yesu bangera Jude jamana la Bɛtilɛhɛm , masakɛ Hɛrɔde tile la . A bangelen kɔ , dɔnbaa dɔw nana ka bɔ kɔrɔn fɛ ka se Jerusalɛm .
text_b: Now when the birth of Jesus took place in Beth-lehem of Judaea , in the days of Herod the king , there came wise men from the east to Jerusalem ,

text_a: U ye ɲininkali kɛ ko : « Yahutuw ka masakɛ min bangera sisan , o bɛ min ? An ye a ka dolo ye k'an to kɔrɔn fɛ , an nana a bato . »
text_b: Saying , Where is the King of the Jews whose birth has now taken place ? We have seen his star in the east and have come to give him worship .

text_a: Masakɛ Hɛrɔde y'o mɛn minkɛ , a ni Jerusalɛmkaw bɛɛ kɔnɔnafilila o kuma kosɔn .
text_b: And when it came to the ears of Herod the king , he was troubled , and all Jerusalem with him .

text_a: Hɛrɔde ye sarakalasebaaw kuntigiw ni a ka mɔgɔw ka sariya karamɔgɔw bɛɛ lajɛ ka u ɲininka ko : « Krisita ka kan ka bange min ? »
text_b: And he got together all the chief priests and scribes of the people , questioning them as to where the birth-place of the Christ would be .

text_a: U y'a jaabi ko : « Jude jamana Bɛtilɛhɛm katuguni a sɛbɛnnen bɛ kira dɔ fɛ ko :
text_b: And they said to him , In Beth-lehem of Judaea ; for so it is said in the writings of the prophet ,

text_a: ` E Bɛtilɛhɛm min bɛ Jude jamana la , i tɛ Jude faamaduguw bɛɛ la dɔgɔmannin ye dɛ , k'a masɔrɔ kuntigi dɔ na bɔ i la , o na ne ka siya Israɛl mara . ' »
text_b: You Beth-lehem , in the land of Judah , are not the least among the chiefs of Judah : out of you will come a ruler , who will be the keeper of my people Israel .

text_a: O kɔ , Hɛrɔde ye o dɔnbaaw wele dogo la ka u ɲininka kosɛbɛ o dolo ye waati ko la .
text_b: Then Herod sent for the wise men privately , and put questions to them about what time the star had been seen .

text_a: O kɛlen , a ye u ci ka taa Bɛtilɛhɛm . A ko : « A' ye taa o denyɛnin ɲini kosɛbɛ . Aw mana a ye , a' ye na o fɔ ne ye , walisa ne fana ka taa a bato . »
text_b: And he sent them to Beth-lehem and said , Go and make certain where the young child is ; and when you have seen him , let me have news of it , so that I may come and give him worship .

text_a: Dɔnbaaw ye masakɛ ka kuma mɛn minkɛ , u taara . U tun ye dolo min ye k'u to kɔrɔn fɛ , o filɛ , o taara u ɲɛ fo ka se denyɛnin yɔrɔ la , a y'i jɔ o yɔrɔ kun na .
text_b: And after hearing the king , they went on their way ; and the star which they saw in the east went before them , till it came to rest over the place where the young child was .

text_a: Dɔnbaaw ye o dolo ye tuma min na , u ɲagalila kosɛbɛ .
text_b: And when they saw the star they were full of joy .

text_a: U donnen so kɔnɔ , u ye denyɛnin ni a ba Mariyama ye . U y'u bi duguma ka denyɛnin bato . U ye u ka minɛnw dayɛlɛ ka denyɛnin sɔn ni sanu ni suma diyalan mana ani fɛn suma duman dɔ ye , min tɔgɔ ko mirɛ .
text_b: And they came into the house , and saw the young child with Mary , his mother ; and falling down on their faces they gave him worship ; and from their store they gave him offerings of gold , perfume , and spices .

text_a: O kɔ , dɔnbaaw lasɔminen Ala fɛ sugo la ko u kana kɔsegin Hɛrɔde yɔrɔ , u taara u ka jamana la sira wɛrɛ fɛ .
text_b: And it was made clear to them by God in a dream that they were not to go back to Herod ; so they went into their country by another way .

text_a: Dɔnbaaw taalen kɔ , Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ dɔ y'i jira Yusufu la sugo la k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Wuli ka boli ka taa ni den ni a ba ye Misira , ka to yen fo ne ka kuma i fɛ tuma min na , katuguni Hɛrɔde na den ɲini ko a b'a faga . »
text_b: And when they had gone , an angel of the Lord came to Joseph in a dream , saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into Egypt , and do not go from there till I give you word ; for Herod will be searching for the young child to put him to death .

text_a: Yusufu wulila o su yɛrɛ la ka boli ka taa ni den ni a ba ye Misira .
text_b: So he took the young child and his mother by night , and went into Egypt ;

text_a: U tora yen fo ka taa Hɛrɔde sa . O kow kɛra walisa min fɔra Matigi fɛ a ka kira dɔ da la , o ka dafa , ko : « Ne ye ne denkɛ wele ka bɔ Misira . »
text_b: And was there till the death of Herod ; so that the word of the Lord through the prophet might come true , Out of Egypt have I sent for my son .

text_a: Hɛrɔde y'a ye ko dɔnbaaw y'a janfa minkɛ , a diminna kosɛbɛ . A ye mɔgɔw ci ka taa Bɛtilɛhɛm ni a dafɛ duguw denmisɛn cɛmanw bɛɛ faga , minnu si ma tɛmɛn san fila kan , ka kɛɲɛ ni dɔnbaaw ka waati fɔlen ye .
text_b: Then Herod , when he saw that he had been tricked by the wise men , was very angry ; and he sent out , and put to death all the male children in Beth-lehem and in all the parts round about it , from two years old and under , acting on the knowledge which he had got with care from the wise men .

text_a: Kira Jeremi ye min fɔ , o dafara ten . A tun ko :
text_b: Then the word of Jeremiah the prophet came true ,

text_a: « Mɔgɔw ye kasikan mɛn ka bɔ Rama , kulo ni kasikanba . Rasɛl bɛ a ka denmisɛnw su kasi . A tɛ sɔn a dusu ka saalo , k'a sɔrɔ u sara ka ban . »
text_b: In Ramah there was a sound of weeping and great sorrow , Rachel weeping for her children , and she would not be comforted for their loss .

text_a: Hɛrɔde salen kɔ , Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ dɔ y'i jira Yusufu la sugo la k'a to Misira .
text_b: But when Herod was dead , an angel of the Lord came in a dream to Joseph in Egypt ,

text_a: O mɛlɛkɛ ko : « Wuli ka kɔsegin ni den ni a ba ye Israɛl jamana la , sabu minnu tun b'a fɛ ka den faga , olu sara . »
text_b: Saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into the land of Israel : because they who were attempting to take the young child's life are dead .

text_a: Yusufu wulila ka kɔsegin ni den ni a ba ye Israɛl jamana la .
text_b: And he got up , and took the young child and his mother , and came into the land of Israel .

text_a: A y'a mɛn minkɛ ko Arkɛlaus sigira a fa Hɛrɔde nɔ na ka kɛ Jude jamana masakɛ ye , Yusufu siranna , a ma sɔn ka taa yen . A lasɔminen Ala fɛ sugo la , a taara Galile jamana la .
text_b: But when it came to his ears that Archelaus was ruling over Judaea in the place of his father Herod , he was in fear of going there ; and God having given him news of the danger in a dream , he went out of the way into the country parts of Galilee .

text_a: A sigira dugu dɔ la yen min tɔgɔ ko Nazarɛti , walisa kiraw tun ye min fɔ ko Yesu na wele Nazarɛtika , o ka dafa .
text_b: And he came and was living in a town named Nazareth : so that the word of the prophets might come true , He will be named a Nazarene .

text_a: O donw na , Yuhana Batiselikɛla nana Jude kungokolon kɔnɔ ka waajuli daminɛ .
text_b: And in those days John the Baptist came preaching in the waste land of Judaea ,

text_a: A tun bɛ welewele da ko : « A' ye nimisa aw ka jurumuw la , katuguni sankolo masaya surunyara . »
text_b: Saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin ; for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Kira Esayi tun kumana mɔgɔ min ko la , Yuhana don . Esayi ko : « Pɛrɛnkan bɛ bɔ kungokolon kɔnɔ ko : ` A' ye Matigi ka sira labɛn , ka a ka sira misɛnw latilen . ' »
text_b: For this is he of whom Isaiah the prophet said , The voice of one crying in the waste land , Make ready the way of the Lord , make his roads straight .

text_a: Yuhana ka fini tun dilara ni ɲaamɛ si ye , a ka cɛsirilan tun ye wolo ye . A ka dumuni tun ye ntɔn ni wo kɔnɔ di ye .
text_b: Now John was clothed in camel's hair , with a leather band about him ; and his food was locusts and honey .

text_a: Mɔgɔw tun bɛ taa Yuhana sɛgɛrɛ ka bɔ Jerusalɛm ni Jurdɛn ba da la ani Jude jamana bɛɛ la .
text_b: Then Jerusalem and all Judaea went out to him , and all the people from near Jordan ;

text_a: U tun bɛ u jɔ u ka jurumuw la . Yuhana tun bɛ u batise Jurdɛn baji la .
text_b: And they were given baptism by him in the river Jordan , saying openly that they had done wrong .

text_a: Yuhana y'a ye tuma min na ko Farisiɛn caman ni Saduseɛn caman nana a fɛ ka batise , a y'a fɔ u ye ko : « Fɔnfɔnnindenw , jɔni ye aw lasɔmi ko aw ka boli Ala ka diminya nata ɲɛ ?
text_b: But when he saw a number of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to his baptism , he said to them , Offspring of snakes , at whose word are you going in flight from the wrath to come ?

text_a: Kɛwale minnu b'a jira ko aw nimisara aw ka jurumuw la , a' ye olu kɛ .
text_b: Let your change of heart be seen in your works :

text_a: Aw kana a fɔ aw yɛrɛw kɔnɔ ko Ibrahima ye aw fa ye . Tiɲɛ la ne b'a fɔ aw ye ko Ala bɛ se ka nin kabakurunw yɛlɛma ka u kɛ Ibrahima bɔnsɔnw ye .
text_b: And say not to yourselves , We have Abraham for our father ; because I say to you that God is able from these stones to make children for Abraham .

text_a: Hali sisan , jele talen bɛ jiriw dili tigɛli kama ka ban . Jiri o jiri tɛ den ɲuman kɛ o bɛ tigɛ ka fili tasuma la .
text_b: And even now the axe is put to the root of the trees ; every tree then which does not give good fruit is cut down , and put into the fire .

text_a: Ne kɔni bɛ aw batise ji la k'a jira ko aw nimisara aw ka jurumuw la , nka dɔ bɛ na ne kɔ , o fanga ka bon ni ne ta ye , hali ne man kan ni a ka sabara bɔli yɛrɛ ye a sen na , o na aw batise Ni Senu ni tasuma la .
text_b: Truly , I give baptism with water to those of you whose hearts are changed ; but he who comes after me is greater than I , whose shoes I am not good enough to take up : he will give you baptism with the Holy Spirit and with fire :

text_a: A ka ɲɔfyɛ minɛn bɛ a bolo . A na a ka ɲɔ gosilen fyɛ ka bɔ ɲaga la . A na a ka ɲɔkisɛ kɛ jiginɛ kɔnɔ ka a ɛɛɲɛ jeni tasuma sabali la . »
text_b: In whose hand is the instrument with which he will make clean his grain ; he will put the good grain in his store , but the waste will be burned up in the fire which will never be put out .

text_a: O tuma la Yesu bɔra Galile jamana la ka taa Yuhana sɛgɛrɛ Jurdɛn ba da la ko Yuhana ka a batise .
text_b: Then Jesus came from Galilee to John at the Jordan , to be given baptism by him .

text_a: Ale tun b'a fɛ ka ban , a y'a fɔ Yesu ye ko : « Ne ka kan ka batise e fɛ , i bɛ na ne ma wa ? »
text_b: But John would have kept him back , saying , It is I who have need of baptism from you , and do you come to me ?

text_a: Yesu y'a jaabi ko : « A to a ka kɛ sisan . A ka ɲi an ka Ala sago dafa ten . » Ayiwa Yuhana sɔnna .
text_b: But Jesus made answer , saying to him , Let it be so now : because so it is right for us to make righteousness complete . Then he gave him baptism .

text_a: Yesu batiselen kɔ , a bɔra ji la . O yɔrɔnin kelen , sankolo dayɛlɛla . A ye Ala Ni jigintɔ ye i ko jɛnɛntuban , ka na sigi a kan .
text_b: And Jesus , having been given baptism , straight away went up from the water ; and , the heavens opening , he saw the Spirit of God coming down on him as a dove ;

text_a: Kumakan dɔ bɔra sankolo la ko : « Nin ye ne Denkɛ kanulen ye , a ko ka di ne ye haali . »
text_b: And a voice came out of heaven , saying , This is my dearly loved Son , with whom I am well pleased .

text_a: O kɔ , Ni Senu ye Yesu ɲɛminɛ ka taa kungokolon kɔnɔ walisa Sitanɛ k'a kɔrɔbɔ .
text_b: Then Jesus was sent by the Spirit into the waste land to be tested by the Evil One .

text_a: Yesu ye tile binaani ni su binaani kɛ sun na , a ma dumuni kɛ , o kɔ , kɔngɔ y'a minɛ .
text_b: And after going without food for forty days and forty nights , he was in need of it .

text_a: Kɔrɔbɔlikɛla gɛrɛla a la k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Ni i ye Ala Denkɛ ye , a fɔ ko nin kabakurunw ka yɛlɛma ka kɛ nbuurukunw ye . »
text_b: And the Evil One came and said to him , If you are the Son of God , give the word for these stones to become bread .

text_a: Yesu y'a jaabi ko : « A sɛbɛnnen bɛ ko : ` Dumunifɛn dama tɛ mɔgɔ balo , nka kuma minnu bɛɛ bɛ bɔ Ala da la , a bɛ balo olu de la . ' »
text_b: But he made answer and said , It is in the Writings , Bread is not man's only need , but every word which comes out of the mouth of God .

text_a: O kɔ , Sitanɛ taara ni Yesu ye dugu senuma kɔnɔ k'a bila Alabatosoba kuncɛ ma ,
text_b: Then the Evil One took him to the holy town ; and he put him on the highest point of the Temple and said to him ,

text_a: k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Ni i ye Ala Denkɛ ye , i cun duguma , katuguni a sɛbɛnnen bɛ ko : ` Ala na i ko fɔ a ka mɛlɛkɛw ye , u na i minɛ u bolow la , walisa i sen kana na gosi kabakurun si la . ' »
text_b: If you are the Son of God , let yourself go down ; for it is in the Writings , He will give his angels care over you ; and , In their hands they will keep you up , so that your foot may not be crushed against a stone .

text_a: Yesu y'a fɔ a ye ko : « A sɛbɛnnen bɛ fana ko : ` I kana i Matigi Ala kɔrɔbɔ . ' »
text_b: Jesus said to him , Again it is in the Writings , You may not put the Lord your God to the test .

text_a: Sitanɛ taara ni Yesu ye ko kura ka taa kulu jamanjan kan ka diɲɛ masayaw ni u bonya bɛɛ jira a la ,
text_b: Again , the Evil One took him up to a very high mountain , and let him see all the kingdoms of the world and the glory of them ;

text_a: k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Ni i b'i ɲɔngiri ne kɔrɔ ka ne bato , ne na ninnu bɛɛ di i ma . »
text_b: And he said to him , All these things will I give you , if you will go down on your face and give me worship .

text_a: Nka Yesu ko : « Taa ka bɔ yan , Sitanɛ , katuguni a sɛbɛnnen bɛ ko : ` I ka i Matigi Ala bato ka baara kɛ o kelenpe ye . ' »
text_b: Then said Jesus to him , Away , Satan : for it is in the Writings , Give worship to the Lord your God and be his servant only .

text_a: O kɔ , Sitanɛ taara . Mɛlɛkɛ dɔw nana Yesu mago ɲɛ .
text_b: Then the Evil One went away from him , and angels came and took care of him .

text_a: Yesu y'a mɛn tuma min na ko Yuhana bilara kaso la , a bɔra yen ka taa Galile jamana la .
text_b: Now when it came to his ears that John had been put in prison , he went away to Galilee ;

text_a: A bɔra Nazarɛti dugu la , a taara i sigi Kapɛrnaum , o tun ye Galile ba da la dugu dɔ ye , Zabulɔn ni Nefitali jamana la .
text_b: And going away from Nazareth , he came and made his living-place in Capernaum , which is by the sea , in the country of Zebulun and Naphtali :

text_a: O kɛra walisa kira Esayi ye min fɔ , o ka dafa , a ko :
text_b: So that the word of the prophet Isaiah might come true ,

text_a: « Zabulɔn jamana ni Nefitali jamana , baji da la , Jurdɛn ba kɔfɛ , siya wɛrɛw ka Galile .
text_b: The land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali , by the way of the sea , the other side of Jordan , Galilee of the Gentiles ,

text_a: Minnu sigilen tun bɛ dibi la , olu ye kɛnɛyeelenba ye . Minnu sigilen tun bɛ dibi la saya yɔrɔ la , kɛnɛyeelen bɔra olu ye . »
text_b: The people who were in the dark saw a great light , and to those in the land of the shade of death did the dawn come up .

text_a: Kabini o tuma la Yesu ye waajuli daminɛ . A tun b'a fɔ ko : « A' ye nimisa aw ka jurumuw la katuguni sankolo masaya surunyara . »
text_b: From that time Jesus went about preaching and saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin , for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Yesu taamatɔ Galile ba kɛrɛ fɛ , a ye balimakɛ fila ye minnu tun ye mɔnnikɛlaw ye , Simɔn min bɛ wele Piɛrɛ ani a balimakɛ Andre . U tun bɛ jɔ fili la baji la .
text_b: And when he was walking by the sea of Galilee , he saw two brothers , Simon , whose other name was Peter , and Andrew , his brother , who were putting a net into the sea ; for they were fishermen .

text_a: Yesu y'a fɔ u ye ko : « A' ye tugu ne la , ne na aw kɛ mɔgɔ ɲininaw ye . »
text_b: And he said to them , Come after me , and I will make you fishers of men .

text_a: U sinna ka u ka jɔw to yen ka tugu Yesu la .
text_b: And straight away they let go the nets and went after him .

text_a: A taara ɲɛfɛ tun ka balimakɛ fila wɛrɛ ye . Olu tun ye Zebede denkɛw Yakuba ni Yuhana ye . U ni u fa Zebede tun bɛ kurun kɔnɔ ka u ka jɔw kala . Yesu ye u wele .
text_b: And going on from there he saw two other brothers , James , the son of Zebedee , and John , his brother , in the boat with their father , stitching up their nets ; and he said , Come .

text_a: U sinna ka kurun ni u fa to yen ka tugu Yesu la .
text_b: And they went straight from the boat and their father and came after him .

text_a: Yesu tun bɛ yaala Galile jamana yɔrɔ bɛɛ la ka mɔgɔw kalan u ka Alabatosow kɔnɔ . A tun bɛ sankolo masaya Kibaru Duman fɔ . A tun bɛ bana sifa bɛɛ kɛnɛya ani mɔgɔw ka barikantanya bɛɛ .
text_b: And Jesus went about in all Galilee , teaching in their Synagogues and preaching the good news of the kingdom , and making well those who were ill with any disease among the people .

text_a: Yesu tɔgɔ tun bɛ fɔ Siri jamana yɔrɔ bɛɛ la , o de la , mɔgɔw nana Yesu sɛgɛrɛ ni u ka banabaatɔw ye . Mɔgɔ minnu tɔɔrɔla bana sifa caman ni dimin caman fɛ , jinɛtɔw , kirikirimashyɛntɔw ani mɔgɔ fan fila salenw , u nana ni olu bɛɛ ye . Yesu ye u bɛɛ kɛnɛya .
text_b: And news of him went out through all Syria ; and they took to him all who were ill with different diseases and pains , those having evil spirits and those who were off their heads , and those who had no power of moving . And he made them well .

text_a: Jamaba tugura a nɔfɛ ka bɔ Galile jamana ni Dekapole ni Jerusalɛm ni Jude jamana ani Jurdɛn ba kɔfɛ .
text_b: And there went after him great numbers from Galilee and Decapolis and Jerusalem and Judaea and from the other side of Jordan .

text_a: Om mantad no di Abraham om gisom do napaganak i Daud , om hopod om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di Daud om gisom di tinanggayan do pisangod o bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di tinanggayan do pisangod i bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom do korikot di kinosusuon di Kristus om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan .
text_b: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; and from David to the taking away to Babylon , fourteen generations ; and from the taking away to Babylon to the coming of Christ , fourteen generations .

text_a: Om mantad no di Abraham om gisom do napaganak i Daud , om hopod om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di Daud om gisom di tinanggayan do pisangod o bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di tinanggayan do pisangod i bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom do korikot di kinosusuon di Kristus om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan .
text_b: Ãne hã 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã , Abra'ãhã hawimhã , Dawihi u hã . Duré 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , da te ĩsimroi mono zém hawimhã , Cristu ĩpotozéb u hã .

text_a: Poingkaa no susui di kinosusuon di Yesus Kristus . I Maria nopo i tina' dau , om nokopitunang no di Yusup . Nga' tontok dit a' po iyolo' nokopikawin , om monontian no i Maria . Nga' a' i' di Yusup oilaan do monontian i Maria do mantad id sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .
text_b: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was in this way : when his mother Mary was going to be married to Joseph , before they came together the discovery was made that she was with child by the Holy Spirit .

text_a: Poingkaa no susui di kinosusuon di Yesus Kristus . I Maria nopo i tina' dau , om nokopitunang no di Yusup . Nga' tontok dit a' po iyolo' nokopikawin , om monontian no i Maria . Nga' a' i' di Yusup oilaan do monontian i Maria do mantad id sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .
text_b: Tawamhã ãne Zezu Cristuhu potozé hã : Mariza hã Zezusi , ãma ĩna da hã ma tô sima ropisutu zahuré Zuzéhé me , sina mro zahuré da . Tane nherẽ , sina mro zahuré õ ré , ma tô 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na tiwasã Mariza hã , te te sa'rese õ nherẽ .

text_a: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was in this way : when his mother Mary was going to be married to Joseph , before they came together the discovery was made that she was with child by the Holy Spirit .
text_b: Tawamhã ãne Zezu Cristuhu potozé hã : Mariza hã Zezusi , ãma ĩna da hã ma tô sima ropisutu zahuré Zuzéhé me , sina mro zahuré da . Tane nherẽ , sina mro zahuré õ ré , ma tô 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na tiwasã Mariza hã , te te sa'rese õ nherẽ .

text_a: I Yusup nopo , i tunang di Maria diri nga' tulun dit otorodok do tumanud dot oturan do tugama' . Om pututon daa'ddi dau i pitunangan diyolo' di Maria . Nga' lisok-lisokon i' daa dau do momutut om a' i' ointingayam dot id toguang do tulun dot ogumu' i Maria .
text_b: And Joseph , her husband , being an upright man , and not desiring to make her a public example , had a mind to put her away privately .

text_a: I Yusup nopo , i tunang di Maria diri nga' tulun dit otorodok do tumanud dot oturan do tugama' . Om pututon daa'ddi dau i pitunangan diyolo' di Maria . Nga' lisok-lisokon i' daa dau do momutut om a' i' ointingayam dot id toguang do tulun dot ogumu' i Maria .

Taha wa , ma tô sima rosa'rata , ãma ĩmro da ropisudu hã pi'uriwi za te te siwi ĩpari na hã , duré danho'a ĩwasété na te te ãma hiri wa , da te dasiwi waihu'u za'ra tõ da .

text_a: Nga' maso' po di Yusup do momusorou'ddi , om pongipi no iyau . Om id suang nopo di nipi dau nga' nokokito iyau dot iso' o moloikat do Tuhan do minoro-boros dau do poingkaa , “ Oi Yusup , i sinakagon di Daud , kada' kooris do mangawin di Maria ; tu' iri nopo tanak di ponontianon dau om mantad i' do sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .
text_b: But when he was giving thought to these things , an angel of the Lord came to him in a dream , saying , Joseph , son of David , have no fear of taking Mary as your wife ; because that which is in her body is of the Holy Spirit .

text_b: And she will give birth to a son ; and you will give him the name Jesus ; for he will give his people salvation from their sins .

text_b: And he had no connection with her till she had given birth to a son ; and he gave him the name Jesus .

text_a: Om tungag noddi i Yusup , om tanggayai no dau i tanak diri om i Maria do guminuli' do hilo'd Israil .

text_a: And he got up , and took the young child and his mother , and came into the land of Israel .
text_b: Tawamhã Zuzé hã utu wamhã , ma tô apâ saprõni zahuré 'watébrémi hã , ĩna me , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai u .

text_a: Nga' korongou noddi i Yusup dot i Arkilaus i tanak di Horudis , o suminowoli di Horudis do suminiliu'd raja' do pomogunan do Yudia . Om moddosi iddi i Yusup do mongoi'd hilo' . Om kosunudai poddi iyau do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd watas do Galilia .
text_b: But when it came to his ears that Archelaus was ruling over Judaea in the place of his father Herod , he was in fear of going there ; and God having given him news of the danger in a dream , he went out of the way into the country parts of Galilee .

text_a: Nga' korongou noddi i Yusup dot i Arkilaus i tanak di Horudis , o suminowoli di Horudis do suminiliu'd raja' do pomogunan do Yudia . Om moddosi iddi i Yusup do mongoi'd hilo' . Om kosunudai poddi iyau do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd watas do Galilia .
text_b: Tane nherẽ , ma tô wapa Aterazu , apito Erodihi 'ra wasu'u hã , timama nhowa're're ĩsébré na hã Zudeza ãma te te 're ĩda'ab'madâ'â mono da hã . Taha wa , pahi di , tame ĩré 're ĩhâimana zahuré mono da hã . Tawamhã sõtõ 'rowi ma tô tãma waihu'u na sahu , hâiwa ãma 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma romhuri'wa hã , Zuzéhé ma , Zudeza u neb zahuré tõ da , Darireza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi u si neb da . Taha wa , ma tô tamomop si tineb zahuré , Zuzé norĩ hã .
