text_a: Om undorong no iyau'd hilo' , dot id iso' bandar di roitan do Nasarit . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros di piro-piro nabi dot i tanak o komoyon , “ Roitan nondo iyau do Tulun do Nasarit , ” ka .
text_b: And he came and was living in a town named Nazareth : so that the word of the prophets might come true , He will be named a Nazarene .

text_a: Om undorong no iyau'd hilo' , dot id iso' bandar di roitan do Nasarit . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros di piro-piro nabi dot i tanak o komoyon , “ Roitan nondo iyau do Tulun do Nasarit , ” ka .
text_b: Tame te oto 're simasisi zahuré , Nazaré na 'ri wa'õtõ nhisi ãma . Ãne ĩromhâimanazé hã , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa norĩ nhimi'ui'éré hã te te ãma uwaimrami da . Ãne duréihã ĩwasu'u na rob'ui'éré 'rada hã : “ Ta hã Nazaré ãma 're ĩsãmra mono na te za oto da te 're sisi za'ra . ” Ãne ma tô waihu'u sirõmo za'ra , za da te dasima 're ĩwasu'u za'ra mono zéb da na hã .

text_a: Om tontok noddi do ruminikot i Yohanis Gampamatis do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan do Yudia , om timpuun no iyau do monuduk .
text_b: And in those days John the Baptist came preaching in the waste land of Judaea ,

text_a: Om tontok noddi do ruminikot i Yohanis Gampamatis do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan do Yudia , om timpuun no iyau do monuduk .
text_b: Tawamhã wahub ahâ na ãma wahu pari , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã mo a'ubuni u , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u na te te dama ãma sãna'rata da .

text_a: And in those days John the Baptist came preaching in the waste land of Judaea ,
text_b: Tawamhã wahub ahâ na ãma wahu pari , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã mo a'ubuni u , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u na te te dama ãma sãna'rata da .

text_a: Boros ka dau , “ Korologo kou no do momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka .
text_b: Saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin ; for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Boros ka dau , “ Korologo kou no do momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka .

text_a: Saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin ; for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Om i Yohanis no i tulun di komoyon di Nabi Yosaya , do tontok di minomoros iyau do poingkaa , “ Haro o tulun do mimboros dot opuhod do hilo'd tana' do kowotuan do poingkaa , ‘ Rontisan no ralan do wayaan do Tuhan ; potingon no i ralan do wayaan dau , ’ ka , ” ka dau .
text_b: For this is he of whom Isaiah the prophet said , The voice of one crying in the waste land , Make ready the way of the Lord , make his roads straight .

text_a: Om i Yohanis no i tulun di komoyon di Nabi Yosaya , do tontok di minomoros iyau do poingkaa , “ Haro o tulun do mimboros dot opuhod do hilo'd tana' do kowotuan do poingkaa , ‘ Rontisan no ralan do wayaan do Tuhan ; potingon no i ralan do wayaan dau , ’ ka , ” ka dau .
text_b: Duréihã Iza'iza hã ma tô Zuwã Batitaha ãma rob'ui'éré siro , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa hã . Ãne ĩsimi'ui'éré hã : “ Ni'wa hã te za te te dama 're rob'mahârâ , a'ubuni wi : Bâdâdi hã asiwi ropese aba , Wanhib'apito zô . Ĩmana 'rãmi bâdâdi hã sô sa'ra wa'aba , awa'awi da . ” Ãne ma tô Iza'iza hã ãma rob'ui'éré , romhâ ré .

text_a: For this is he of whom Isaiah the prophet said , The voice of one crying in the waste land , Make ready the way of the Lord , make his roads straight .

Ĩmana 'rãmi bâdâdi hã sô sa'ra wa'aba , awa'awi da . ” Ãne ma tô Iza'iza hã ãma rob'ui'éré , romhâ ré .

text_a: Pakayan nopo di Yohanis om winonsoi mantad id hulu dot unta , om tagkos no dau om mantad id kulit do nintorusan . Om kanon nopo dau om godu om paha' do mantad hiri'd gouton .
text_b: Now John was clothed in camel's hair , with a leather band about him ; and his food was locusts and honey .

text_a: Pakayan nopo di Yohanis om winonsoi mantad id hulu dot unta , om tagkos no dau om mantad id kulit do nintorusan . Om kanon nopo dau om godu om paha' do mantad hiri'd gouton .
text_b: Zuwã hã awaru ba'õmore zéré 'manharĩ na te 're si'uza . Duré romhâ 'manharĩ hâiwaré na te 're si'usisi . 'Riti na si te 're sa . Duré rom na ropĩni na zama te 're sa .

text_a: Now John was clothed in camel's hair , with a leather band about him ; and his food was locusts and honey .
text_b: Zuwã hã awaru ba'õmore zéré 'manharĩ na te 're si'uza . Duré romhâ 'manharĩ hâiwaré na te 're si'usisi . 'Riti na si te 're sa . Duré rom na ropĩni na zama te 're sa .

text_a: Om ogumu' o tulun do mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , om mantad id pointongkop do pomogunan do Yudia om mantad id piro-piro watas di potoropis di Bawang do Yordan , do ruminikot dot id di Yohanis .
text_b: Then Jerusalem and all Judaea went out to him , and all the people from near Jordan ;

text_a: Om ogumu' o tulun do mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , om mantad id pointongkop do pomogunan do Yudia om mantad id piro-piro watas di potoropis di Bawang do Yordan , do ruminikot dot id di Yohanis .
text_b: Tawamhã Zeruzarẽ ãma 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ hã , duré Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma daza'rui mono bâ 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono hã , duré Zodã pa nhisi 'rata 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono norĩ zama , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito , daro mono bâ . Ĩsimirowasu'u hã da te 're wapari za'ra mono da , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito .

text_a: Then Jerusalem and all Judaea went out to him , and all the people from near Jordan ;
text_b: Tawamhã Zeruzarẽ ãma 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ hã , duré Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma daza'rui mono bâ 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono hã , duré Zodã pa nhisi 'rata 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono norĩ zama , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito , daro mono bâ . Ĩsimirowasu'u hã da te 're wapari za'ra mono da , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito .

text_a: Om okuno' no diyolo' i dusa diyolo' , om botisai noddi iyolo' di Yohanis do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan .
text_b: And they were given baptism by him in the river Jordan , saying openly that they had done wrong .

text_a: Om okuno' no diyolo' i dusa diyolo' , om botisai noddi iyolo' di Yohanis do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan .
text_b: Taha wa , dawasété na ma tô 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra 'râwi , sõ'awi , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma . Dawasété na 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra mono sidâpâsi , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã â dawabzuri hã te te dama 're ab'manharĩ , Zodã pa ãma .

text_a: And they were given baptism by him in the river Jordan , saying openly that they had done wrong .
text_b: Taha wa , dawasété na ma tô 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra 'râwi , sõ'awi , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma . Dawasété na 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra mono sidâpâsi , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã â dawabzuri hã te te dama 're ab'manharĩ , Zodã pa ãma .

text_a: Om ogumu' i' daa o tulun do Parisi om Saduki do ruminikot do mongoi pokibatis . Nga' soira' di nokito di Yohanis iyolo' do rumikot , om boros ka dau , “ Iyokoyu no tulun dit angaraat ! Isai o minomisunud dokoyu do milo kou do moggidu'd mantad id hukuman do Kinorohingan dit oruhai no dau do porikoton ?
text_b: But when he saw a number of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to his baptism , he said to them , Offspring of snakes , at whose word are you going in flight from the wrath to come ?

text_a: Om ogumu' i' daa o tulun do Parisi om Saduki do ruminikot do mongoi pokibatis . Nga' soira' di nokito di Yohanis iyolo' do rumikot , om boros ka dau , “ Iyokoyu no tulun dit angaraat ! Isai o minomisunud dokoyu do milo kou do moggidu'd mantad id hukuman do Kinorohingan dit oruhai no dau do porikoton ?
text_b: Tawamhã Zuwã hã ma tô 'madâ'â za'ra , parisezu norĩ hã ahâ uptabi na , duré sadusezu norĩ hã . Te ĩtẽme ai'aba'ré , â dawabzuri te te dame 'manharĩ za'ra da . Tawamhã Zuwã hã te te 'madâ'â za'ra wamhã , te tãma nharĩ za'ra , parisezu norĩ ma : — A norĩ wa'wa hã wahi ne te 're anomro aba mo . E 'wa simiroti zarina , te we ĩ̱tẽme ai'aba'réi wa'wa bété , â dawabzuri si ĩ'manharĩ za'ra wa'aba zém na , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzé wi , asisõ'reptu za'ra wa'aba da bâ , aiwasédé hã rẽme za'ra wa'aba õ nherẽ .

text_a: But when he saw a number of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to his baptism , he said to them , Offspring of snakes , at whose word are you going in flight from the wrath to come ?
text_b: Tawamhã Zuwã hã ma tô 'madâ'â za'ra , parisezu norĩ hã ahâ uptabi na , duré sadusezu norĩ hã . Te ĩtẽme ai'aba'ré , â dawabzuri te te dame 'manharĩ za'ra da . Tawamhã Zuwã hã te te 'madâ'â za'ra wamhã , te tãma nharĩ za'ra , parisezu norĩ ma : — A norĩ wa'wa hã wahi ne te 're anomro aba mo . E 'wa simiroti zarina , te we ĩ̱tẽme ai'aba'réi wa'wa bété , â dawabzuri si ĩ'manharĩ za'ra wa'aba zém na , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzé wi , asisõ'reptu za'ra wa'aba da bâ , aiwasédé hã rẽme za'ra wa'aba õ nherẽ .

text_a: Pointalango' po dokoyu do nokorologo kopio kou do momonsoi'd dusa .
text_b: Let your change of heart be seen in your works :

text_a: Pointalango' po dokoyu do nokorologo kopio kou do momonsoi'd dusa .
text_b: Sena na aiwasédé hã ĩrẽme za'ra wa'aba zém na , da te 're aiwaihu'u za'ra wa'aba mono da , te za oto 're anomro wẽ wa'aba mo .

text_a: Let your change of heart be seen in your works :
text_b: Sena na aiwasédé hã ĩrẽme za'ra wa'aba zém na , da te 're aiwaihu'u za'ra wa'aba mono da , te za oto 're anomro wẽ wa'aba mo .

text_a: Kada' nogi' dokoyu soroho' do koidu' kou do mantad id hukuman , do momoros kou piya dot i Abraham o taki dokoyu . Ilaai no dokoyu , dot iti piya watu nga' milo id Kinorohingan do silihon do sinakagon di Abraham !
text_b: And say not to yourselves , We have Abraham for our father ; because I say to you that God is able from these stones to make children for Abraham .

text_a: Kada' nogi' dokoyu soroho' do koidu' kou do mantad id hukuman , do momoros kou piya dot i Abraham o taki dokoyu . Ilaai no dokoyu , dot iti piya watu nga' milo id Kinorohingan do silihon do sinakagon di Abraham !
text_b: Duré Abra'ãhã nhihudu wẽ te , asina 're rosa'rata za'ra wa'aba mono õ di za , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te 're ĩ'aihâ za'ra wa'aba mono õ na hã . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma , waihu'u pese di , ã ẽtẽ norĩ ma , te te nharĩ da , tãma si'a'uwẽ za'ra da , Abra'ãhã nhihudu oto 're hâimana za'ra mono da , ẽne hã .

text_a: And say not to yourselves , We have Abraham for our father ; because I say to you that God is able from these stones to make children for Abraham .
text_b: Duré Abra'ãhã nhihudu wẽ te , asina 're rosa'rata za'ra wa'aba mono õ di za , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te 're ĩ'aihâ za'ra wa'aba mono õ na hã . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma , waihu'u pese di , ã ẽtẽ norĩ ma , te te nharĩ da , tãma si'a'uwẽ za'ra da , Abra'ãhã nhihudu oto 're hâimana za'ra mono da , ẽne hã .

text_a: Nokosodia' no kapak do panagad di kayu do porotopon do tana' o pananagad . Pointikid-tikid do kayu dit a' mongua' dot osonong om tagadon no om pataamon do hiri'd tapui .
text_b: And even now the axe is put to the root of the trees ; every tree then which does not give good fruit is cut down , and put into the fire .

text_a: Nokosodia' no kapak do panagad di kayu do porotopon do tana' o pananagad . Pointikid-tikid do kayu dit a' mongua' dot osonong om tagadon no om pataamon do hiri'd tapui .
text_b: Hâtâra hã te za oto ni'wa hã sarõtõ , wedepa nhihârizéb da hã . Uburé wede hã 're ĩ'rãi pese za'ra mono õ hã te za te te ãma 're anhihâri . Tawamhã unhama u te za te te 're anhamra . — Ãne te dama ãma simiré'é Zuwã hã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzém na hã .

text_a: And even now the axe is put to the root of the trees ; every tree then which does not give good fruit is cut down , and put into the fire .
text_b: Hâtâra hã te za oto ni'wa hã sarõtõ , wedepa nhihârizéb da hã . Uburé wede hã 're ĩ'rãi pese za'ra mono õ hã te za te te ãma 're anhihâri . Tawamhã unhama u te za te te 're anhamra . — Ãne te dama ãma simiré'é Zuwã hã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzém na hã .

text_a: Iyoho' nopo om waig noo pamatis ku dokoyu do popointalang do nokorologo kou do momonsoi'd dusa ; nga' iyau nopo i rumikot do kosusuhut doho' , om mamatis indo dokoyu do Rusod do Kinorohingan om tapui . Iyau nopo om agayo po ko' iyoho' . Om a' oku i' osorupai do mongigit piya di kasut dau .
text_b: Truly , I give baptism with water to those of you whose hearts are changed ; but he who comes after me is greater than I , whose shoes I am not good enough to take up : he will give you baptism with the Holy Spirit and with fire :

text_a: Iyoho' nopo om waig noo pamatis ku dokoyu do popointalang do nokorologo kou do momonsoi'd dusa ; nga' iyau nopo i rumikot do kosusuhut doho' , om mamatis indo dokoyu do Rusod do Kinorohingan om tapui . Iyau nopo om agayo po ko' iyoho' . Om a' oku i' osorupai do mongigit piya di kasut dau .
text_b: Te duré dama tinha : — Wa hã wa tô â uptabi na si te 're aihâiba ubu za'ra wa'wa , â dawabzuri hã te aima 're ab'manharĩ aba mono wamhã , aiwasété wi 're aipizari za'ra wa'aba mono zém na , da te oto ãma 're aiwaihu'u za'ra wa'aba mono da . Tane nherẽ , ĩ̱za'u si te za ĩ̱ma ĩpire uptabi hã wei wi . Taha si te za oto 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na te te duré 're aihâiba ubu za'ra wa'wa , unhama ne na zama , â na te aima 're ĩ'ab'manharĩ aba mono ne hã . Ta hã ĩ̱ma pire uptabi wa , ĩpara'uza hã te tãma mrami waihu'u õ di za , tãma ĩ̱wapure wa .

text_a: Truly , I give baptism with water to those of you whose hearts are changed ; but he who comes after me is greater than I , whose shoes I am not good enough to take up : he will give you baptism with the Holy Spirit and with fire :
text_b: Te duré dama tinha : — Wa hã wa tô â uptabi na si te 're aihâiba ubu za'ra wa'wa , â dawabzuri hã te aima 're ab'manharĩ aba mono wamhã , aiwasété wi 're aipizari za'ra wa'aba mono zém na , da te oto ãma 're aiwaihu'u za'ra wa'aba mono da . Tane nherẽ , ĩ̱za'u si te za ĩ̱ma ĩpire uptabi hã wei wi . Taha si te za oto 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na te te duré 're aihâiba ubu za'ra wa'wa , unhama ne na zama , â na te aima 're ĩ'ab'manharĩ aba mono ne hã . Ta hã ĩ̱ma pire uptabi wa , ĩpara'uza hã te tãma mrami waihu'u õ di za , tãma ĩ̱wapure wa .

text_a: Poingigit no dau o bakul do pangatap di gandum do gisom dot osompipian . Timungon nondo dau i gandum do posuangon do hiri'd sulap , nga' iri nopondo i tapol om tutudan dau do hiri'd tapui dit a' milo'd pisokon , ” ka .
text_b: In whose hand is the instrument with which he will make clean his grain ; he will put the good grain in his store , but the waste will be burned up in the fire which will never be put out .

text_a: Poingigit no dau o bakul do pangatap di gandum do gisom dot osompipian . Timungon nondo dau i gandum do posuangon do hiri'd sulap , nga' iri nopondo i tapol om tutudan dau do hiri'd tapui dit a' milo'd pisokon , ” ka .
text_b: Wei morĩ wapsi , te za da'ãma aipo'o . Buru nho , da te 're upõrĩ za'ra mono parimhã , te za da te 're sa'wari za'ra , ĩsa'warizéb 're . Tawamhã ĩtomhâ na te za da te ãma 're ro'o za'ra . Ĩro hã sa'ẽtẽ nherẽ , da te wĩrĩ waihu'u õ di za . Tane ĩ̱ma ĩpire hã wei morĩ wapsi , te za da'ãma aipo'o , tridu upõrĩ za'wari ne , ĩtomhâ za'wari ne . — Ãne ma tô dama rowasu'u , Zuwã Batita hã .

text_a: In whose hand is the instrument with which he will make clean his grain ; he will put the good grain in his store , but the waste will be burned up in the fire which will never be put out .

text_a: Om tontok di manau-panau i Yesus do hiri'd tisan di Tasik Galilia , om kokito no dau o duwo tulun do monginginsada' di miobpinai . Iyolo' nopo om i Simun ( i pinungaranan dot i Pitrus ) om i Andarias , i tadi' dau . Om tontok nopoddi nga' maso diyolo' do mirrambot do hiri'd tasik .
text_b: And when he was walking by the sea of Galilee , he saw two brothers , Simon , whose other name was Peter , and Andrew , his brother , who were putting a net into the sea ; for they were fishermen .

text_a: Om lombus po kawagu i Yesus do minamanau , om kokito no dau o duwo kawagu tulun do miobpinai . Iyolo' nopo nga' i Yakub om i Yohanis , i tangaanak di Sabidi . Om maso diyolo' om i tapa' diyolo' do monombir di rambot do hiri'd parau' . Om iyolo' nga' linohou i' di Yesus .
text_b: And going on from there he saw two other brothers , James , the son of Zebedee , and John , his brother , in the boat with their father , stitching up their nets ; and he said , Come .

text_a: Om lombus po kawagu i Yesus do minamanau , om kokito no dau o duwo kawagu tulun do miobpinai . Iyolo' nopo nga' i Yakub om i Yohanis , i tangaanak di Sabidi . Om maso diyolo' om i tapa' diyolo' do monombir di rambot do hiri'd parau' . Om iyolo' nga' linohou i' di Yesus .

text_a: Om tongkop no i Yesus di pomogunan do Galilia . Om minonuduk iyau do hiri'd walai'd sasambayangan om pinopopinsusui iyau di Habar dot Osonong do Pomorintaan do Kinorohingan . Om ogumu' o tulun do liningasan dau do mantad id mogisuwayan o toruol .
text_b: And Jesus went about in all Galilee , teaching in their Synagogues and preaching the good news of the kingdom , and making well those who were ill with any disease among the people .

text_a: Om tongkop no i Yesus di pomogunan do Galilia . Om minonuduk iyau do hiri'd walai'd sasambayangan om pinopopinsusui iyau di Habar dot Osonong do Pomorintaan do Kinorohingan . Om ogumu' o tulun do liningasan dau do mantad id mogisuwayan o toruol .

text_a: Om nokotongkop o habar di Yesus dot id do pomogunan do Siria , gisom dot ogumu' tomod diri o tulun do ruminikot dot id dau . Om pootodo' no diyolo' dot id dau o koinsanai'd tulun di mogisuayan o toruol om kosusaan . I tulun di norusadan do rusod dot araat , om i kakaran , om it a' koundaliu nga' liningasan ngai' nopo di Yesus .
text_b: And news of him went out through all Syria ; and they took to him all who were ill with different diseases and pains , those having evil spirits and those who were off their heads , and those who had no power of moving . And he made them well .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun di tumongob ; tu' insasamadan i' iyolo'd Kinorohingan !

text_b: Happy are the gentle : for the earth will be their heritage .

text_b: — Duré , ni'wam norĩ hã da'ãma 're ĩpẽ'ẽzé za'ra mono zéb zarina , da'ãma 're ĩsina mono norĩ hã , ta norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ za'ẽtẽ za'ra mono di za . Ta norĩ ãma si te za 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã ãma tipẽ'ẽzé za'ra , za da'ãma ĩsipo'ozéb ãma hã .

text_b: Happy are the clean in heart : for they will see God .

Ta norĩ si te za titõmo na 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã te te 're 'madâ'â za'ra , 'râwi .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun di popiulud ; tu' roitan indo iyolo'd tangaanak do Kinorohingan !
text_b: Happy are the peacemakers : for they will be named sons of God .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun di popiulud ; tu' roitan indo iyolo'd tangaanak do Kinorohingan !
text_b: — Duré , rowẽ na dasiré 're dahâimana za'ra mono da , ni'wam norĩ hã tinhimiroti wẽ na te te 're dapawaptob u'âsi za'ra mono wamhã , ta norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ za'ẽtẽ za'ra mono di za . Ta norĩ si te za ti'ra na te te 're sisi za'ra , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã .

text_a: Happy are the peacemakers : for they will be named sons of God .
text_b: — Duré , rowẽ na dasiré 're dahâimana za'ra mono da , ni'wam norĩ hã tinhimiroti wẽ na te te 're dapawaptob u'âsi za'ra mono wamhã , ta norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ za'ẽtẽ za'ra mono di za . Ta norĩ si te za ti'ra na te te 're sisi za'ra , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit inggoriton tu' momonsoi iyolo'd korohian do Kinorohingan ; kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !
text_b: Happy are those who are attacked on account of righteousness : for the kingdom of heaven will be theirs .

text_a: Olumaag no i tulun dit inggoriton tu' momonsoi iyolo'd korohian do Kinorohingan ; kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !

E marĩ wa . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã ta norĩ ãma 're sib'a'uwẽ za'ra mono wa . — Ãne ma tô Zezusi hã tãma rowasu'u za'ra , tisiré 're ĩnomro mono norĩ ma .

text_b: — Duré , ni'wam norĩ hã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te sima 're ĩwẽ za'ra mono zéb zarina , uburé marĩ ĩwẽ hã te te 're 'manharĩ za'ra mono da si , te te sima 're wẽ za'ra mono wa , da te tãma 're ĩrob'manharĩ wasété za'ra mono norĩ ma si , tãma 're rowẽ uptabi za'ra mono di za . E marĩ wa . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã ta norĩ ãma 're sib'a'uwẽ za'ra mono wa . — Ãne ma tô Zezusi hã tãma rowasu'u za'ra , tisiré 're ĩnomro mono norĩ ma .

text_a: Olumaag kou no dot indaraaton kou piya , om inggoriton , om pinsingudutan , dot i tumanud kou doho' o kopongiyo'ddian .
text_b: Happy are you when men give you a bad name , and are cruel to you , and say all evil things against you falsely , because of me .

text_a: Olumaag kou no dot indaraaton kou piya , om inggoriton , om pinsingudutan , dot i tumanud kou doho' o kopongiyo'ddian .
text_b: Tawamhã ãne te duré tãma rowahutu za'ra : — Ĩ̱zazei'wa oto 're anomro aba mono wa , da te ai'ãma 're wasété za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , duré da te aima 're rob'manharĩ wasété za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , duré dazadawa nhipese na taré da te dama 're aiwasu'u wasété za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , ĩ̱wi 're aipizari za'ra wa'aba mono õ wamhã , aima 're rowẽ uptabi za'ra wa'aba mono di za .

text_a: Happy are you when men give you a bad name , and are cruel to you , and say all evil things against you falsely , because of me .
text_b: Tawamhã ãne te duré tãma rowahutu za'ra : — Ĩ̱zazei'wa oto 're anomro aba mono wa , da te ai'ãma 're wasété za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , duré da te aima 're rob'manharĩ wasété za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , duré dazadawa nhipese na taré da te dama 're aiwasu'u wasété za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , ĩ̱wi 're aipizari za'ra wa'aba mono õ wamhã , aima 're rowẽ uptabi za'ra wa'aba mono di za .

text_a: Tu' iri piro-piro nabi dit id gulu ko' iyokoyu nga' noinggorit i' do miagal diri . Kotood kou no om kooropod kou no kopio , tu' agayo i' o tisomuli' do nokoopi'd Tuhan do hilo'd surga do patahakon dokoyu , ” ka dau .
text_b: Be glad and full of joy ; for great is your reward in heaven : for so were the prophets attacked who were before you .

text_a: Tu' iri piro-piro nabi dit id gulu ko' iyokoyu nga' noinggorit i' do miagal diri . Kotood kou no om kooropod kou no kopio , tu' agayo i' o tisomuli' do nokoopi'd Tuhan do hilo'd surga do patahakon dokoyu , ” ka dau .
text_b: Taha wa , ma'ãpé atoi u'âsi , ãma 're anomro aba mono za . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã te za marĩ ĩwẽ hã sa'ẽtẽ na te te aima 're sõmri za'ra wa'wa , hâiwa ãma asô 're ĩsimi'wara aba mono hã . Duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa norĩ ma , ma tô da te tãma 're rob'manharĩ u'âsi za'ra , da te aima 're ĩrob'manharĩ wasété za'ra wa'aba mono ne . — Ãne na ma tô Zezusi hã tãma waihu'u sirõmo za'ra romhâ ré , te te waihu'u zara da .

text_a: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Iyokoyu no miagal do silaon dot id toinsanan o tulun do hiti'd pomogunan . Nga' ondung manau i silaon , om a' no kopio milo do mosin kawagu . Om aiso' no guna'ddi , suwai ko' pataamon poo , om pingulakan pondo'd tulun .
text_b: You are the salt of the earth ; but if its taste goes from the salt , how will you make it salt again ? it is then good for nothing but to be put out and crushed under foot by men .

A norĩ wa'wa hã sa ne , te za dama 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mo . Sa na hã dasa hã ãma se ti , dasai warĩrĩzé wa . Taré te za da te 're sa'wari za'ra rob u , marĩ dai õ wa oto . Taha wa , te za oto taré ĩsisiwi 're danomro , dapara na . Tane duré , a norĩ wa'wa hã ĩ̱zadawa wasu'u na dama 're romhuri wẽ za'ra wa'aba mono nherẽ , oto romhuri hã 're sahâri za'ra wa'aba mono wamhã , marĩ dai õ di oto , 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono zé hã za , ĩ̱ma hã .

text_a: Iyokoyu no miagal do tanawau diti pomogunan . Iri nopo bandar dit id timpak do nulu-nulu om a' no milo'd lisokon .
text_b: You are the light of the world . A town put on a hill may be seen by all .

text_a: Iyokoyu no miagal do tanawau diti pomogunan . Iri nopo bandar dit id timpak do nulu-nulu om a' no milo'd lisokon .

'Re dasimani za'ra mono tõ da , da te dasima 're ĩrob'uiwẽ za'ra mono ne , te za 're ĩdanhimroi wẽ wa'aba mo , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono u . text_a: Aiso' i' o tulun di modtutud do lampung om tinggouban nogindod kakanan . Suwai ko' potimpakon i' dau i lampung diri dot id podtitimpakan kasai' do lampung , om otitihan ngai' indo o koinsanai'd tulun do hiri'd suang di walai .
text_b: And a burning light is not put under a vessel , but on its table ; so that its rays may be shining on all who are in the house .

text_a: Aiso' i' o tulun di modtutud do lampung om tinggouban nogindod kakanan . Suwai ko' potimpakon i' dau i lampung diri dot id podtitimpakan kasai' do lampung , om otitihan ngai' indo o koinsanai'd tulun do hiri'd suang di walai .
text_b: Duré , rob'uiwẽzé hã da te ro'o wamhã , e piza'a na te za upsibi ni . Mare di . Ĩsima'warazém na si te za sõ'awi da te 're sõré , 'ri paramhã te te dama 're rob'uiwẽ za'ra mono da , 'ri 're , 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ ma .

text_a: And a burning light is not put under a vessel , but on its table ; so that its rays may be shining on all who are in the house .
text_b: Duré , rob'uiwẽzé hã da te ro'o wamhã , e piza'a na te za upsibi ni . Mare di . Ĩsima'warazém na si te za sõ'awi da te 're sõré , 'ri paramhã te te dama 're rob'uiwẽ za'ra mono da , 'ri 're , 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ ma .

text_a: Om iyo nogiddi tu' potitihon no kopio o tanawau dokoyu dot id tulun do suwai , om okito indo diyolo' i wonsoyon dokoyu dit osonong , om royohon nondo diyolo' i Tapa' dokoyu di hilo'd surga , ” ka dau .
text_b: Even so let your light be shining before men , so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven .

text_a: Om iyo nogiddi tu' potitihon no kopio o tanawau dokoyu dot id tulun do suwai , om okito indo diyolo' i wonsoyon dokoyu dit osonong , om royohon nondo diyolo' i Tapa' dokoyu di hilo'd surga , ” ka dau .
text_b: Tane duré , a norĩ wa'wa hã te za sõ'awi dama 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mo , rob'uiwẽzé hã sõ'awi te te dama 're ĩrob'uiwẽ za'ra mono ne . Uburé marĩ hã te za dama 're ĩ'manharĩ wẽ u'âsi za'ra wa'aba mo , dama 're ĩ'manharĩ wẽ za'ra wa'aba mono zé hã da te 're ĩ'madâ'â za'ra mono zéb zarina , Aimama za'ra wa'aba ãma 're dawata za'ra mono da , hâiwa ãma 're ĩsãmra mono ãma .

text_a: Even so let your light be shining before men , so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven .
text_b: Tane duré , a norĩ wa'wa hã te za sõ'awi dama 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mo , rob'uiwẽzé hã sõ'awi te te dama 're ĩrob'uiwẽ za'ra mono ne . Uburé marĩ hã te za dama 're ĩ'manharĩ wẽ u'âsi za'ra wa'aba mo , dama 're ĩ'manharĩ wẽ za'ra wa'aba mono zé hã da te 're ĩ'madâ'â za'ra mono zéb zarina , Aimama za'ra wa'aba ãma 're dawata za'ra mono da , hâiwa ãma 're ĩsãmra mono ãma .

text_a: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Kada' kou pomusorou do kinorikatan ku nopo om mongoi pananus ngai' di Tourat di Musa om i ponudukan di nabi . Okon i' ko' mongoi pananus diri o kinorikatan ku , suwai ko' mongoi pamayaan di komoyon kopio'ddi .
text_b: Let there be no thought that I have come to put an end to the law or the prophets . I have not come for destruction , but to make complete .

text_a: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Kada' kou pomusorou do kinorikatan ku nopo om mongoi pananus ngai' di Tourat di Musa om i ponudukan di nabi . Okon i' ko' mongoi pananus diri o kinorikatan ku , suwai ko' mongoi pamayaan di komoyon kopio'ddi .
text_b: — Duré , rosa'rata na ĩ̱'ãma upa za'ra wa'aba õ di za , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimiroti 'rata na Mozési te te ãma ĩrob'ui'érézé hã , duré ĩsadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa norĩ nhimiroti zama , te dawi sawi da , we ĩ̱morĩ na hã ti'ai u . Ta norĩ nhimirowasu'u 'rada hã te dawi ĩsawi da hã , we ĩ̱morĩ õ di . Mare di . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimiroti 'rata na rob'ui'éré hã te ĩ̱sina ĩ'uwaimrami da si , wa wei mo .

text_a: Let there be no thought that I have come to put an end to the law or the prophets . I have not come for destruction , but to make complete .
text_b: — Duré , rosa'rata na ĩ̱'ãma upa za'ra wa'aba õ di za , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimiroti 'rata na Mozési te te ãma ĩrob'ui'érézé hã , duré ĩsadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa norĩ nhimiroti zama , te dawi sawi da , we ĩ̱morĩ na hã ti'ai u . Ta norĩ nhimirowasu'u 'rada hã te dawi ĩsawi da hã , we ĩ̱morĩ õ di . Mare di . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimiroti 'rata na rob'ui'éré hã te ĩ̱sina ĩ'uwaimrami da si , wa wei mo .

text_a: Ilaai no dokoyu ! Do solinaid nopod haro o tawan om pomogunan , om iso' pod hurup ko' titik do hurup dit okooro' dot id Tourat nga' aiso' i' o tonuson , dot a' po angabayaan ngai' iri !
text_b: Truly I say to you , Till heaven and earth come to an end , not the smallest letter or part of a letter will in any way be taken from the law , till all things are done .

text_a: Ilaai no dokoyu ! Do solinaid nopod haro o tawan om pomogunan , om iso' pod hurup ko' titik do hurup dit okooro' dot id Tourat nga' aiso' i' o tonuson , dot a' po angabayaan ngai' iri !
text_b: Tô sena , wa za ãne aima waihu'u sirõmo za'ra wa'wa . Hâiwa norĩ hã ti'ai me nimahã na si'utõrĩ zahuré da nherẽ , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimiroti 'rata na rob'ui'éré hã pire na te za tô dama 're hâimana u'âsi . Nima hã dawi 'masi'utõrĩ waihu'u õ di za , ĩ'ui'éré misi hã , duré ĩ'ui'éré 'rãzazazé hã , ĩwaptẽrẽ mono bâ . Za niha dama 're ĩromhâimana mono zéb da hã , ĩbaihâ na duréihã ĩsadawa wasu'u'wa norĩ te te ãma ĩrob'ui'éré sirõmo za'ra zéb zarina , rob'rãsutuzéb u za niha dama 're romhâimana uptabi za'ra mono õ ré , si'utõrĩ za'ra õ di za , ĩsimiroti na rob'ui'éré 'rata norĩ hã .

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om isai nopo tulun di tumolibamban dot ongoiso' piya di toturan diri , dot iri piya daa i toturan dit okooro' , om i tulun di monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi do miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit aiso' kopio o ngaran-ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga . Nga' isai nopo tulun di tumanud di Tourat om i monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi'd miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit agayo o ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga .
text_b: Whoever then goes against the smallest of these laws , teaching men to do the same , will be named least in the kingdom of heaven ; but he who keeps the laws , teaching others to keep them , will be named great in the kingdom of heaven .

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om isai nopo tulun di tumolibamban dot ongoiso' piya di toturan diri , dot iri piya daa i toturan dit okooro' , om i tulun di monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi do miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit aiso' kopio o ngaran-ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga . text_b: Duré , ni'wam norĩ hã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimiroti 'rata na rob'ui'éré hã nima hã roti hã taré dama 're 'maihâimana mono newa , te te 're 'madâ'â za'ra mono õ wamhã , duré ĩsine da te 're 'madâ'â tõ za'ra mono da , te te dama ãma 're roti za'ra mono wamhã , ta norĩ si te za dama wapu na 're hâimana za'ra , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , da'ãma 're ĩsib'a'uwẽ mono zéb ãma hã . Tane nherẽ , ni'wam norĩ si ĩsimiroti na rob'ui'éré 'rada hã te te 're 'madâ'â pese za'ra mono wamhã , duré ĩsine da te 're 'madâ'â pese za'ra mono da , te te dama ãma 're roti za'ra mono wamhã , ta norĩ si te za dama pire na 're hâimana za'ra , da'ãma 're ĩsib'a'uwẽ mono zéb ãma hã .

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om soro-soroho' no dokoyu : Milo kou id sumuang di Pomorintaan do surga , ondung poimaha' o kotorodoko' dokoyu ko' i guru do Tourat om i tulun do Parisi , do momonsoi di korohian do Kinorohingan ! ” ka dau .
text_b: For I say to you , If your righteousness is not greater than the righteousness of the scribes and Pharisees , you will never go into the kingdom of heaven .

text_a: Iyo nopoddi , om soro-soroho' no dokoyu : Milo kou id sumuang di Pomorintaan do surga , ondung poimaha' o kotorodoko' dokoyu ko' i guru do Tourat om i tulun do Parisi , do momonsoi di korohian do Kinorohingan ! ” ka dau .
text_b: Ãne wa za duré aima waihu'u za'ra wa'wa . Parisezu norĩ hâimanazém nhipai u , duré 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimiroti na rob'ui'éré na dama rowahutu'wa norĩ hâimanazém nhipai u , Wamama te te sima 're ĩ'aiwẽ za'ra wa'aba mono zéb zarina si , 're aihâimana wẽ za'ra wa'aba mono wamhã , tawapsi , te za dame 're asisisi aba mo , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , da'ãma 're ĩsib'a'uwẽ mono zéb u hã .

text_a: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Koilo kou i' di ponudukan di taki-aki toko' do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' kou pamatai ; tu' isai nopo i mamatai om bisaraon no , ’ ka .
text_b: You have knowledge that it was said in old times , You may not put to death ; and , Whoever puts to death will be in danger of being judged :

text_a: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Koilo kou i' di ponudukan di taki-aki toko' do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' kou pamatai ; tu' isai nopo i mamatai om bisaraon no , ’ ka .
text_b: — Ãne hã ma tô duré 're ĩwapari za'ra wa'aba mo , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te dama ĩrotizé hã : “ 'Re danhimroi wa'aba mono õ di za . Ni'wam norĩ hã te te 're danhimroi mono wamhã , te za dawasété na dawaihu'u'wa norĩ u da te 're simro , ta norĩ hã ĩwasété na te te siwi 're waihu'u za'ra mono wa , te te dama 're 'ru za'ra mono da , da te dasiwi 're simroi mono da . ” Ãne duréihã aihi'rata norĩ wa'aba ma , ma tô roti .

text_a: You have knowledge that it was said in old times , You may not put to death ; and , Whoever puts to death will be in danger of being judged :
text_b: — Ãne hã ma tô duré 're ĩwapari za'ra wa'aba mo , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te dama ĩrotizé hã : “ 'Re danhimroi wa'aba mono õ di za . Ni'wam norĩ hã te te 're danhimroi mono wamhã , te za dawasété na dawaihu'u'wa norĩ u da te 're simro , ta norĩ hã ĩwasété na te te siwi 're waihu'u za'ra mono wa , te te dama 're 'ru za'ra mono da , da te dasiwi 're simroi mono da . ” Ãne duréihã aihi'rata norĩ wa'aba ma , ma tô roti .

text_a: Nga' baino' nopo om poingkaa o doho'd poboroson dot id dokoyu : Isai nopo i tumogod do tulun do suwai , om bisaraon no ; om isai nopo i momolupu' do tulun do suwai , om mositi' nod bisaraon dot id toguang di momimisara' do tumanud di toturan do tugama' . Om isai nopo o momoros do , ‘ Basug ! ’ ka , do tulun do suwai o komoyon , om apatut no do pataamon do hilo'd tapui naraka .
text_b: But I say to you that everyone who is angry with his brother will be in danger of being judged ; and he who says to his brother , Raca , will be in danger from the Sanhedrin ; and whoever says , You foolish one , will be in danger of the hell of fire .

Ni'wam norĩ hã tisiré 're ĩhâimana za'ra mono norĩ da , 're siti'ru za'ra mono wamhã , ta norĩ hã te za 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã te te siwi 're awẽ'õ , ĩwasété na te te 're ĩ'awaihu'u mono zéb zarina . Duré ãté ni'wa hã te za tisiré ma tinha , ãne : “ A hã , marĩ da , 're aihâimana mono õ . ” Ãne ni'wam norĩ hã te te dama 're nharĩ za'ra mono wamhã , te za da te 're simro , zudezu norĩ ma roti'wa norĩ u , dawasété na dawaihu'u'wa norĩ tẽme , ta norĩ hã te te siwi 're wẽ'õ za'ra mono da , ĩwasété na te te siwi 're waihu'u za'ra mono wa . Duré ni'wa hã ãté ãne te za tisiré ma tinha : “ E niha asimiza'rese'õ a hã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono wasu'u na hã . ” Ãne ni'wam norĩ hã tisiré ma , te te 're nharĩ za'ra mono wamhã , ãté ta norĩ hã te za ropipa u 're sisisi , unhama ro'o u'âsi u .

text_b: Ãté a norĩ wa'wa hã te za 're anomro aba mo , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhorõwa u , marĩ hã tãma asõprubzéb da hã , wedeza ne nhisiwi 're sa'ra za'ra wa'aba mono da , tãma danhoprubzé nomrizé nhisiwi . Tawapsi ãté te za asina 're aipo're pu'u za'ra wa'aba mo , marĩ hã asiré ma , 're 'manharĩ wasété za'ra wa'aba mono wa , asisada 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono zém na hã . text_a: Ondung haro o tulun di mamadawa dokoyu om i mangangat dokoyu do mibisara' dot id kut , om lumomus kou no kopio do mongoi ponokibabas dau do daamot pod haro o maso , om a' po koongoi dot id kut . Tu' ondung amu' , nga' patahakon kou nondo di tulun diri dot id hakim , om patahakon kou nondo di hakim dot id pulis . Om posuangon kou nondo di pulis dot id giil .
text_b: Come to an agreement quickly with him who has a cause against you at law , while you are with him on the way , for fear that he may give you up to the judge and the judge may give you to the police and you may be put into prison .

text_b: Truly I say to you , You will not come out from there till you have made payment of the very last farthing .

text_a: Ã hã rob'ui'éré hã Zezu Cristuhu hi'rata norĩ za'ratazé . Ta hã Dawihi nhihudu , duré Abra'ãhã nhihudu .
text_b: The book of the generations of Jesus Christ , the son of David , the son of Abraham .

text_a: Ã hã rob'ui'éré hã Zezu Cristuhu hi'rata norĩ za'ratazé . Ta hã Dawihi nhihudu , duré Abra'ãhã nhihudu .
text_b: Iti ngai' no ngaran di komolohingan di Yesus Kristus , i sinakagon di Daud , om i sinakagon di Abraham . Mantad nopo di Abraham om di gisom do napaganak i Daud om iti ngai' no ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis :

text_a: The book of the generations of Jesus Christ , the son of David , the son of Abraham .
text_b: Iti ngai' no ngaran di komolohingan di Yesus Kristus , i sinakagon di Daud , om i sinakagon di Abraham . Mantad nopo di Abraham om di gisom do napaganak i Daud om iti ngai' no ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis :

text_a: Abra'ã hã Izatihi mama . Izati hã Zacoho mama . Zaco hã Zuda norĩ mama , tisisãnawã norĩ me .
text_b: The son of Abraham was Isaac ; and the son of Isaac was Jacob ; and the sons of Jacob were Judah and his brothers ;

text_a: Abra'ã hã Izatihi mama . Izati hã Zacoho mama . Zaco hã Zuda norĩ mama , tisisãnawã norĩ me .
text_b: I Abraham , i Isak , i Yakub , i Yohuda om i piro-piro tobpinai di Yohuda , i Piris om i Sira ( ngaran nopod tina' diyolo' om i Tamar ) , i Hisron , i Ram , i Aminadab , i Nahason , i Salmon , i Buas ( tina' nopo dau om i Rahab ) , i Obid ( tina' nopo dau om i Rut ) , i Isai , om i Raja' Daud .

text_a: The son of Abraham was Isaac ; and the son of Isaac was Jacob ; and the sons of Jacob were Judah and his brothers ;
text_b: I Abraham , i Isak , i Yakub , i Yohuda om i piro-piro tobpinai di Yohuda , i Piris om i Sira ( ngaran nopod tina' diyolo' om i Tamar ) , i Hisron , i Ram , i Aminadab , i Nahason , i Salmon , i Buas ( tina' nopo dau om i Rahab ) , i Obid ( tina' nopo dau om i Rut ) , i Isai , om i Raja' Daud .

text_a: Zésé hã Dawihi mama , dama ĩpire mama . Dawi hã Saromahã mama . Uri'asi ĩdâ'â mro wa , ma podo , Saroma hã .
text_b: And the son of Jesse was David the king ; and the son of David was Solomon by her who had been the wife of Uriah ;

text_a: Zésé hã Dawihi mama , dama ĩpire mama . Dawi hã Saromahã mama . Uri'asi ĩdâ'â mro wa , ma podo , Saroma hã .
text_b: Mantad no di Daud om gisom di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis : I Suliman ( tina' nopo dau om i sawo daa di Uria di gulu po ) , i Rihabiam , i Abia , i Asa , i Yosapat , i Yoram , i Usia , i Yotam , i Ahas , i Hiskia , i Manasi , i Amon , i Yosia , i Yikonia om i piro-piro tobpinai dau .

text_a: And the son of Jesse was David the king ; and the son of David was Solomon by her who had been the wife of Uriah ;
text_b: Mantad no di Daud om gisom di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis : I Suliman ( tina' nopo dau om i sawo daa di Uria di gulu po ) , i Rihabiam , i Abia , i Asa , i Yosapat , i Yoram , i Usia , i Yotam , i Ahas , i Hiskia , i Manasi , i Amon , i Yosia , i Yikonia om i piro-piro tobpinai dau .

text_a: Tawamhã Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , Babironiza u da te simroi mono za'u si , ma tô Zeconiza hã poto , Sarati'é hã . Sarati'é hã Zorobabéhé mama , ta hã .
text_b: And after the taking away to Babylon , Jechoniah had a son Shealtiel ; and Shealtiel had Zerubbabel ;

text_a: Tawamhã Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , Babironiza u da te simroi mono za'u si , ma tô Zeconiza hã poto , Sarati'é hã . Sarati'é hã Zorobabéhé mama , ta hã .
text_b: Mantad no di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom di kinosusuon di Yesus om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan dau do nokotulis : i Yikonia , i Salatiol , i Sorubabil , i Abihud , i Iliakim , i Asur , i Sadok , i Akhim , i Iliud , i Iliasar , i Matan , i Yakub , om i Yusup i sawo di Maria . Om i Maria no minogkosusu di Yesus , i roitan do Kristus .

text_a: And after the taking away to Babylon , Jechoniah had a son Shealtiel ; and Shealtiel had Zerubbabel ;
text_b: Mantad no di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom di kinosusuon di Yesus om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan dau do nokotulis : i Yikonia , i Salatiol , i Sorubabil , i Abihud , i Iliakim , i Asur , i Sadok , i Akhim , i Iliud , i Iliasar , i Matan , i Yakub , om i Yusup i sawo di Maria . Om i Maria no minogkosusu di Yesus , i roitan do Kristus .

text_a: Ãne hã 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã , Abra'ãhã hawimhã , Dawihi u hã . Duré 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã Dawihi hawimhã , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , da te ĩsimroi mono zéb u hã , Babironiza u . Duré 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , da te ĩsimroi mono zém hawimhã , Cristu ĩpotozéb u hã .
text_b: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; and from David to the taking away to Babylon , fourteen generations ; and from the taking away to Babylon to the coming of Christ , fourteen generations .

text_a: Ãne hã 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã , Abra'ãhã hawimhã , Dawihi u hã . Duré 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã Dawihi hawimhã , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , da te ĩsimroi mono zéb u hã , Babironiza u . Duré 14 na dahi'rata norĩ hâiba za'ra hã Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ , da te ĩsimroi mono zém hawimhã , Cristu ĩpotozéb u hã .
text_b: Om mantad no di Abraham om gisom do napaganak i Daud , om hopod om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di Daud om gisom di tinanggayan do pisangod o bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di tinanggayan do pisangod i bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom do korikot di kinosusuon di Kristus om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan .

text_a: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; and from David to the taking away to Babylon , fourteen generations ; and from the taking away to Babylon to the coming of Christ , fourteen generations .
text_b: Om mantad no di Abraham om gisom do napaganak i Daud , om hopod om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di Daud om gisom di tinanggayan do pisangod o bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di tinanggayan do pisangod i bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom do korikot di kinosusuon di Kristus om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan .

text_a: Tawamhã ãne Zezu Cristuhu potozé hã : Mariza hã Zezusi , ãma ĩna da hã ma tô sima ropisutu zahuré Zuzéhé me , sina mro zahuré da . Tane nherẽ , sina mro zahuré õ ré , ma tô 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na tiwasã Mariza hã , te te sa'rese õ nherẽ .
text_b: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was in this way : when his mother Mary was going to be married to Joseph , before they came together the discovery was made that she was with child by the Holy Spirit .

text_a: Tawamhã ãne Zezu Cristuhu potozé hã : Mariza hã Zezusi , ãma ĩna da hã ma tô sima ropisutu zahuré Zuzéhé me , sina mro zahuré da . Tane nherẽ , sina mro zahuré õ ré , ma tô 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na tiwasã Mariza hã , te te sa'rese õ nherẽ .
text_b: Poingkaa no susui di kinosusuon di Yesus Kristus . I Maria nopo i tina' dau , om nokopitunang no di Yusup . Nga' tontok dit a' po iyolo' nokopikawin , om monontian no i Maria . Nga' a' i' di Yusup oilaan do monontian i Maria do mantad id sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was in this way : when his mother Mary was going to be married to Joseph , before they came together the discovery was made that she was with child by the Holy Spirit .
text_b: Poingkaa no susui di kinosusuon di Yesus Kristus . I Maria nopo i tina' dau , om nokopitunang no di Yusup . Nga' tontok dit a' po iyolo' nokopikawin , om monontian no i Maria . Nga' a' i' di Yusup oilaan do monontian i Maria do mantad id sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: Tawamhã aibâ hã Marizaha ãma ĩmro da hã 're morĩ wẽ di , Zuzé na ĩsisi hã . Ta hã marĩ ĩwẽ si te te 're 'manharĩ u'âsi . Taha wa , ma tô sima rosa'rata , ãma ĩmro da ropisudu hã pi'uriwi za te te siwi ĩpari na hã , duré danho'a ĩwasété na te te ãma hiri wa , da te dasiwi waihu'u za'ra tõ da .
text_b: And Joseph , her husband , being an upright man , and not desiring to make her a public example , had a mind to put her away privately .

text_a: Tawamhã aibâ hã Marizaha ãma ĩmro da hã 're morĩ wẽ di , Zuzé na ĩsisi hã . Ta hã marĩ ĩwẽ si te te 're 'manharĩ u'âsi . Taha wa , ma tô sima rosa'rata , ãma ĩmro da ropisudu hã pi'uriwi za te te siwi ĩpari na hã , duré danho'a ĩwasété na te te ãma hiri wa , da te dasiwi waihu'u za'ra tõ da .
text_b: I Yusup nopo , i tunang di Maria diri nga' tulun dit otorodok do tumanud dot oturan do tugama' . Om pututon daa'ddi dau i pitunangan diyolo' di Maria . Nga' lisok-lisokon i' daa dau do momutut om a' i' ointingayam dot id toguang do tulun dot ogumu' i Maria .

text_a: And Joseph , her husband , being an upright man , and not desiring to make her a public example , had a mind to put her away privately .
text_b: I Yusup nopo , i tunang di Maria diri nga' tulun dit otorodok do tumanud dot oturan do tugama' . Om pututon daa'ddi dau i pitunangan diyolo' di Maria . Nga' lisok-lisokon i' daa dau do momutut om a' i' ointingayam dot id toguang do tulun dot ogumu' i Maria .

text_a: Ãne na te te sima rosa'rata wamhã , hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa hã ma tô tãma sihâi'ré , sõtõ 'rowi . Ãne te tãma tinha : — Zuzé , Dawihi nhihudu , asina aihâtâ'â tõ , Marizaha ãma aimro tõ da hã . Ta hã ma tô tiwasã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na .
text_b: But when he was giving thought to these things , an angel of the Lord came to him in a dream , saying , Joseph , son of David , have no fear of taking Mary as your wife ; because that which is in her body is of the Holy Spirit .

text_a: Ãne na te te sima rosa'rata wamhã , hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa hã ma tô tãma sihâi'ré , sõtõ 'rowi . Ãne te tãma tinha : — Zuzé , Dawihi nhihudu , asina aihâtâ'â tõ , Marizaha ãma aimro tõ da hã . Ta hã ma tô tiwasã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na .
text_b: Nga' maso' po di Yusup do momusorou'ddi , om pongipi no iyau . Om id suang nopo di nipi dau nga' nokokito iyau dot iso' o moloikat do Tuhan do minoro-boros dau do poingkaa , “ Oi Yusup , i sinakagon di Daud , kada' kooris do mangawin di Maria ; tu' iri nopo tanak di ponontianon dau om mantad i' do sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: But when he was giving thought to these things , an angel of the Lord came to him in a dream , saying , Joseph , son of David , have no fear of taking Mary as your wife ; because that which is in her body is of the Holy Spirit .
text_b: Nga' maso' po di Yusup do momusorou'ddi , om pongipi no iyau . Om id suang nopo di nipi dau nga' nokokito iyau dot iso' o moloikat do Tuhan do minoro-boros dau do poingkaa , “ Oi Yusup , i sinakagon di Daud , kada' kooris do mangawin di Maria ; tu' iri nopo tanak di ponontianon dau om mantad i' do sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: Ĩ'ra hã 'watébrémi na te za tãma podo . Tawamhã Zezusi na te za ĩsisi . Danho'reptui'wa te wasu'u , ĩsisi hã . Taha si te za tinhib'a'uwẽ hã te te 're anho'reptu , ĩwasété hawi , duré 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te 're ĩdahâ za'ra mono zém hawi .
text_b: And she will give birth to a son ; and you will give him the name Jesus ; for he will give his people salvation from their sins .

text_a: Ĩ'ra hã 'watébrémi na te za tãma podo . Tawamhã Zezusi na te za ĩsisi . Danho'reptui'wa te wasu'u , ĩsisi hã . Taha si te za tinhib'a'uwẽ hã te te 're anho'reptu , ĩwasété hawi , duré 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te 're ĩdahâ za'ra mono zém hawi .
text_b: Osusu nondo i Maria om kusai o tanak dau . Om pungaranan no kopio i tanak diri dot i Yesus , tu' iyau no popoidu' di tulun dau do mantad id dusa diyolo' , ” ka .

text_a: And she will give birth to a son ; and you will give him the name Jesus ; for he will give his people salvation from their sins .
text_b: Osusu nondo i Maria om kusai o tanak dau . Om pungaranan no kopio i tanak diri dot i Yesus , tu' iyau no popoidu' di tulun dau do mantad id dusa diyolo' , ” ka .

text_a: Ãne da hã ma tô pisutu , Zezusihi ma , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono hã duréihã tizadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wai ma , Iza'izaha ma , te te ĩwaihu'uzém na te te ãma uwaimrami da . Ãne ma tô tãma waihu'u , duréihã : “ Pi'õi ubuni hã te za tiwasã . Duré ĩ'ra hã te za tãma waptãrã , aibâ na . Taha nhisi hã za , Emanuwé na ĩsisi hã . ” ( 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , wasiré 're ĩmorĩ u'â , te wasu'u , ĩsisi hã . ) Ãne 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te ãma ĩrowaihu'uzé hã , duréihã .

text_a: Now all this took place so that the word of the Lord by the prophet might come true ,
text_b: Om nosiliu ngai' pogi' o miagal diri nga' mamayaan di boros do Tuhan do pinolombus di nabi dau do poingkaa ,

text_a: Tawamhã Zuzé hã utu wamhã , hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa te te tãma ĩwaihu'uzéb zarina , ma tô ãma timro oto , Marizaha ãma , awa'awi .
text_b: And Joseph did as the angel of the Lord had said to him , and took her as his wife ;

text_a: Tawamhã Zuzé hã utu wamhã , hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa te te tãma ĩwaihu'uzéb zarina , ma tô ãma timro oto , Marizaha ãma , awa'awi .
text_b: Om koposik poddi i Yusup , om wonsoyo' no dau o miagal di pinoboros di moloikat do Tuhan dot id dau . Om kowino' no dau i Maria .

text_a: And Joseph did as the angel of the Lord had said to him , and took her as his wife ;
text_b: Om koposik poddi i Yusup , om wonsoyo' no dau o miagal di pinoboros di moloikat do Tuhan dot id dau . Om kowino' no dau i Maria .

text_a: Tane nherẽ , Zuzé hã te te sima ãma rosa'rata õ di a'â Marizaha ãma , ĩ'ra tãma waptã'ã õ ré . Taré te ĩré 'madâ . Tawamhã ĩ'ra tãma waptã'ã wamhã , Zuzé hã ma tô sisi , Zezusi na .
text_b: And he had no connection with her till she had given birth to a son ; and he gave him the name Jesus .

text_a: Tane nherẽ , Zuzé hã te te sima ãma rosa'rata õ di a'â Marizaha ãma , ĩ'ra tãma waptã'ã õ ré . Taré te ĩré 'madâ . Tawamhã ĩ'ra tãma waptã'ã wamhã , Zuzé hã ma tô sisi , Zezusi na .
text_b: Nga' solinaid nopo dit a' po i Maria nosusu di tanak diri , om a' po i Yusup duminudun di Maria do miagal di wonsoyon do tulun di misasawo . Om kosusu noddi i tanak diri , om pungaranai no di Yusup iyau dot i Yesus .

text_a: And he had no connection with her till she had given birth to a son ; and he gave him the name Jesus .
text_b: Nga' solinaid nopo dit a' po i Maria nosusu di tanak diri , om a' po i Yusup duminudun di Maria do miagal di wonsoyon do tulun di misasawo . Om kosusu noddi i tanak diri , om pungaranai no di Yusup iyau dot i Yesus .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã ma tô podo , Berẽ na 'ri nho'õmo nhisi ãma , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma . Apito Erodi hã , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ te te 're 'madâ'â za'ra mono ré , ma waptãrã . Waptã'ã parip si , ma tô wasi na romnhoré'wa norĩ hã aihutu Zeruzarẽ u , bâtâ pusizém hawi , rowaihu'u pese 'wa norĩ hã .

text_a: Tawamhã Zezusi hã ma tô podo , Berẽ na 'ri nho'õmo nhisi ãma , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma . Apito Erodi hã , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ te te 're 'madâ'â za'ra mono ré , ma waptãrã . Waptã'ã parip si , ma tô wasi na romnhoré'wa norĩ hã aihutu Zeruzarẽ u , bâtâ pusizém hawi , rowaihu'u pese 'wa norĩ hã .
text_b: I Yesus nopo om pinogkosusu do hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , it id pomogunan do Yudia . Iri nopo raja' do tontok diri om i Horudis . Om tontok noddi do ruminikot do hilo'd Yorusalim o piro-piro tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon . Tadon nopo diyolo' om hilo'd ponong id koulayon .

text_a: Now when the birth of Jesus took place in Beth-lehem of Judaea , in the days of Herod the king , there came wise men from the east to Jerusalem ,
text_b: I Yesus nopo om pinogkosusu do hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , it id pomogunan do Yudia . Iri nopo raja' do tontok diri om i Horudis . Om tontok noddi do ruminikot do hilo'd Yorusalim o piro-piro tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon . Tadon nopo diyolo' om hilo'd ponong id koulayon .

text_a: Tawamhã te sô anharĩ za'ra , Zezusihi zô : — E mahãta 'watébrémi , zudezu norĩ nhib'apito da , ĩpodo hã . Wa norĩ hã wa tô 'madâ'â za'ra ni , wasi hã , bâtâ pusizém niwĩmhã , zudezu norĩ nhib'apito da , ĩpotozé te te ĩwasu'u hã . Taha wa , wa we ai'aba'ré ni , ãma wawata za'ra da . — Ãne ma tô sô anharĩ za'ra .
text_b: Saying , Where is the King of the Jews whose birth has now taken place ? We have seen his star in the east and have come to give him worship .

text_a: Tawamhã te sô anharĩ za'ra , Zezusihi zô : — E mahãta 'watébrémi , zudezu norĩ nhib'apito da , ĩpodo hã . Wa norĩ hã wa tô 'madâ'â za'ra ni , wasi hã , bâtâ pusizém niwĩmhã , zudezu norĩ nhib'apito da , ĩpotozé te te ĩwasu'u hã . text_a: Saying , Where is the King of the Jews whose birth has now taken place ? We have seen his star in the east and have come to give him worship .
text_b: Om boros ka diyolo' , “ Hinonggo i tanak di nosusu do sumiliu'd raja' do tulun do Yohudi ? Nokito dahai i rombituon dau do minimbulai do ponong id koulayon , om ruminikot diri iyahai'd hiti do mongoi tuku' dot id dau , ” ka diyolo' .

text_a: Tawamhã apito Erodi te te wapari wamhã , hâtâ'â uptabi di , uburé Zeruzarẽ ãma 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ zama .
text_b: And when it came to the ears of Herod the king , he was troubled , and all Jerusalem with him .

text_a: Tawamhã apito Erodi te te wapari wamhã , hâtâ'â uptabi di , uburé Zeruzarẽ ãma 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ zama .
text_b: Om kotigowo nopoddi i Raja' Horudis do nokorongou'ddi , om iri i tulun do hilo'd Yorusalim nga' nongkotigowo ngai' nogi' .

text_a: And when it came to the ears of Herod the king , he was troubled , and all Jerusalem with him .
text_b: Om kotigowo nopoddi i Raja' Horudis do nokorongou'ddi , om iri i tulun do hilo'd Yorusalim nga' nongkotigowo ngai' nogi' .

text_b: And he got together all the chief priests and scribes of the people , questioning them as to where the birth-place of the Christ would be .

text_a: Tawamhã apito Erodi hã ma tô 'rã'õtõ , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma , da'ãma romhuri'wa ĩpire norĩ hã , duré ĩsimiroti na rob'ui'éré 'rata na dama rowahutu'wa norĩ hã te te sadanharĩ za'ra da : — E mame te za waptãrã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te ĩpisudu hã , Danho'reptui'wa da . — Ãne te sadanharĩ za'ra .

text_a: And he got together all the chief priests and scribes of the people , questioning them as to where the birth-place of the Christ would be .
text_b: Om lohowo' ngai' noddi di Horudis i boyoon dot imam om i guru do Tourat do tumimung . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' , “ Honggo kosusuon di Raja' di pinabatos mantad do Kinorohingan ? ” ka dau .

text_a: And they said to him , In Beth-lehem of Judaea ; for so it is said in the writings of the prophet ,
text_b: Om simbar ka diyolo' , “ Hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia . Tu' poingkaa tinulis do songulun o nabi ,

text_a: “ A norĩ wa'wa hã Berẽ ãma 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono norĩ hã Zudaha nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai ãma 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono norĩ hã dama aiwapu na 're aihâimana za'ra wa'aba mono newa , te za oto dama asisi za'ẽtẽ na dama 're aihâimana u'âsi za'ra wa'aba mo . E marĩ wa . Tame danhib'apito da hã za poto wa , ĩ̱nhib'a'uwẽ norĩ hã te te 're ab'madâ'â pese mono da , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ hã . ” Ãne duréihã ma tô ãma rob'ui'éré siro , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u'wa hã .
text_b: You Beth-lehem , in the land of Judah , are not the least among the chiefs of Judah : out of you will come a ruler , who will be the keeper of my people Israel .

text_a: Tawamhã Erodi hã ma tô sô tihârâ za'ra , bâtâ pusizém hawi ĩsihutu norĩ zô , pi'uriwi te te sadanharĩ za'ra da , ta norĩ hã : — E mahãna ma tô wasi hã watobro . — Ãne te sadanharĩ za'ra .
text_b: Then Herod sent for the wise men privately , and put questions to them about what time the star had been seen .

text_a: Te te sadanharĩ za'ra pari , ma tô tãma rob'ru za'ra , Berẽ u si'aba'ré da . Ãne te duré tãma rob'ru za'ra : — Mo oto ai'aba'réi wa'aba , 'watébrémi zô asinharĩ pese za'ra wa'aba da . Sõpẽtẽ za'ra wa'aba wamhã , ma'ãpé apâ we asiwi ĩ̱po're pu'u aba za , te waihu'u da , ĩtẽme ĩ̱morĩ da duré wa hã , ãma ĩ̱wata da , ĩ̱zama . — Ãne ma tô tãma waihu'u za'ra , apito Erodi hã .
text_b: And he sent them to Beth-lehem and said , Go and make certain where the young child is ; and when you have seen him , let me have news of it , so that I may come and give him worship .

text_a: Tawamhã apito mreme te te wapari za'ra parimhã , robzabui'wa norĩ hã te oto ai'aba'ré , Berẽ u . Tawamhã bâdâdi na si'aba'réi ré , ma tô wasi hã 'madâ'â za'ra , tô õ hã tirob ãma ré te te ĩ'madâ'â za'ra hã . Te ĩsõwa timorĩ za'ra . Tawamhã ma tô oto mazazâ . 'Watébrémi ĩsãmrazém nho'õmoi baba , te oto za , wasi hã .
text_b: And after hearing the king , they went on their way ; and the star which they saw in the east went before them , till it came to rest over the place where the young child was .

text_a: Tawamhã 'ri para u ma tô asisi . Sisisi wamhã , ma tô sabu za'ra 'watébrémi hã , ĩna ĩré sãmra ré , Mariza hã . Tawamhã hi'rãtitõ ma tô asimro , ãma wata za'ra da . Taha pari , ma tô 'ridawa za'ra , tinhimiro'wapézéb za'ra hã . Ma tô ãma sawi za'ra , tinhoprub za'ra zém na ; ẽtẽ'ubuzi pré oru hã , duré wedewati ĩsadaze hã , duré wedewati ĩsadaze si'u'ẽne hã . Taha na ma tô tãma tinhoprub za'ra .
text_b: And they came into the house , and saw the young child with Mary , his mother ; and falling down on their faces they gave him worship ; and from their store they gave him offerings of gold , perfume , and spices .

text_b: And it was made clear to them by God in a dream that they were not to go back to Herod ; so they went into their country by another way .

text_a: Tawamhã aibâ norĩ si'aba'ré za'u si , ma tô hâiwa hawi Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa hã Zuzéhé ma sihâi'ré , sõtõ 'rowi . Ãne te tãma rowasu'u : — Apito Erodi hã ma tô dama rob'ru , ai'uté zô danhopré mono da , ĩsadawa para da te wĩrĩ da . Taha wa , te za oto ai'u . Ai'uté hã sa'ra na . Duré ĩna zama ĩré saprõni Ezitu u , tame a'â ĩré aimasisi aba da , dawi . Tawamhã apâ we ĩ'ane wa'aba zéb da hã , wa hã te aima ĩwaihu'uzéb zô si , te za asina asimipa . — Ãne ma tãma waihu'u , hâiwa ãma romhuri'wa hã .

Sib'rui wa , tãma da'wapéi'wa norĩ hã ma tô satõrĩ za'ra Berẽ u , 'watébrémi zô si'aba'ré da , uburé te te dawi uprosi mono da , maparane ãma ĩwahu mono õ hã , Berẽ ãma 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono norĩ 'ra hã , duré Berẽ 'rata 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono norĩ 'ra zama . text_b: Then Herod , when he saw that he had been tricked by the wise men , was very angry ; and he sent out , and put to death all the male children in Beth-lehem and in all the parts round about it , from two years old and under , acting on the knowledge which he had got with care from the wise men .

text_a: “ Rama na romnhisi ãma hã dawawa hã ma tô wapari za'ra ni , dazadari 'rãihâ hã . Raté hã te aiwa'õ , ti'ra norĩ ãma . Pẽ'ẽzé uptabi wa , te te sima wẽ õ di , da te ĩpẽ'ẽtété da hã , ĩ'ra norĩ hã uburé tiwi si'utõrĩ wa . ” Ãne ma tô Zeremiasi hã rowasu'u .
text_b: In Ramah there was a sound of weeping and great sorrow , Rachel weeping for her children , and she would not be comforted for their loss .

text_a: “ Rama na romnhisi ãma hã dawawa hã ma tô wapari za'ra ni , dazadari 'rãihâ hã . Raté hã te aiwa'õ , ti'ra norĩ ãma . Pẽ'ẽzé uptabi wa , te te sima wẽ õ di , da te ĩpẽ'ẽtété da hã , ĩ'ra norĩ hã uburé tiwi si'utõrĩ wa . ” Ãne ma tô Zeremiasi hã rowasu'u .
text_b: “ Haro o mihad dot orongou do mantad hilo'd Rama do minglompud do mihad do mogihad . Mogihad i Rasil di tangaanak dau ; om a' no iyau milo dot insasamadan , tu' nangapatai ngai' no iyolo' , ” ka .

text_a: In Ramah there was a sound of weeping and great sorrow , Rachel weeping for her children , and she would not be comforted for their loss .
text_b: “ Haro o mihad dot orongou do mantad hilo'd Rama do minglompud do mihad do mogihad . Mogihad i Rasil di tangaanak dau ; om a' no iyau milo dot insasamadan , tu' nangapatai ngai' no iyolo' , ” ka .

text_a: Tawamhã apito Erodi dâ'â parimhã , ma tô hâiwa ãma Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa hã Zuzéhé ma sihâi'ré , sõtõ 'rowi , Ezitu ãma sãmra ré .
text_b: But when Herod was dead , an angel of the Lord came in a dream to Joseph in Egypt ,

text_a: Tawamhã apito Erodi dâ'â parimhã , ma tô hâiwa ãma Wanhib'apito ma romhuri'wa hã Zuzéhé ma sihâi'ré , sõtõ 'rowi , Ezitu ãma sãmra ré .
text_b: Om kapatai poddi i Horudis , om intalang no kawagu o moloikat do Tuhan dot id di Yusup dot id suang do nipi , di hilo' pod Masir i Yusup .

text_a: But when Herod was dead , an angel of the Lord came in a dream to Joseph in Egypt ,
text_b: Om kapatai poddi i Horudis , om intalang no kawagu o moloikat do Tuhan dot id di Yusup dot id suang do nipi , di hilo' pod Masir i Yusup .

text_a: Ãne te tãma tinha : — Oto ai'utu . 'Watébrémi hã oto subzari aba . Ĩna ĩré saprõni , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai u . Aibâ norĩ hã 'watébrémi te te aré siwi wĩrĩ da , sô ĩsi'aba'ré norĩ hã ma tô tidâ'â za'ra . — Ãne te tãma rowasu'u .
text_b: Saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into the land of Israel : because they who were attempting to take the young child's life are dead .

text_a: Ãne te tãma tinha : — Oto ai'utu . 'Watébrémi hã oto subzari aba . Ĩna ĩré saprõni , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai u . Aibâ norĩ hã 'watébrémi te te aré siwi wĩrĩ da , sô ĩsi'aba'ré norĩ hã ma tô tidâ'â za'ra . — Ãne te tãma rowasu'u .
text_b: Boros ka di moloikat , “ Iri nopo tulun di mamatai daa dilo tanak om nangapatai no . Om tungag nogi' om ngoyo' ilo tanak om ilo tina' dau , om gumuli' kou i' do hilo'd Israil , ” ka .

text_a: Saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into the land of Israel : because they who were attempting to take the young child's life are dead .
text_b: Boros ka di moloikat , “ Iri nopo tulun di mamatai daa dilo tanak om nangapatai no . Om tungag nogi' om ngoyo' ilo tanak om ilo tina' dau , om gumuli' kou i' do hilo'd Israil , ” ka .

text_a: Tawamhã Zuzé hã utu wamhã , ma tô apâ saprõni zahuré 'watébrémi hã , ĩna me , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai u .
text_b: And he got up , and took the young child and his mother , and came into the land of Israel .

text_a: Tawamhã Zuzé hã utu wamhã , ma tô apâ saprõni zahuré 'watébrémi hã , ĩna me , Izarazéhé nhihudu norĩ nhipti'ai u .
text_b: Om tungag noddi i Yusup , om tanggayai no dau i tanak diri om i Maria do guminuli' do hilo'd Israil .

text_a: And he got up , and took the young child and his mother , and came into the land of Israel .
text_b: Om tungag noddi i Yusup , om tanggayai no dau i tanak diri om i Maria do guminuli' do hilo'd Israil .

text_a: Tane nherẽ , ma tô wapa Aterazu , apito Erodihi 'ra wasu'u hã , timama nhowa're're ĩsébré na hã Zudeza ãma te te 're ĩda'ab'madâ'â mono da hã . Taha wa , pahi di , tame ĩré 're ĩhâimana zahuré mono da hã . Tawamhã sõtõ 'rowi ma tô tãma waihu'u na sahu , hâiwa ãma 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma romhuri'wa hã , Zuzéhé ma , Zudeza u neb zahuré tõ da , Darireza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi u si neb da . Taha wa , ma tô tamomop si tineb zahuré , Zuzé norĩ hã .
text_b: But when it came to his ears that Archelaus was ruling over Judaea in the place of his father Herod , he was in fear of going there ; and God having given him news of the danger in a dream , he went out of the way into the country parts of Galilee .

text_a: Tane nherẽ , ma tô wapa Aterazu , apito Erodihi 'ra wasu'u hã , timama nhowa're're ĩsébré na hã Zudeza ãma te te 're ĩda'ab'madâ'â mono da hã . Taha wa , pahi di , tame ĩré 're ĩhâimana zahuré mono da hã . Tawamhã sõtõ 'rowi ma tô tãma waihu'u na sahu , hâiwa ãma 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma romhuri'wa hã , Zuzéhé ma , Zudeza u neb zahuré tõ da , Darireza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi u si neb da . Taha wa , ma tô tamomop si tineb zahuré , Zuzé norĩ hã .
text_b: Nga' korongou noddi i Yusup dot i Arkilaus i tanak di Horudis , o suminowoli di Horudis do suminiliu'd raja' do pomogunan do Yudia . Om moddosi iddi i Yusup do mongoi'd hilo' . Om kosunudai poddi iyau do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd watas do Galilia .

text_a: But when it came to his ears that Archelaus was ruling over Judaea in the place of his father Herod , he was in fear of going there ; and God having given him news of the danger in a dream , he went out of the way into the country parts of Galilee .
text_b: Nga' korongou noddi i Yusup dot i Arkilaus i tanak di Horudis , o suminowoli di Horudis do suminiliu'd raja' do pomogunan do Yudia . Om moddosi iddi i Yusup do mongoi'd hilo' . Om kosunudai poddi iyau do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd watas do Galilia .

text_a: Tame te oto 're simasisi zahuré , Nazaré na 'ri wa'õtõ nhisi ãma . Ãne ĩromhâimanazé hã , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa norĩ nhimi'ui'éré hã te te ãma uwaimrami da . Ãne duréihã ĩwasu'u na rob'ui'éré 'rada hã : “ Ta hã Nazaré ãma 're ĩsãmra mono na te za oto da te 're sisi za'ra . ” Ãne ma tô waihu'u sirõmo za'ra , za da te dasima 're ĩwasu'u za'ra mono zéb da na hã .
text_b: And he came and was living in a town named Nazareth : so that the word of the prophets might come true , He will be named a Nazarene .

text_a: Tame te oto 're simasisi zahuré , Nazaré na 'ri wa'õtõ nhisi ãma . Ãne ĩromhâimanazé hã , duréihã 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa norĩ nhimi'ui'éré hã te te ãma uwaimrami da . Ãne duréihã ĩwasu'u na rob'ui'éré 'rada hã : “ Ta hã Nazaré ãma 're ĩsãmra mono na te za oto da te 're sisi za'ra . ” Ãne ma tô waihu'u sirõmo za'ra , za da te dasima 're ĩwasu'u za'ra mono zéb da na hã .
text_b: Om undorong no iyau'd hilo' , dot id iso' bandar di roitan do Nasarit . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros di piro-piro nabi dot i tanak o komoyon , “ Roitan nondo iyau do Tulun do Nasarit , ” ka .

text_a: And he came and was living in a town named Nazareth : so that the word of the prophets might come true , He will be named a Nazarene .
text_b: Om undorong no iyau'd hilo' , dot id iso' bandar di roitan do Nasarit . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros di piro-piro nabi dot i tanak o komoyon , “ Roitan nondo iyau do Tulun do Nasarit , ” ka .

text_a: Tawamhã wahub ahâ na ãma wahu pari , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã mo a'ubuni u , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u na te te dama ãma sãna'rata da .
text_b: And in those days John the Baptist came preaching in the waste land of Judaea ,

text_a: Tawamhã wahub ahâ na ãma wahu pari , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã mo a'ubuni u , Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u na te te dama ãma sãna'rata da .
text_b: Om tontok noddi do ruminikot i Yohanis Gampamatis do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan do Yudia , om timpuun no iyau do monuduk .

text_a: And in those days John the Baptist came preaching in the waste land of Judaea ,
text_b: Om tontok noddi do ruminikot i Yohanis Gampamatis do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan do Yudia , om timpuun no iyau do monuduk .

text_a: Ãne te dama rowasu'u : — Ma'ãpé , aiwasété wi aipizari za'ra wa'aba . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , da'ãma 're ĩsib'a'uwẽ mono zéb u hã romhuture di oto . — Ãne te dama rowahutu , Zuwã Batita hã .
text_b: Saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin ; for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Ãne te dama rowasu'u : — Ma'ãpé , aiwasété wi aipizari za'ra wa'aba . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono , da'ãma 're ĩsib'a'uwẽ mono zéb u hã romhuture di oto . — Ãne te dama rowahutu , Zuwã Batita hã .
text_b: Boros ka dau , “ Korologo kou no do momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka .

text_a: Saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin ; for the kingdom of heaven is near .
text_b: Boros ka dau , “ Korologo kou no do momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka .

text_a: Duréihã Iza'iza hã ma tô Zuwã Batitaha ãma rob'ui'éré siro , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa hã . Ãne ĩsimi'ui'éré hã : “ Ni'wa hã te za te te dama 're rob'mahârâ , a'ubuni wi : Bâdâdi hã asiwi ropese aba , Wanhib'apito zô . Ĩmana 'rãmi bâdâdi hã sô sa'ra wa'aba , awa'awi da . ” Ãne ma tô Iza'iza hã ãma rob'ui'éré , romhâ ré .
text_b: For this is he of whom Isaiah the prophet said , The voice of one crying in the waste land , Make ready the way of the Lord , make his roads straight .

text_a: Duréihã Iza'iza hã ma tô Zuwã Batitaha ãma rob'ui'éré siro , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono zadawa wasu'u 'rata 'wa hã . Ãne ĩsimi'ui'éré hã : “ Ni'wa hã te za te te dama 're rob'mahârâ , a'ubuni wi : Bâdâdi hã asiwi ropese aba , Wanhib'apito zô . Ĩmana 'rãmi bâdâdi hã sô sa'ra wa'aba , awa'awi da . ” Ãne ma tô Iza'iza hã ãma rob'ui'éré , romhâ ré .
text_b: Om i Yohanis no i tulun di komoyon di Nabi Yosaya , do tontok di minomoros iyau do poingkaa , “ Haro o tulun do mimboros dot opuhod do hilo'd tana' do kowotuan do poingkaa , ‘ Rontisan no ralan do wayaan do Tuhan ; potingon no i ralan do wayaan dau , ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: For this is he of whom Isaiah the prophet said , The voice of one crying in the waste land , Make ready the way of the Lord , make his roads straight .
text_b: Om i Yohanis no i tulun di komoyon di Nabi Yosaya , do tontok di minomoros iyau do poingkaa , “ Haro o tulun do mimboros dot opuhod do hilo'd tana' do kowotuan do poingkaa , ‘ Rontisan no ralan do wayaan do Tuhan ; potingon no i ralan do wayaan dau , ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: Zuwã hã awaru ba'õmore zéré 'manharĩ na te 're si'uza . Duré romhâ 'manharĩ hâiwaré na te 're si'usisi . 'Riti na si te 're sa . Duré rom na ropĩni na zama te 're sa .
text_b: Now John was clothed in camel's hair , with a leather band about him ; and his food was locusts and honey .

text_a: Zuwã hã awaru ba'õmore zéré 'manharĩ na te 're si'uza . Duré romhâ 'manharĩ hâiwaré na te 're si'usisi . 'Riti na si te 're sa . Duré rom na ropĩni na zama te 're sa .
text_b: Pakayan nopo di Yohanis om winonsoi mantad id hulu dot unta , om tagkos no dau om mantad id kulit do nintorusan . Om kanon nopo dau om godu om paha' do mantad hiri'd gouton .

text_a: Now John was clothed in camel's hair , with a leather band about him ; and his food was locusts and honey .
text_b: Pakayan nopo di Yohanis om winonsoi mantad id hulu dot unta , om tagkos no dau om mantad id kulit do nintorusan . Om kanon nopo dau om godu om paha' do mantad hiri'd gouton .

text_a: Tawamhã Zeruzarẽ ãma 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ hã , duré Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma daza'rui mono bâ 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono hã , duré Zodã pa nhisi 'rata 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono norĩ zama , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito , daro mono bâ . Ĩsimirowasu'u hã da te 're wapari za'ra mono da , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito .
text_b: Then Jerusalem and all Judaea went out to him , and all the people from near Jordan ;

text_a: Tawamhã Zeruzarẽ ãma 're ĩdasi'ubumroi mono norĩ hã , duré Zudeza na danhipti'a nho'õmo nhisi ãma daza'rui mono bâ 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono hã , duré Zodã pa nhisi 'rata 're ĩdahâimana za'ra mono norĩ zama , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito , daro mono bâ . Ĩsimirowasu'u hã da te 're wapari za'ra mono da , ma tô ĩtẽme 're dasito .
text_b: Om ogumu' o tulun do mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , om mantad id pointongkop do pomogunan do Yudia om mantad id piro-piro watas di potoropis di Bawang do Yordan , do ruminikot dot id di Yohanis .

text_a: Then Jerusalem and all Judaea went out to him , and all the people from near Jordan ;
text_b: Om ogumu' o tulun do mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , om mantad id pointongkop do pomogunan do Yudia om mantad id piro-piro watas di potoropis di Bawang do Yordan , do ruminikot dot id di Yohanis .

text_a: Taha wa , dawasété na ma tô 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra 'râwi , sõ'awi , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma . Dawasété na 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra mono sidâpâsi , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã â dawabzuri hã te te dama 're ab'manharĩ , Zodã pa ãma .
text_b: And they were given baptism by him in the river Jordan , saying openly that they had done wrong .

text_a: Taha wa , dawasété na ma tô 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra 'râwi , sõ'awi , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma . Dawasété na 're dasiwẽ'õ za'ra mono sidâpâsi , ma tô Zuwã Batita hã â dawabzuri hã te te dama 're ab'manharĩ , Zodã pa ãma .
text_b: Om okuno' no diyolo' i dusa diyolo' , om botisai noddi iyolo' di Yohanis do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan .

text_a: And they were given baptism by him in the river Jordan , saying openly that they had done wrong .
text_b: Om okuno' no diyolo' i dusa diyolo' , om botisai noddi iyolo' di Yohanis do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan .

text_a: Tawamhã Zuwã hã ma tô 'madâ'â za'ra , parisezu norĩ hã ahâ uptabi na , duré sadusezu norĩ hã . Te ĩtẽme ai'aba'ré , â dawabzuri te te dame 'manharĩ za'ra da . Tawamhã Zuwã hã te te 'madâ'â za'ra wamhã , te tãma nharĩ za'ra , parisezu norĩ ma : — A norĩ wa'wa hã wahi ne te 're anomro aba mo . E 'wa simiroti zarina , te we ĩ̱tẽme ai'aba'réi wa'wa bété , â dawabzuri si ĩ'manharĩ za'ra wa'aba zém na , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzé wi , asisõ'reptu za'ra wa'aba da bâ , aiwasédé hã rẽme za'ra wa'aba õ nherẽ .
text_b: But when he saw a number of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to his baptism , he said to them , Offspring of snakes , at whose word are you going in flight from the wrath to come ?

text_a: Tawamhã Zuwã hã ma tô 'madâ'â za'ra , parisezu norĩ hã ahâ uptabi na , duré sadusezu norĩ hã . Te ĩtẽme ai'aba'ré , â dawabzuri te te dame 'manharĩ za'ra da . Tawamhã Zuwã hã te te 'madâ'â za'ra wamhã , te tãma nharĩ za'ra , parisezu norĩ ma : — A norĩ wa'wa hã wahi ne te 're anomro aba mo . E 'wa simiroti zarina , te we ĩ̱tẽme ai'aba'réi wa'wa bété , â dawabzuri si ĩ'manharĩ za'ra wa'aba zém na , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzé wi , asisõ'reptu za'ra wa'aba da bâ , aiwasédé hã rẽme za'ra wa'aba õ nherẽ .
text_b: Om ogumu' i' daa o tulun do Parisi om Saduki do ruminikot do mongoi pokibatis . Nga' soira' di nokito di Yohanis iyolo' do rumikot , om boros ka dau , “ Iyokoyu no tulun dit angaraat ! Isai o minomisunud dokoyu do milo kou do moggidu'd mantad id hukuman do Kinorohingan dit oruhai no dau do porikoton ?

text_a: But when he saw a number of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to his baptism , he said to them , Offspring of snakes , at whose word are you going in flight from the wrath to come ?
text_b: Om ogumu' i' daa o tulun do Parisi om Saduki do ruminikot do mongoi pokibatis . Nga' soira' di nokito di Yohanis iyolo' do rumikot , om boros ka dau , “ Iyokoyu no tulun dit angaraat ! Isai o minomisunud dokoyu do milo kou do moggidu'd mantad id hukuman do Kinorohingan dit oruhai no dau do porikoton ?

text_a: Sena na aiwasédé hã ĩrẽme za'ra wa'aba zém na , da te 're aiwaihu'u za'ra wa'aba mono da , te za oto 're anomro wẽ wa'aba mo .
text_b: Let your change of heart be seen in your works :

text_a: Sena na aiwasédé hã ĩrẽme za'ra wa'aba zém na , da te 're aiwaihu'u za'ra wa'aba mono da , te za oto 're anomro wẽ wa'aba mo .
text_b: Pointalango' po dokoyu do nokorologo kopio kou do momonsoi'd dusa .

text_a: Let your change of heart be seen in your works :
text_b: Pointalango' po dokoyu do nokorologo kopio kou do momonsoi'd dusa .

text_a: Duré Abra'ãhã nhihudu wẽ te , asina 're rosa'rata za'ra wa'aba mono õ di za , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te 're ĩ'aihâ za'ra wa'aba mono õ na hã . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma , waihu'u pese di , ã ẽtẽ norĩ ma , te te nharĩ da , tãma si'a'uwẽ za'ra da , Abra'ãhã nhihudu oto 're hâimana za'ra mono da , ẽne hã .
text_b: And say not to yourselves , We have Abraham for our father ; because I say to you that God is able from these stones to make children for Abraham .

text_a: Duré Abra'ãhã nhihudu wẽ te , asina 're rosa'rata za'ra wa'aba mono õ di za , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono te te 're ĩ'aihâ za'ra wa'aba mono õ na hã . 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono ma , waihu'u pese di , ã ẽtẽ norĩ ma , te te nharĩ da , tãma si'a'uwẽ za'ra da , Abra'ãhã nhihudu oto 're hâimana za'ra mono da , ẽne hã .
text_b: Kada' nogi' dokoyu soroho' do koidu' kou do mantad id hukuman , do momoros kou piya dot i Abraham o taki dokoyu . Ilaai no dokoyu , dot iti piya watu nga' milo id Kinorohingan do silihon do sinakagon di Abraham !

text_a: And say not to yourselves , We have Abraham for our father ; because I say to you that God is able from these stones to make children for Abraham .
text_b: Kada' nogi' dokoyu soroho' do koidu' kou do mantad id hukuman , do momoros kou piya dot i Abraham o taki dokoyu . Ilaai no dokoyu , dot iti piya watu nga' milo id Kinorohingan do silihon do sinakagon di Abraham !

text_a: Hâtâra hã te za oto ni'wa hã sarõtõ , wedepa nhihârizéb da hã . Uburé wede hã 're ĩ'rãi pese za'ra mono õ hã te za te te ãma 're anhihâri . Tawamhã unhama u te za te te 're anhamra . — Ãne te dama ãma simiré'é Zuwã hã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzém na hã .
text_b: And even now the axe is put to the root of the trees ; every tree then which does not give good fruit is cut down , and put into the fire .

text_a: Hâtâra hã te za oto ni'wa hã sarõtõ , wedepa nhihârizéb da hã . Uburé wede hã 're ĩ'rãi pese za'ra mono õ hã te za te te ãma 're anhihâri . Tawamhã unhama u te za te te 're anhamra . — Ãne te dama ãma simiré'é Zuwã hã , 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono nhimihâzém na hã .
text_b: Nokosodia' no kapak do panagad di kayu do porotopon do tana' o pananagad . Pointikid-tikid do kayu dit a' mongua' dot osonong om tagadon no om pataamon do hiri'd tapui .

text_a: And even now the axe is put to the root of the trees ; every tree then which does not give good fruit is cut down , and put into the fire .
text_b: Nokosodia' no kapak do panagad di kayu do porotopon do tana' o pananagad . Pointikid-tikid do kayu dit a' mongua' dot osonong om tagadon no om pataamon do hiri'd tapui .

text_a: Te duré dama tinha : — Wa hã wa tô â uptabi na si te 're aihâiba ubu za'ra wa'wa , â dawabzuri hã te aima 're ab'manharĩ aba mono wamhã , aiwasété wi 're aipizari za'ra wa'aba mono zém na , da te oto ãma 're aiwaihu'u za'ra wa'aba mono da . Tane nherẽ , ĩ̱za'u si te za ĩ̱ma ĩpire uptabi hã wei wi . Taha si te za oto 'Re ĩhâimana u'âsi mono pẽ'ẽzani na te te duré 're aihâiba ubu za'ra wa'wa , unhama ne na zama , â na te aima 're ĩ'ab'manharĩ aba mono ne hã . Ta hã ĩ̱ma pire uptabi wa , ĩpara'uza hã te tãma mrami waihu'u õ di za , tãma ĩ̱wapure wa .
text_b: Truly , I give baptism with water to those of you whose hearts are changed ; but he who comes after me is greater than I , whose shoes I am not good enough to take up : he will give you baptism with the Holy Spirit and with fire :
