text_b: Ondung haro o tulun di mamadawa dokoyu om i mangangat dokoyu do mibisara' dot id kut , om lumomus kou no kopio do mongoi ponokibabas dau do daamot pod haro o maso , om a' po koongoi dot id kut . Tu' ondung amu' , nga' patahakon kou nondo di tulun diri dot id hakim , om patahakon kou nondo di hakim dot id pulis . Om posuangon kou nondo di pulis dot id giil .

text_a: Come to an agreement quickly with him who has a cause against you at law , while you are with him on the way , for fear that he may give you up to the judge and the judge may give you to the police and you may be put into prison .
text_b: Ondung haro o tulun di mamadawa dokoyu om i mangangat dokoyu do mibisara' dot id kut , om lumomus kou no kopio do mongoi ponokibabas dau do daamot pod haro o maso , om a' po koongoi dot id kut . Tu' ondung amu' , nga' patahakon kou nondo di tulun diri dot id hakim , om patahakon kou nondo di hakim dot id pulis . Om posuangon kou nondo di pulis dot id giil .

text_a: Dazazéb 're , da te ai'manherẽ aba wamhã , marĩ hã dawi ĩ'mai'manharĩ wasété aba wa'rãmi , dama asi'maiwa'âbâ 'rãsutu pese aba õ nherẽ , ta hawi ai'maiwatobro waihu'u aba õ di za . Tô sena , wa ãne na hã aima rowasu'u za'ra wa'wa .
text_b: Truly I say to you , You will not come out from there till you have made payment of the very last farthing .

text_a: Dazazéb 're , da te ai'manherẽ aba wamhã , marĩ hã dawi ĩ'mai'manharĩ wasété aba wa'rãmi , dama asi'maiwa'âbâ 'rãsutu pese aba õ nherẽ , ta hawi ai'maiwatobro waihu'u aba õ di za . Tô sena , wa ãne na hã aima rowasu'u za'ra wa'wa .
text_b: Om ilaai no dokoyu dot : A' kou no milo'd lumabus do mantad hiri'd giil , dot a' po dokoyu abayaran ngai' i nakadanda' dokoyu , ” ka dau .

text_a: Truly I say to you , You will not come out from there till you have made payment of the very last farthing .
text_b: Om ilaai no dokoyu dot : A' kou no milo'd lumabus do mantad hiri'd giil , dot a' po dokoyu abayaran ngai' i nakadanda' dokoyu , ” ka dau .

text_a: Nin ye Yesu Krisita buruju sɛbɛn ye . Yesu bɔra Dawuda bɔnsɔn na , Dawuda bɔra Ibrahima bɔnsɔn na .
text_b: The book of the generations of Jesus Christ , the son of David , the son of Abraham .

text_a: Nin ye Yesu Krisita buruju sɛbɛn ye . Yesu bɔra Dawuda bɔnsɔn na , Dawuda bɔra Ibrahima bɔnsɔn na .
text_b: Iti ngai' no ngaran di komolohingan di Yesus Kristus , i sinakagon di Daud , om i sinakagon di Abraham . Mantad nopo di Abraham om di gisom do napaganak i Daud om iti ngai' no ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis :

text_a: The book of the generations of Jesus Christ , the son of David , the son of Abraham .
text_b: Iti ngai' no ngaran di komolohingan di Yesus Kristus , i sinakagon di Daud , om i sinakagon di Abraham . Mantad nopo di Abraham om di gisom do napaganak i Daud om iti ngai' no ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis :

text_a: Ibrahima ye Isaka bange . Isaka ye Yakuba bange . Yakuba ye Juda ni a balimakɛw bange .
text_b: The son of Abraham was Isaac ; and the son of Isaac was Jacob ; and the sons of Jacob were Judah and his brothers ;

text_a: Ibrahima ye Isaka bange . Isaka ye Yakuba bange . Yakuba ye Juda ni a balimakɛw bange .
text_b: I Abraham , i Isak , i Yakub , i Yohuda om i piro-piro tobpinai di Yohuda , i Piris om i Sira ( ngaran nopod tina' diyolo' om i Tamar ) , i Hisron , i Ram , i Aminadab , i Nahason , i Salmon , i Buas ( tina' nopo dau om i Rahab ) , i Obid ( tina' nopo dau om i Rut ) , i Isai , om i Raja' Daud .

text_a: The son of Abraham was Isaac ; and the son of Isaac was Jacob ; and the sons of Jacob were Judah and his brothers ;
text_b: I Abraham , i Isak , i Yakub , i Yohuda om i piro-piro tobpinai di Yohuda , i Piris om i Sira ( ngaran nopod tina' diyolo' om i Tamar ) , i Hisron , i Ram , i Aminadab , i Nahason , i Salmon , i Buas ( tina' nopo dau om i Rahab ) , i Obid ( tina' nopo dau om i Rut ) , i Isai , om i Raja' Daud .

text_a: Isayi ye masakɛ Dawuda bange . Masakɛ Dawuda ye Solomani bange . Ale ba tun ye Uri muso ye fɔlɔ .
text_b: And the son of Jesse was David the king ; and the son of David was Solomon by her who had been the wife of Uriah ;

text_a: Isayi ye masakɛ Dawuda bange . Masakɛ Dawuda ye Solomani bange . Ale ba tun ye Uri muso ye fɔlɔ .
text_b: Mantad no di Daud om gisom di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis : I Suliman ( tina' nopo dau om i sawo daa di Uria di gulu po ) , i Rihabiam , i Abia , i Asa , i Yosapat , i Yoram , i Usia , i Yotam , i Ahas , i Hiskia , i Manasi , i Amon , i Yosia , i Yikonia om i piro-piro tobpinai dau .

text_a: And the son of Jesse was David the king ; and the son of David was Solomon by her who had been the wife of Uriah ;
text_b: Mantad no di Daud om gisom di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan di Yesus do nokotulis : I Suliman ( tina' nopo dau om i sawo daa di Uria di gulu po ) , i Rihabiam , i Abia , i Asa , i Yosapat , i Yoram , i Usia , i Yotam , i Ahas , i Hiskia , i Manasi , i Amon , i Yosia , i Yikonia om i piro-piro tobpinai dau .

text_a: O mɔgɔ cɛli kɛlen kɔ ka taa Babilonɛ , Jekoniyasi ye Salatiɛl bange . Salatiɛl ye Zorobabɛl bange .
text_b: And after the taking away to Babylon , Jechoniah had a son Shealtiel ; and Shealtiel had Zerubbabel ;

text_a: O mɔgɔ cɛli kɛlen kɔ ka taa Babilonɛ , Jekoniyasi ye Salatiɛl bange . Salatiɛl ye Zorobabɛl bange .
text_b: Mantad no di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom di kinosusuon di Yesus om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan dau do nokotulis : i Yikonia , i Salatiol , i Sorubabil , i Abihud , i Iliakim , i Asur , i Sadok , i Akhim , i Iliud , i Iliasar , i Matan , i Yakub , om i Yusup i sawo di Maria . Om i Maria no minogkosusu di Yesus , i roitan do Kristus .

text_a: And after the taking away to Babylon , Jechoniah had a son Shealtiel ; and Shealtiel had Zerubbabel ;
text_b: Mantad no di natanggayan do pisangod o bansa'd Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom di kinosusuon di Yesus om iti ngai' o ngaran do komolohingan dau do nokotulis : i Yikonia , i Salatiol , i Sorubabil , i Abihud , i Iliakim , i Asur , i Sadok , i Akhim , i Iliud , i Iliasar , i Matan , i Yakub , om i Yusup i sawo di Maria . Om i Maria no minogkosusu di Yesus , i roitan do Kristus .

text_a: Bɔnsɔn yɛlɛma ko tan ni naani kɛra Ibrahima ni Dawuda cɛ . O kɔ , bɔnsɔn yɛlɛma ko tan ni naani kɛra Dawuda ni Israɛl mɔgɔw cɛli waati cɛ ka taa Babilonɛ . Bɔnsɔn yɛlɛma ko tan ni naani kɛra o tuma ni Krisita bange tuma cɛ .
text_b: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; and from David to the taking away to Babylon , fourteen generations ; and from the taking away to Babylon to the coming of Christ , fourteen generations .

text_a: Bɔnsɔn yɛlɛma ko tan ni naani kɛra Ibrahima ni Dawuda cɛ . O kɔ , bɔnsɔn yɛlɛma ko tan ni naani kɛra Dawuda ni Israɛl mɔgɔw cɛli waati cɛ ka taa Babilonɛ . Bɔnsɔn yɛlɛma ko tan ni naani kɛra o tuma ni Krisita bange tuma cɛ .
text_b: Om mantad no di Abraham om gisom do napaganak i Daud , om hopod om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di Daud om gisom di tinanggayan do pisangod o bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di tinanggayan do pisangod i bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom do korikot di kinosusuon di Kristus om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan .

text_a: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations ; and from David to the taking away to Babylon , fourteen generations ; and from the taking away to Babylon to the coming of Christ , fourteen generations .
text_b: Om mantad no di Abraham om gisom do napaganak i Daud , om hopod om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di Daud om gisom di tinanggayan do pisangod o bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan dot oinsanan . Om mantad no di tinanggayan do pisangod i bansa' dot Israil do hilo'd Babil om gisom do korikot di kinosusuon di Kristus om hopod i' om apat o sinolusukan .

text_a: Yesu Krisita bange cogo filɛ . A ba Mariyama maminɛlen tun bɛ Yusufu fɛ . Sani u ka jɛ , Mariyama y'a sɔrɔ ko a ye kɔnɔ ta Ni Senu ka sebaaya la .
text_b: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was in this way : when his mother Mary was going to be married to Joseph , before they came together the discovery was made that she was with child by the Holy Spirit .

text_a: Yesu Krisita bange cogo filɛ . A ba Mariyama maminɛlen tun bɛ Yusufu fɛ . Sani u ka jɛ , Mariyama y'a sɔrɔ ko a ye kɔnɔ ta Ni Senu ka sebaaya la .
text_b: Poingkaa no susui di kinosusuon di Yesus Kristus . I Maria nopo i tina' dau , om nokopitunang no di Yusup . Nga' tontok dit a' po iyolo' nokopikawin , om monontian no i Maria . Nga' a' i' di Yusup oilaan do monontian i Maria do mantad id sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was in this way : when his mother Mary was going to be married to Joseph , before they came together the discovery was made that she was with child by the Holy Spirit .
text_b: Poingkaa no susui di kinosusuon di Yesus Kristus . I Maria nopo i tina' dau , om nokopitunang no di Yusup . Nga' tontok dit a' po iyolo' nokopikawin , om monontian no i Maria . Nga' a' i' di Yusup oilaan do monontian i Maria do mantad id sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: A cɛ Yusufu tun ye mɔgɔ tilennen ye , a tun t'a fɛ ka Mariyama tɔgɔ tiɲɛ . A y'a latigɛ a yɛrɛ kɔnɔ ko a na o furu ko dabila dogo la .
text_b: And Joseph , her husband , being an upright man , and not desiring to make her a public example , had a mind to put her away privately .

text_a: A cɛ Yusufu tun ye mɔgɔ tilennen ye , a tun t'a fɛ ka Mariyama tɔgɔ tiɲɛ . A y'a latigɛ a yɛrɛ kɔnɔ ko a na o furu ko dabila dogo la .
text_b: I Yusup nopo , i tunang di Maria diri nga' tulun dit otorodok do tumanud dot oturan do tugama' . Om pututon daa'ddi dau i pitunangan diyolo' di Maria . Nga' lisok-lisokon i' daa dau do momutut om a' i' ointingayam dot id toguang do tulun dot ogumu' i Maria .

text_a: And Joseph , her husband , being an upright man , and not desiring to make her a public example , had a mind to put her away privately .
text_b: I Yusup nopo , i tunang di Maria diri nga' tulun dit otorodok do tumanud dot oturan do tugama' . Om pututon daa'ddi dau i pitunangan diyolo' di Maria . Nga' lisok-lisokon i' daa dau do momutut om a' i' ointingayam dot id toguang do tulun dot ogumu' i Maria .

text_a: Ka Yusufu to o miirili la , Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ dɔ y'i jira a la sugo la k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Dawuda bɔnsɔn Yusufu , i kana siran ka Mariyama furu , k'a masɔrɔ a ye kɔnɔ ta Ni Senu ka sebaaya la .
text_b: But when he was giving thought to these things , an angel of the Lord came to him in a dream , saying , Joseph , son of David , have no fear of taking Mary as your wife ; because that which is in her body is of the Holy Spirit .

text_a: Ka Yusufu to o miirili la , Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ dɔ y'i jira a la sugo la k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Dawuda bɔnsɔn Yusufu , i kana siran ka Mariyama furu , k'a masɔrɔ a ye kɔnɔ ta Ni Senu ka sebaaya la .
text_b: Nga' maso' po di Yusup do momusorou'ddi , om pongipi no iyau . Om id suang nopo di nipi dau nga' nokokito iyau dot iso' o moloikat do Tuhan do minoro-boros dau do poingkaa , “ Oi Yusup , i sinakagon di Daud , kada' kooris do mangawin di Maria ; tu' iri nopo tanak di ponontianon dau om mantad i' do sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: But when he was giving thought to these things , an angel of the Lord came to him in a dream , saying , Joseph , son of David , have no fear of taking Mary as your wife ; because that which is in her body is of the Holy Spirit .
text_b: Nga' maso' po di Yusup do momusorou'ddi , om pongipi no iyau . Om id suang nopo di nipi dau nga' nokokito iyau dot iso' o moloikat do Tuhan do minoro-boros dau do poingkaa , “ Oi Yusup , i sinakagon di Daud , kada' kooris do mangawin di Maria ; tu' iri nopo tanak di ponontianon dau om mantad i' do sinundu do Rusod do Kinorohingan .

text_a: A na denkɛ bange , i na o tɔgɔ da Yesu , katuguni ale na a ka mɔgɔw kisi u ka jurumuw ma . »
text_b: And she will give birth to a son ; and you will give him the name Jesus ; for he will give his people salvation from their sins .

text_a: A na denkɛ bange , i na o tɔgɔ da Yesu , katuguni ale na a ka mɔgɔw kisi u ka jurumuw ma . »
text_b: Osusu nondo i Maria om kusai o tanak dau . Om pungaranan no kopio i tanak diri dot i Yesus , tu' iyau no popoidu' di tulun dau do mantad id dusa diyolo' , ” ka .

text_a: And she will give birth to a son ; and you will give him the name Jesus ; for he will give his people salvation from their sins .
text_b: Osusu nondo i Maria om kusai o tanak dau . Om pungaranan no kopio i tanak diri dot i Yesus , tu' iyau no popoidu' di tulun dau do mantad id dusa diyolo' , ” ka .

text_a: O kow bɛɛ kɛra ten walisa Matigi tun ye min fɔ kira dɔ da la , o ka dafa , ko :
text_b: Now all this took place so that the word of the Lord by the prophet might come true ,

text_a: O kow bɛɛ kɛra ten walisa Matigi tun ye min fɔ kira dɔ da la , o ka dafa , ko :
text_b: Om nosiliu ngai' pogi' o miagal diri nga' mamayaan di boros do Tuhan do pinolombus di nabi dau do poingkaa ,

text_a: Now all this took place so that the word of the Lord by the prophet might come true ,
text_b: Om nosiliu ngai' pogi' o miagal diri nga' mamayaan di boros do Tuhan do pinolombus di nabi dau do poingkaa ,

text_a: « A filɛ , npogotigi cɛ dɔnbali na kɔnɔ ta ka denkɛ bange , o tɔgɔ na da ko Emanuɛl , » o kɔrɔ ko Ala bɛ an cɛma .
text_b: See , the virgin will be with child , and will give birth to a son , and they will give him the name Immanuel , that is , God with us .

text_a: « A filɛ , npogotigi cɛ dɔnbali na kɔnɔ ta ka denkɛ bange , o tɔgɔ na da ko Emanuɛl , » o kɔrɔ ko Ala bɛ an cɛma .
text_b: “ Haro nondo tondu' dit a' po nodudun do kusai do monontian om mogkosusu dot iso' o tanak do kusai . Om pungaranan nondo i tanak diri dot i Imanuil , ” ka . ( Imanuil nopo om boros dot Ibrani do komoyon nopo om “ moyo-woyo' o Kinorohingan dati' , ” ka . )

text_a: See , the virgin will be with child , and will give birth to a son , and they will give him the name Immanuel , that is , God with us .
text_b: “ Haro nondo tondu' dit a' po nodudun do kusai do monontian om mogkosusu dot iso' o tanak do kusai . Om pungaranan nondo i tanak diri dot i Imanuil , ” ka . ( Imanuil nopo om boros dot Ibrani do komoyon nopo om “ moyo-woyo' o Kinorohingan dati' , ” ka . )

text_a: Yusufu wulila ka bɔ sunɔgɔ la , a y'a kɛ ka kɛɲɛ ni Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ ka kuma fɔlen ye . A ye Mariyama furu siri ,
text_b: And Joseph did as the angel of the Lord had said to him , and took her as his wife ;

text_a: Yusufu wulila ka bɔ sunɔgɔ la , a y'a kɛ ka kɛɲɛ ni Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ ka kuma fɔlen ye . A ye Mariyama furu siri ,
text_b: Om koposik poddi i Yusup , om wonsoyo' no dau o miagal di pinoboros di moloikat do Tuhan dot id dau . Om kowino' no dau i Maria .

text_a: And Joseph did as the angel of the Lord had said to him , and took her as his wife ;
text_b: Om koposik poddi i Yusup , om wonsoyo' no dau o miagal di pinoboros di moloikat do Tuhan dot id dau . Om kowino' no dau i Maria .

text_a: nka u ma jɛ sani Mariyama ka jigin a denkɛ fɔlɔ la . Yusufu ye den tɔgɔ da Yesu .
text_b: And he had no connection with her till she had given birth to a son ; and he gave him the name Jesus .

text_a: nka u ma jɛ sani Mariyama ka jigin a denkɛ fɔlɔ la . Yusufu ye den tɔgɔ da Yesu .
text_b: Nga' solinaid nopo dit a' po i Maria nosusu di tanak diri , om a' po i Yusup duminudun di Maria do miagal di wonsoyon do tulun di misasawo . Om kosusu noddi i tanak diri , om pungaranai no di Yusup iyau dot i Yesus .

text_a: And he had no connection with her till she had given birth to a son ; and he gave him the name Jesus .
text_b: Nga' solinaid nopo dit a' po i Maria nosusu di tanak diri , om a' po i Yusup duminudun di Maria do miagal di wonsoyon do tulun di misasawo . Om kosusu noddi i tanak diri , om pungaranai no di Yusup iyau dot i Yesus .

text_a: Yesu bangera Jude jamana la Bɛtilɛhɛm , masakɛ Hɛrɔde tile la . A bangelen kɔ , dɔnbaa dɔw nana ka bɔ kɔrɔn fɛ ka se Jerusalɛm .
text_b: Now when the birth of Jesus took place in Beth-lehem of Judaea , in the days of Herod the king , there came wise men from the east to Jerusalem ,

text_a: Yesu bangera Jude jamana la Bɛtilɛhɛm , masakɛ Hɛrɔde tile la . A bangelen kɔ , dɔnbaa dɔw nana ka bɔ kɔrɔn fɛ ka se Jerusalɛm .
text_b: I Yesus nopo om pinogkosusu do hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , it id pomogunan do Yudia . Iri nopo raja' do tontok diri om i Horudis . Om tontok noddi do ruminikot do hilo'd Yorusalim o piro-piro tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon . Tadon nopo diyolo' om hilo'd ponong id koulayon .

text_a: Now when the birth of Jesus took place in Beth-lehem of Judaea , in the days of Herod the king , there came wise men from the east to Jerusalem ,
text_b: I Yesus nopo om pinogkosusu do hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , it id pomogunan do Yudia . Iri nopo raja' do tontok diri om i Horudis . Om tontok noddi do ruminikot do hilo'd Yorusalim o piro-piro tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon . Tadon nopo diyolo' om hilo'd ponong id koulayon .

text_a: U ye ɲininkali kɛ ko : « Yahutuw ka masakɛ min bangera sisan , o bɛ min ? An ye a ka dolo ye k'an to kɔrɔn fɛ , an nana a bato . »
text_b: Saying , Where is the King of the Jews whose birth has now taken place ? We have seen his star in the east and have come to give him worship .

text_a: U ye ɲininkali kɛ ko : « Yahutuw ka masakɛ min bangera sisan , o bɛ min ? An ye a ka dolo ye k'an to kɔrɔn fɛ , an nana a bato . »
text_b: Om boros ka diyolo' , “ Hinonggo i tanak di nosusu do sumiliu'd raja' do tulun do Yohudi ? Nokito dahai i rombituon dau do minimbulai do ponong id koulayon , om ruminikot diri iyahai'd hiti do mongoi tuku' dot id dau , ” ka diyolo' .

text_a: Saying , Where is the King of the Jews whose birth has now taken place ? We have seen his star in the east and have come to give him worship .
text_b: Om boros ka diyolo' , “ Hinonggo i tanak di nosusu do sumiliu'd raja' do tulun do Yohudi ? Nokito dahai i rombituon dau do minimbulai do ponong id koulayon , om ruminikot diri iyahai'd hiti do mongoi tuku' dot id dau , ” ka diyolo' .

text_a: Masakɛ Hɛrɔde y'o mɛn minkɛ , a ni Jerusalɛmkaw bɛɛ kɔnɔnafilila o kuma kosɔn .
text_b: And when it came to the ears of Herod the king , he was troubled , and all Jerusalem with him .

text_a: Masakɛ Hɛrɔde y'o mɛn minkɛ , a ni Jerusalɛmkaw bɛɛ kɔnɔnafilila o kuma kosɔn .
text_b: Om kotigowo nopoddi i Raja' Horudis do nokorongou'ddi , om iri i tulun do hilo'd Yorusalim nga' nongkotigowo ngai' nogi' .

text_a: And when it came to the ears of Herod the king , he was troubled , and all Jerusalem with him .
text_b: Om kotigowo nopoddi i Raja' Horudis do nokorongou'ddi , om iri i tulun do hilo'd Yorusalim nga' nongkotigowo ngai' nogi' .

text_a: Hɛrɔde ye sarakalasebaaw kuntigiw ni a ka mɔgɔw ka sariya karamɔgɔw bɛɛ lajɛ ka u ɲininka ko : « Krisita ka kan ka bange min ? »
text_b: And he got together all the chief priests and scribes of the people , questioning them as to where the birth-place of the Christ would be .

text_a: Hɛrɔde ye sarakalasebaaw kuntigiw ni a ka mɔgɔw ka sariya karamɔgɔw bɛɛ lajɛ ka u ɲininka ko : « Krisita ka kan ka bange min ? »
text_b: Om lohowo' ngai' noddi di Horudis i boyoon dot imam om i guru do Tourat do tumimung . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' , “ Honggo kosusuon di Raja' di pinabatos mantad do Kinorohingan ? ” ka dau .

text_a: And he got together all the chief priests and scribes of the people , questioning them as to where the birth-place of the Christ would be .
text_b: Om lohowo' ngai' noddi di Horudis i boyoon dot imam om i guru do Tourat do tumimung . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' , “ Honggo kosusuon di Raja' di pinabatos mantad do Kinorohingan ? ” ka dau .

text_a: U y'a jaabi ko : « Jude jamana Bɛtilɛhɛm katuguni a sɛbɛnnen bɛ kira dɔ fɛ ko :
text_b: And they said to him , In Beth-lehem of Judaea ; for so it is said in the writings of the prophet ,

text_a: U y'a jaabi ko : « Jude jamana Bɛtilɛhɛm katuguni a sɛbɛnnen bɛ kira dɔ fɛ ko :
text_b: Om simbar ka diyolo' , “ Hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia . Tu' poingkaa tinulis do songulun o nabi ,

text_a: And they said to him , In Beth-lehem of Judaea ; for so it is said in the writings of the prophet ,
text_b: Om simbar ka diyolo' , “ Hilo'd bandar do Baitlahim , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia . Tu' poingkaa tinulis do songulun o nabi ,

text_a: ` E Bɛtilɛhɛm min bɛ Jude jamana la , i tɛ Jude faamaduguw bɛɛ la dɔgɔmannin ye dɛ , k'a masɔrɔ kuntigi dɔ na bɔ i la , o na ne ka siya Israɛl mara . ' »
text_b: You Beth-lehem , in the land of Judah , are not the least among the chiefs of Judah : out of you will come a ruler , who will be the keeper of my people Israel .

text_a: ` E Bɛtilɛhɛm min bɛ Jude jamana la , i tɛ Jude faamaduguw bɛɛ la dɔgɔmannin ye dɛ , k'a masɔrɔ kuntigi dɔ na bɔ i la , o na ne ka siya Israɛl mara . ' »
text_b: ‘ Baitlahim nopo , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia , om okon i' ko' it okoro' kopio dot id pogialatan di bandar dot angagayo do hilo' . Tu' Baitlahim no tadon do songulun o boyoon di sumiliu'd gompomogompi' dot Israil , i tulun ku , ’ ka . ”

text_a: You Beth-lehem , in the land of Judah , are not the least among the chiefs of Judah : out of you will come a ruler , who will be the keeper of my people Israel .
text_b: ‘ Baitlahim nopo , i hilo'd pomogunan do Yudia , om okon i' ko' it okoro' kopio dot id pogialatan di bandar dot angagayo do hilo' . Tu' Baitlahim no tadon do songulun o boyoon di sumiliu'd gompomogompi' dot Israil , i tulun ku , ’ ka . ”

text_a: O kɔ , Hɛrɔde ye o dɔnbaaw wele dogo la ka u ɲininka kosɛbɛ o dolo ye waati ko la .
text_b: Then Herod sent for the wise men privately , and put questions to them about what time the star had been seen .

text_a: O kɔ , Hɛrɔde ye o dɔnbaaw wele dogo la ka u ɲininka kosɛbɛ o dolo ye waati ko la .
text_b: Om koilo poddi i Horudis di boros do miagal diri , om pomolisok-lisok no iyau do minomolohou di tulun dit ongoilo diri . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' ondung soira' kopio diyolo' kokito i rombituon diri .

text_a: Then Herod sent for the wise men privately , and put questions to them about what time the star had been seen .
text_b: Om koilo poddi i Horudis di boros do miagal diri , om pomolisok-lisok no iyau do minomolohou di tulun dit ongoilo diri . Om uhoto' no dau iyolo' ondung soira' kopio diyolo' kokito i rombituon diri .

text_a: O kɛlen , a ye u ci ka taa Bɛtilɛhɛm . A ko : « A' ye taa o denyɛnin ɲini kosɛbɛ . Aw mana a ye , a' ye na o fɔ ne ye , walisa ne fana ka taa a bato . »
text_b: And he sent them to Beth-lehem and said , Go and make certain where the young child is ; and when you have seen him , let me have news of it , so that I may come and give him worship .

text_a: O kɛlen , a ye u ci ka taa Bɛtilɛhɛm . A ko : « A' ye taa o denyɛnin ɲini kosɛbɛ . Aw mana a ye , a' ye na o fɔ ne ye , walisa ne fana ka taa a bato . »
text_b: Om suhuo' no dau iyolo' do minongoi do hilo'd Baitlahim om bilinai no dau iyolo' , “ Pamanau kou no , om ihumon no kopio dokoyu i tanak diri . Om abantalan nopondo dokoyu , om sunudan oku no , om koongoi oku i' iyoho' kotuku' dot id tanak diri , ” ka dau .

text_a: And he sent them to Beth-lehem and said , Go and make certain where the young child is ; and when you have seen him , let me have news of it , so that I may come and give him worship .
text_b: Om suhuo' no dau iyolo' do minongoi do hilo'd Baitlahim om bilinai no dau iyolo' , “ Pamanau kou no , om ihumon no kopio dokoyu i tanak diri . Om abantalan nopondo dokoyu , om sunudan oku no , om koongoi oku i' iyoho' kotuku' dot id tanak diri , ” ka dau .

text_a: Dɔnbaaw ye masakɛ ka kuma mɛn minkɛ , u taara . U tun ye dolo min ye k'u to kɔrɔn fɛ , o filɛ , o taara u ɲɛ fo ka se denyɛnin yɔrɔ la , a y'i jɔ o yɔrɔ kun na .
text_b: And after hearing the king , they went on their way ; and the star which they saw in the east went before them , till it came to rest over the place where the young child was .

text_a: Dɔnbaaw ye masakɛ ka kuma mɛn minkɛ , u taara . U tun ye dolo min ye k'u to kɔrɔn fɛ , o filɛ , o taara u ɲɛ fo ka se denyɛnin yɔrɔ la , a y'i jɔ o yɔrɔ kun na .
text_b: Om pamanau noddi iyolo' . Om hiri noddid tanga'd ralan , om kokito no kawagu diyolo' i rombituon di nokito diyolo' di gulu po do minulai do ponong id koulayon . Om otood tomod diri iyolo' do nokokito di rombituon diri do hiri'd doburuan diyolo' . Om undorong no i rombituon do hiri'd hapak di nokoiyonon di tanak .

text_a: And after hearing the king , they went on their way ; and the star which they saw in the east went before them , till it came to rest over the place where the young child was .
text_b: Om pamanau noddi iyolo' . Om hiri noddid tanga'd ralan , om kokito no kawagu diyolo' i rombituon di nokito diyolo' di gulu po do minulai do ponong id koulayon . Om otood tomod diri iyolo' do nokokito di rombituon diri do hiri'd doburuan diyolo' . Om undorong no i rombituon do hiri'd hapak di nokoiyonon di tanak .

text_a: U donnen so kɔnɔ , u ye denyɛnin ni a ba Mariyama ye . U y'u bi duguma ka denyɛnin bato . U ye u ka minɛnw dayɛlɛ ka denyɛnin sɔn ni sanu ni suma diyalan mana ani fɛn suma duman dɔ ye , min tɔgɔ ko mirɛ .
text_b: And they came into the house , and saw the young child with Mary , his mother ; and falling down on their faces they gave him worship ; and from their store they gave him offerings of gold , perfume , and spices .

text_a: U donnen so kɔnɔ , u ye denyɛnin ni a ba Mariyama ye . U y'u bi duguma ka denyɛnin bato . U ye u ka minɛnw dayɛlɛ ka denyɛnin sɔn ni sanu ni suma diyalan mana ani fɛn suma duman dɔ ye , min tɔgɔ ko mirɛ .
text_b: Om suang no iyolo' do hiri'd walai'ddi , om kokito no diyolo' i tanak om i Maria , i tina' di tanak . Om otud no iyolo' do tuminuku' di tanak . Om ukabai no diyolo' i pinoiyanan di nigitan diyolo' , om popuhawango' no diyolo' o tamas , om kominyan om mur dot id tanak diri .

text_a: And they came into the house , and saw the young child with Mary , his mother ; and falling down on their faces they gave him worship ; and from their store they gave him offerings of gold , perfume , and spices .
text_b: Om suang no iyolo' do hiri'd walai'ddi , om kokito no diyolo' i tanak om i Maria , i tina' di tanak . Om otud no iyolo' do tuminuku' di tanak . Om ukabai no diyolo' i pinoiyanan di nigitan diyolo' , om popuhawango' no diyolo' o tamas , om kominyan om mur dot id tanak diri .

text_a: O kɔ , dɔnbaaw lasɔminen Ala fɛ sugo la ko u kana kɔsegin Hɛrɔde yɔrɔ , u taara u ka jamana la sira wɛrɛ fɛ .
text_b: And it was made clear to them by God in a dream that they were not to go back to Herod ; so they went into their country by another way .

text_a: O kɔ , dɔnbaaw lasɔminen Ala fɛ sugo la ko u kana kɔsegin Hɛrɔde yɔrɔ , u taara u ka jamana la sira wɛrɛ fɛ .
text_b: Om poinsano' no iyolo'd Kinorohingan dot id suang do nipi dot a' gumuli' dot id di Horudis . Om uli' noddi iyolo' do minaya' do ralan do suwai .

text_a: And it was made clear to them by God in a dream that they were not to go back to Herod ; so they went into their country by another way .
text_b: Om poinsano' no iyolo'd Kinorohingan dot id suang do nipi dot a' gumuli' dot id di Horudis . Om uli' noddi iyolo' do minaya' do ralan do suwai .

text_a: Dɔnbaaw taalen kɔ , Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ dɔ y'i jira Yusufu la sugo la k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Wuli ka boli ka taa ni den ni a ba ye Misira , ka to yen fo ne ka kuma i fɛ tuma min na , katuguni Hɛrɔde na den ɲini ko a b'a faga . »
text_b: And when they had gone , an angel of the Lord came to Joseph in a dream , saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into Egypt , and do not go from there till I give you word ; for Herod will be searching for the young child to put him to death .

text_a: Dɔnbaaw taalen kɔ , Matigi ka mɛlɛkɛ dɔ y'i jira Yusufu la sugo la k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Wuli ka boli ka taa ni den ni a ba ye Misira , ka to yen fo ne ka kuma i fɛ tuma min na , katuguni Hɛrɔde na den ɲini ko a b'a faga . »
text_b: Om kapamanau poddi i tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon , om intalang no moloikat do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi di Yusup . Om boros ka di moloikat , “ Ihumon motindo di Horudis ilo tanak do maan dau patayo' . Nga' tungag nogi' om tanggayan no ilo tanak om ilo tina' dau do mogidu' , om mongoi do hilo'd Masir . Om mundorong nopondod hilo' do gisom do moro-boros kawagu oku diya' , ” ka .

text_a: And when they had gone , an angel of the Lord came to Joseph in a dream , saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into Egypt , and do not go from there till I give you word ; for Herod will be searching for the young child to put him to death .
text_b: Om kapamanau poddi i tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon , om intalang no moloikat do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi di Yusup . Om boros ka di moloikat , “ Ihumon motindo di Horudis ilo tanak do maan dau patayo' . Nga' tungag nogi' om tanggayan no ilo tanak om ilo tina' dau do mogidu' , om mongoi do hilo'd Masir . Om mundorong nopondod hilo' do gisom do moro-boros kawagu oku diya' , ” ka .

text_a: Yusufu wulila o su yɛrɛ la ka boli ka taa ni den ni a ba ye Misira .
text_b: So he took the young child and his mother by night , and went into Egypt ;

text_a: Yusufu wulila o su yɛrɛ la ka boli ka taa ni den ni a ba ye Misira .
text_b: Om tungag no i Yusup , om totuong iddi do tinanggayan dau i tanak om i tina' di tanak do minongoi do hilo'd Masir .

text_a: So he took the young child and his mother by night , and went into Egypt ;
text_b: Om tungag no i Yusup , om totuong iddi do tinanggayan dau i tanak om i tina' di tanak do minongoi do hilo'd Masir .

text_a: U tora yen fo ka taa Hɛrɔde sa . O kow kɛra walisa min fɔra Matigi fɛ a ka kira dɔ da la , o ka dafa , ko : « Ne ye ne denkɛ wele ka bɔ Misira . »
text_b: And was there till the death of Herod ; so that the word of the Lord through the prophet might come true , Out of Egypt have I sent for my son .

text_a: U tora yen fo ka taa Hɛrɔde sa . O kow kɛra walisa min fɔra Matigi fɛ a ka kira dɔ da la , o ka dafa , ko : « Ne ye ne denkɛ wele ka bɔ Misira . »
text_b: Om undorong nopoddi iyolo' do hilo'd Masir do gisom do napatai i Horudis . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros do Tuhan do pinolombus di nabi dau do poingkaa , “ Lohowon ku i Tanak ku do mantad hilo'd Masir , ” ka .

text_a: And was there till the death of Herod ; so that the word of the Lord through the prophet might come true , Out of Egypt have I sent for my son .
text_b: Om undorong nopoddi iyolo' do hilo'd Masir do gisom do napatai i Horudis . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros do Tuhan do pinolombus di nabi dau do poingkaa , “ Lohowon ku i Tanak ku do mantad hilo'd Masir , ” ka .

text_a: Hɛrɔde y'a ye ko dɔnbaaw y'a janfa minkɛ , a diminna kosɛbɛ . A ye mɔgɔw ci ka taa Bɛtilɛhɛm ni a dafɛ duguw denmisɛn cɛmanw bɛɛ faga , minnu si ma tɛmɛn san fila kan , ka kɛɲɛ ni dɔnbaaw ka waati fɔlen ye .
text_b: Then Herod , when he saw that he had been tricked by the wise men , was very angry ; and he sent out , and put to death all the male children in Beth-lehem and in all the parts round about it , from two years old and under , acting on the knowledge which he had got with care from the wise men .

text_a: Hɛrɔde y'a ye ko dɔnbaaw y'a janfa minkɛ , a diminna kosɛbɛ . A ye mɔgɔw ci ka taa Bɛtilɛhɛm ni a dafɛ duguw denmisɛn cɛmanw bɛɛ faga , minnu si ma tɛmɛn san fila kan , ka kɛɲɛ ni dɔnbaaw ka waati fɔlen ye .
text_b: Om koilaai poddi di Horudis do nakalan iyau di tulun dit ongoilo di mantad hilo'd koulayon diri , om kotogod tomod no iyau . Om ponuhu' no iyau do mamatai do koinsanai di tangaanak do kusai di duwo toun om it id siriba' ko' duwo toun do tumur do hilo'd Baitlahim om hiri'd posorili' do kinoiyonon diri . Tu' iyo noddi o koloido' do tumanud di norongou dau di pinoboros do tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon , do mantad di kokito i' diyolo' i rombituon .

text_a: Then Herod , when he saw that he had been tricked by the wise men , was very angry ; and he sent out , and put to death all the male children in Beth-lehem and in all the parts round about it , from two years old and under , acting on the knowledge which he had got with care from the wise men .
text_b: Om koilaai poddi di Horudis do nakalan iyau di tulun dit ongoilo di mantad hilo'd koulayon diri , om kotogod tomod no iyau . Om ponuhu' no iyau do mamatai do koinsanai di tangaanak do kusai di duwo toun om it id siriba' ko' duwo toun do tumur do hilo'd Baitlahim om hiri'd posorili' do kinoiyonon diri . Tu' iyo noddi o koloido' do tumanud di norongou dau di pinoboros do tulun dit ongoilo do komoyon do rombituon , do mantad di kokito i' diyolo' i rombituon .

text_a: Kira Jeremi ye min fɔ , o dafara ten . A tun ko :
text_b: Then the word of Jeremiah the prophet came true ,

text_a: Kira Jeremi ye min fɔ , o dafara ten . A tun ko :
text_b: Om iyo noddi do nosiliu i pinoboros di Nabi Yoromia , do poingkaa ,

text_a: Then the word of Jeremiah the prophet came true ,
text_b: Om iyo noddi do nosiliu i pinoboros di Nabi Yoromia , do poingkaa ,

text_a: « Mɔgɔw ye kasikan mɛn ka bɔ Rama , kulo ni kasikanba . Rasɛl bɛ a ka denmisɛnw su kasi . A tɛ sɔn a dusu ka saalo , k'a sɔrɔ u sara ka ban . »
text_b: In Ramah there was a sound of weeping and great sorrow , Rachel weeping for her children , and she would not be comforted for their loss .

text_a: « Mɔgɔw ye kasikan mɛn ka bɔ Rama , kulo ni kasikanba . Rasɛl bɛ a ka denmisɛnw su kasi . A tɛ sɔn a dusu ka saalo , k'a sɔrɔ u sara ka ban . »
text_b: “ Haro o mihad dot orongou do mantad hilo'd Rama do minglompud do mihad do mogihad . Mogihad i Rasil di tangaanak dau ; om a' no iyau milo dot insasamadan , tu' nangapatai ngai' no iyolo' , ” ka .

text_a: In Ramah there was a sound of weeping and great sorrow , Rachel weeping for her children , and she would not be comforted for their loss .
text_b: “ Haro o mihad dot orongou do mantad hilo'd Rama do minglompud do mihad do mogihad . Mogihad i Rasil di tangaanak dau ; om a' no iyau milo dot insasamadan , tu' nangapatai ngai' no iyolo' , ” ka .

text_b: But when Herod was dead , an angel of the Lord came in a dream to Joseph in Egypt ,

text_b: Om kapatai poddi i Horudis , om intalang no kawagu o moloikat do Tuhan dot id di Yusup dot id suang do nipi , di hilo' pod Masir i Yusup .

text_a: But when Herod was dead , an angel of the Lord came in a dream to Joseph in Egypt ,
text_b: Om kapatai poddi i Horudis , om intalang no kawagu o moloikat do Tuhan dot id di Yusup dot id suang do nipi , di hilo' pod Masir i Yusup .

text_a: O mɛlɛkɛ ko : « Wuli ka kɔsegin ni den ni a ba ye Israɛl jamana la , sabu minnu tun b'a fɛ ka den faga , olu sara . »
text_b: Saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into the land of Israel : because they who were attempting to take the young child's life are dead .

text_a: Saying , Get up and take the young child and his mother , and go into the land of Israel : because they who were attempting to take the young child's life are dead .

text_b: And he got up , and took the young child and his mother , and came into the land of Israel .

text_b: Om tungag noddi i Yusup , om tanggayai no dau i tanak diri om i Maria do guminuli' do hilo'd Israil .

text_a: And he got up , and took the young child and his mother , and came into the land of Israel .
text_b: Om tungag noddi i Yusup , om tanggayai no dau i tanak diri om i Maria do guminuli' do hilo'd Israil .

text_a: A y'a mɛn minkɛ ko Arkɛlaus sigira a fa Hɛrɔde nɔ na ka kɛ Jude jamana masakɛ ye , Yusufu siranna , a ma sɔn ka taa yen . A lasɔminen Ala fɛ sugo la , a taara Galile jamana la .
text_b: But when it came to his ears that Archelaus was ruling over Judaea in the place of his father Herod , he was in fear of going there ; and God having given him news of the danger in a dream , he went out of the way into the country parts of Galilee .

text_a: A y'a mɛn minkɛ ko Arkɛlaus sigira a fa Hɛrɔde nɔ na ka kɛ Jude jamana masakɛ ye , Yusufu siranna , a ma sɔn ka taa yen . A lasɔminen Ala fɛ sugo la , a taara Galile jamana la .
text_b: Nga' korongou noddi i Yusup dot i Arkilaus i tanak di Horudis , o suminowoli di Horudis do suminiliu'd raja' do pomogunan do Yudia . Om moddosi iddi i Yusup do mongoi'd hilo' . Om kosunudai poddi iyau do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd watas do Galilia .

text_a: But when it came to his ears that Archelaus was ruling over Judaea in the place of his father Herod , he was in fear of going there ; and God having given him news of the danger in a dream , he went out of the way into the country parts of Galilee .
text_b: Nga' korongou noddi i Yusup dot i Arkilaus i tanak di Horudis , o suminowoli di Horudis do suminiliu'd raja' do pomogunan do Yudia . Om moddosi iddi i Yusup do mongoi'd hilo' . Om kosunudai poddi iyau do Tuhan dot id suang do nipi , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd watas do Galilia .

text_a: A sigira dugu dɔ la yen min tɔgɔ ko Nazarɛti , walisa kiraw tun ye min fɔ ko Yesu na wele Nazarɛtika , o ka dafa .
text_b: And he came and was living in a town named Nazareth : so that the word of the prophets might come true , He will be named a Nazarene .

text_a: A sigira dugu dɔ la yen min tɔgɔ ko Nazarɛti , walisa kiraw tun ye min fɔ ko Yesu na wele Nazarɛtika , o ka dafa .
text_b: Om undorong no iyau'd hilo' , dot id iso' bandar di roitan do Nasarit . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros di piro-piro nabi dot i tanak o komoyon , “ Roitan nondo iyau do Tulun do Nasarit , ” ka .

text_a: And he came and was living in a town named Nazareth : so that the word of the prophets might come true , He will be named a Nazarene .
text_b: Om undorong no iyau'd hilo' , dot id iso' bandar di roitan do Nasarit . Om iyo noddi do nabayaan i pinoboros di piro-piro nabi dot i tanak o komoyon , “ Roitan nondo iyau do Tulun do Nasarit , ” ka .

text_a: O donw na , Yuhana Batiselikɛla nana Jude kungokolon kɔnɔ ka waajuli daminɛ .
text_b: And in those days John the Baptist came preaching in the waste land of Judaea ,

text_a: O donw na , Yuhana Batiselikɛla nana Jude kungokolon kɔnɔ ka waajuli daminɛ .
text_b: Om tontok noddi do ruminikot i Yohanis Gampamatis do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan do Yudia , om timpuun no iyau do monuduk .

text_a: And in those days John the Baptist came preaching in the waste land of Judaea ,
text_b: Om tontok noddi do ruminikot i Yohanis Gampamatis do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan do Yudia , om timpuun no iyau do monuduk .

text_a: A tun bɛ welewele da ko : « A' ye nimisa aw ka jurumuw la , katuguni sankolo masaya surunyara . »
text_b: Saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin ; for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: A tun bɛ welewele da ko : « A' ye nimisa aw ka jurumuw la , katuguni sankolo masaya surunyara . »
text_b: Boros ka dau , “ Korologo kou no do momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka .

text_a: Saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin ; for the kingdom of heaven is near .
text_b: Boros ka dau , “ Korologo kou no do momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka .

text_a: Kira Esayi tun kumana mɔgɔ min ko la , Yuhana don . Esayi ko : « Pɛrɛnkan bɛ bɔ kungokolon kɔnɔ ko : ` A' ye Matigi ka sira labɛn , ka a ka sira misɛnw latilen . ' »
text_b: For this is he of whom Isaiah the prophet said , The voice of one crying in the waste land , Make ready the way of the Lord , make his roads straight .

text_a: Kira Esayi tun kumana mɔgɔ min ko la , Yuhana don . Esayi ko : « Pɛrɛnkan bɛ bɔ kungokolon kɔnɔ ko : ` A' ye Matigi ka sira labɛn , ka a ka sira misɛnw latilen . ' »
text_b: Om i Yohanis no i tulun di komoyon di Nabi Yosaya , do tontok di minomoros iyau do poingkaa , “ Haro o tulun do mimboros dot opuhod do hilo'd tana' do kowotuan do poingkaa , ‘ Rontisan no ralan do wayaan do Tuhan ; potingon no i ralan do wayaan dau , ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: For this is he of whom Isaiah the prophet said , The voice of one crying in the waste land , Make ready the way of the Lord , make his roads straight .
text_b: Om i Yohanis no i tulun di komoyon di Nabi Yosaya , do tontok di minomoros iyau do poingkaa , “ Haro o tulun do mimboros dot opuhod do hilo'd tana' do kowotuan do poingkaa , ‘ Rontisan no ralan do wayaan do Tuhan ; potingon no i ralan do wayaan dau , ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: Yuhana ka fini tun dilara ni ɲaamɛ si ye , a ka cɛsirilan tun ye wolo ye . A ka dumuni tun ye ntɔn ni wo kɔnɔ di ye .
text_b: Now John was clothed in camel's hair , with a leather band about him ; and his food was locusts and honey .

text_a: Yuhana ka fini tun dilara ni ɲaamɛ si ye , a ka cɛsirilan tun ye wolo ye . A ka dumuni tun ye ntɔn ni wo kɔnɔ di ye .
text_b: Pakayan nopo di Yohanis om winonsoi mantad id hulu dot unta , om tagkos no dau om mantad id kulit do nintorusan . Om kanon nopo dau om godu om paha' do mantad hiri'd gouton .

text_a: Now John was clothed in camel's hair , with a leather band about him ; and his food was locusts and honey .
text_b: Pakayan nopo di Yohanis om winonsoi mantad id hulu dot unta , om tagkos no dau om mantad id kulit do nintorusan . Om kanon nopo dau om godu om paha' do mantad hiri'd gouton .

text_a: Mɔgɔw tun bɛ taa Yuhana sɛgɛrɛ ka bɔ Jerusalɛm ni Jurdɛn ba da la ani Jude jamana bɛɛ la .
text_b: Then Jerusalem and all Judaea went out to him , and all the people from near Jordan ;

text_a: Mɔgɔw tun bɛ taa Yuhana sɛgɛrɛ ka bɔ Jerusalɛm ni Jurdɛn ba da la ani Jude jamana bɛɛ la .
text_b: Om ogumu' o tulun do mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , om mantad id pointongkop do pomogunan do Yudia om mantad id piro-piro watas di potoropis di Bawang do Yordan , do ruminikot dot id di Yohanis .

text_a: Then Jerusalem and all Judaea went out to him , and all the people from near Jordan ;
text_b: Om ogumu' o tulun do mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , om mantad id pointongkop do pomogunan do Yudia om mantad id piro-piro watas di potoropis di Bawang do Yordan , do ruminikot dot id di Yohanis .

text_a: U tun bɛ u jɔ u ka jurumuw la . Yuhana tun bɛ u batise Jurdɛn baji la .
text_b: And they were given baptism by him in the river Jordan , saying openly that they had done wrong .

text_a: U tun bɛ u jɔ u ka jurumuw la . Yuhana tun bɛ u batise Jurdɛn baji la .
text_b: Om okuno' no diyolo' i dusa diyolo' , om botisai noddi iyolo' di Yohanis do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan .

text_a: And they were given baptism by him in the river Jordan , saying openly that they had done wrong .
text_b: Om okuno' no diyolo' i dusa diyolo' , om botisai noddi iyolo' di Yohanis do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan .

text_a: Yuhana y'a ye tuma min na ko Farisiɛn caman ni Saduseɛn caman nana a fɛ ka batise , a y'a fɔ u ye ko : « Fɔnfɔnnindenw , jɔni ye aw lasɔmi ko aw ka boli Ala ka diminya nata ɲɛ ?
text_b: But when he saw a number of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to his baptism , he said to them , Offspring of snakes , at whose word are you going in flight from the wrath to come ?

text_a: Yuhana y'a ye tuma min na ko Farisiɛn caman ni Saduseɛn caman nana a fɛ ka batise , a y'a fɔ u ye ko : « Fɔnfɔnnindenw , jɔni ye aw lasɔmi ko aw ka boli Ala ka diminya nata ɲɛ ?
text_b: Om ogumu' i' daa o tulun do Parisi om Saduki do ruminikot do mongoi pokibatis . Nga' soira' di nokito di Yohanis iyolo' do rumikot , om boros ka dau , “ Iyokoyu no tulun dit angaraat ! Isai o minomisunud dokoyu do milo kou do moggidu'd mantad id hukuman do Kinorohingan dit oruhai no dau do porikoton ?

text_a: But when he saw a number of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming to his baptism , he said to them , Offspring of snakes , at whose word are you going in flight from the wrath to come ?
text_b: Om ogumu' i' daa o tulun do Parisi om Saduki do ruminikot do mongoi pokibatis . Nga' soira' di nokito di Yohanis iyolo' do rumikot , om boros ka dau , “ Iyokoyu no tulun dit angaraat ! Isai o minomisunud dokoyu do milo kou do moggidu'd mantad id hukuman do Kinorohingan dit oruhai no dau do porikoton ?

text_a: Kɛwale minnu b'a jira ko aw nimisara aw ka jurumuw la , a' ye olu kɛ .
text_b: Let your change of heart be seen in your works :

text_a: Kɛwale minnu b'a jira ko aw nimisara aw ka jurumuw la , a' ye olu kɛ .
text_b: Pointalango' po dokoyu do nokorologo kopio kou do momonsoi'd dusa .

text_a: Let your change of heart be seen in your works :
text_b: Pointalango' po dokoyu do nokorologo kopio kou do momonsoi'd dusa .

text_a: Aw kana a fɔ aw yɛrɛw kɔnɔ ko Ibrahima ye aw fa ye . Tiɲɛ la ne b'a fɔ aw ye ko Ala bɛ se ka nin kabakurunw yɛlɛma ka u kɛ Ibrahima bɔnsɔnw ye .
text_b: And say not to yourselves , We have Abraham for our father ; because I say to you that God is able from these stones to make children for Abraham .

text_a: Aw kana a fɔ aw yɛrɛw kɔnɔ ko Ibrahima ye aw fa ye . Tiɲɛ la ne b'a fɔ aw ye ko Ala bɛ se ka nin kabakurunw yɛlɛma ka u kɛ Ibrahima bɔnsɔnw ye .
text_b: Kada' nogi' dokoyu soroho' do koidu' kou do mantad id hukuman , do momoros kou piya dot i Abraham o taki dokoyu . Ilaai no dokoyu , dot iti piya watu nga' milo id Kinorohingan do silihon do sinakagon di Abraham !

text_a: And say not to yourselves , We have Abraham for our father ; because I say to you that God is able from these stones to make children for Abraham .
text_b: Kada' nogi' dokoyu soroho' do koidu' kou do mantad id hukuman , do momoros kou piya dot i Abraham o taki dokoyu . Ilaai no dokoyu , dot iti piya watu nga' milo id Kinorohingan do silihon do sinakagon di Abraham !

text_a: Hali sisan , jele talen bɛ jiriw dili tigɛli kama ka ban . Jiri o jiri tɛ den ɲuman kɛ o bɛ tigɛ ka fili tasuma la .
text_b: And even now the axe is put to the root of the trees ; every tree then which does not give good fruit is cut down , and put into the fire .

text_a: Hali sisan , jele talen bɛ jiriw dili tigɛli kama ka ban . Jiri o jiri tɛ den ɲuman kɛ o bɛ tigɛ ka fili tasuma la .
text_b: Nokosodia' no kapak do panagad di kayu do porotopon do tana' o pananagad . Pointikid-tikid do kayu dit a' mongua' dot osonong om tagadon no om pataamon do hiri'd tapui .

text_a: And even now the axe is put to the root of the trees ; every tree then which does not give good fruit is cut down , and put into the fire .
text_b: Nokosodia' no kapak do panagad di kayu do porotopon do tana' o pananagad . Pointikid-tikid do kayu dit a' mongua' dot osonong om tagadon no om pataamon do hiri'd tapui .

text_a: Ne kɔni bɛ aw batise ji la k'a jira ko aw nimisara aw ka jurumuw la , nka dɔ bɛ na ne kɔ , o fanga ka bon ni ne ta ye , hali ne man kan ni a ka sabara bɔli yɛrɛ ye a sen na , o na aw batise Ni Senu ni tasuma la .
text_b: Truly , I give baptism with water to those of you whose hearts are changed ; but he who comes after me is greater than I , whose shoes I am not good enough to take up : he will give you baptism with the Holy Spirit and with fire :

text_a: Ne kɔni bɛ aw batise ji la k'a jira ko aw nimisara aw ka jurumuw la , nka dɔ bɛ na ne kɔ , o fanga ka bon ni ne ta ye , hali ne man kan ni a ka sabara bɔli yɛrɛ ye a sen na , o na aw batise Ni Senu ni tasuma la .
text_b: Iyoho' nopo om waig noo pamatis ku dokoyu do popointalang do nokorologo kou do momonsoi'd dusa ; nga' iyau nopo i rumikot do kosusuhut doho' , om mamatis indo dokoyu do Rusod do Kinorohingan om tapui . Iyau nopo om agayo po ko' iyoho' . Om a' oku i' osorupai do mongigit piya di kasut dau .

text_a: Truly , I give baptism with water to those of you whose hearts are changed ; but he who comes after me is greater than I , whose shoes I am not good enough to take up : he will give you baptism with the Holy Spirit and with fire :
text_b: Iyoho' nopo om waig noo pamatis ku dokoyu do popointalang do nokorologo kou do momonsoi'd dusa ; nga' iyau nopo i rumikot do kosusuhut doho' , om mamatis indo dokoyu do Rusod do Kinorohingan om tapui . Iyau nopo om agayo po ko' iyoho' . Om a' oku i' osorupai do mongigit piya di kasut dau .

text_a: A ka ɲɔfyɛ minɛn bɛ a bolo . A na a ka ɲɔ gosilen fyɛ ka bɔ ɲaga la . A na a ka ɲɔkisɛ kɛ jiginɛ kɔnɔ ka a ɛɛɲɛ jeni tasuma sabali la . »
text_b: In whose hand is the instrument with which he will make clean his grain ; he will put the good grain in his store , but the waste will be burned up in the fire which will never be put out .

text_a: A ka ɲɔfyɛ minɛn bɛ a bolo . A na a ka ɲɔ gosilen fyɛ ka bɔ ɲaga la . A na a ka ɲɔkisɛ kɛ jiginɛ kɔnɔ ka a ɛɛɲɛ jeni tasuma sabali la . »
text_b: Poingigit no dau o bakul do pangatap di gandum do gisom dot osompipian . Timungon nondo dau i gandum do posuangon do hiri'd sulap , nga' iri nopondo i tapol om tutudan dau do hiri'd tapui dit a' milo'd pisokon , ” ka .

text_a: In whose hand is the instrument with which he will make clean his grain ; he will put the good grain in his store , but the waste will be burned up in the fire which will never be put out .
text_b: Poingigit no dau o bakul do pangatap di gandum do gisom dot osompipian . Timungon nondo dau i gandum do posuangon do hiri'd sulap , nga' iri nopondo i tapol om tutudan dau do hiri'd tapui dit a' milo'd pisokon , ” ka .

text_a: O tuma la Yesu bɔra Galile jamana la ka taa Yuhana sɛgɛrɛ Jurdɛn ba da la ko Yuhana ka a batise .
text_b: Then Jesus came from Galilee to John at the Jordan , to be given baptism by him .

text_a: O tuma la Yesu bɔra Galile jamana la ka taa Yuhana sɛgɛrɛ Jurdɛn ba da la ko Yuhana ka a batise .
text_b: Om tongkiad no i Yesus do mantad hilo'd Galilia om pakayaai no do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan do mongoi pokibatis di Yohanis .

text_a: Then Jesus came from Galilee to John at the Jordan , to be given baptism by him .
text_b: Om tongkiad no i Yesus do mantad hilo'd Galilia om pakayaai no do hiri'd Bawang do Yordan do mongoi pokibatis di Yohanis .

text_a: Ale tun b'a fɛ ka ban , a y'a fɔ Yesu ye ko : « Ne ka kan ka batise e fɛ , i bɛ na ne ma wa ? »
text_b: But John would have kept him back , saying , It is I who have need of baptism from you , and do you come to me ?

text_a: Ale tun b'a fɛ ka ban , a y'a fɔ Yesu ye ko : « Ne ka kan ka batise e fɛ , i bɛ na ne ma wa ? »
text_b: Nga' mada' i' daa i Yohanis do mamatis di Yesus . Boros ka di Yohanis , “ Iyoho' nogi' o tosorupai do botisan nu . Nga' iya' nogiddi o rumikot dot id doho' ! ” ka dau .

text_a: But John would have kept him back , saying , It is I who have need of baptism from you , and do you come to me ?
text_b: Nga' mada' i' daa i Yohanis do mamatis di Yesus . Boros ka di Yohanis , “ Iyoho' nogi' o tosorupai do botisan nu . Nga' iya' nogiddi o rumikot dot id doho' ! ” ka dau .

text_a: Yesu y'a jaabi ko : « A to a ka kɛ sisan . A ka ɲi an ka Ala sago dafa ten . » Ayiwa Yuhana sɔnna .
text_b: But Jesus made answer , saying to him , Let it be so now : because so it is right for us to make righteousness complete . Then he gave him baptism .

text_a: Yesu y'a jaabi ko : « A to a ka kɛ sisan . A ka ɲi an ka Ala sago dafa ten . » Ayiwa Yuhana sɔnna .
text_b: Nga' boros ka di Yesus do suminimbar , “ Botisai oku nopo diya' do baino' poo . Om owonsoi ngai' to indo i korohian do Kinorohingan , ” ka dau . Om botisai noddi di Yohanis i Yesus .

text_a: But Jesus made answer , saying to him , Let it be so now : because so it is right for us to make righteousness complete . Then he gave him baptism .
text_b: Nga' boros ka di Yesus do suminimbar , “ Botisai oku nopo diya' do baino' poo . Om owonsoi ngai' to indo i korohian do Kinorohingan , ” ka dau . Om botisai noddi di Yohanis i Yesus .

text_a: Yesu batiselen kɔ , a bɔra ji la . O yɔrɔnin kelen , sankolo dayɛlɛla . A ye Ala Ni jigintɔ ye i ko jɛnɛntuban , ka na sigi a kan .
text_b: And Jesus , having been given baptism , straight away went up from the water ; and , the heavens opening , he saw the Spirit of God coming down on him as a dove ;

text_a: Yesu batiselen kɔ , a bɔra ji la . O yɔrɔnin kelen , sankolo dayɛlɛla . A ye Ala Ni jigintɔ ye i ko jɛnɛntuban , ka na sigi a kan .
text_b: Om kobotisai poddi i Yesus , om tilombus nopo iyau do tuminindal . Om sigog nopoddi do miniangkang o tawan om kokito no di Yesus i Rusod do Kinorohingan do luminintuhun dot id dau do miagal do punai o kowoyo-woyoo' do suminondot .

text_a: And Jesus , having been given baptism , straight away went up from the water ; and , the heavens opening , he saw the Spirit of God coming down on him as a dove ;
text_b: Om kobotisai poddi i Yesus , om tilombus nopo iyau do tuminindal . Om sigog nopoddi do miniangkang o tawan om kokito no di Yesus i Rusod do Kinorohingan do luminintuhun dot id dau do miagal do punai o kowoyo-woyoo' do suminondot .

text_a: Kumakan dɔ bɔra sankolo la ko : « Nin ye ne Denkɛ kanulen ye , a ko ka di ne ye haali . »
text_b: And a voice came out of heaven , saying , This is my dearly loved Son , with whom I am well pleased .

text_a: Kumakan dɔ bɔra sankolo la ko : « Nin ye ne Denkɛ kanulen ye , a ko ka di ne ye haali . »
text_b: Om korongou noddi o boros do Kinorohingan do mantad hilo'd tawan do poingkaa , “ Iti no i Tanak ku di kosianan ku . Om iyau no i kohubayaan kopio do ginawo ku , ” ka .

text_a: And a voice came out of heaven , saying , This is my dearly loved Son , with whom I am well pleased .
text_b: Om korongou noddi o boros do Kinorohingan do mantad hilo'd tawan do poingkaa , “ Iti no i Tanak ku di kosianan ku . Om iyau no i kohubayaan kopio do ginawo ku , ” ka .

text_a: O kɔ , Ni Senu ye Yesu ɲɛminɛ ka taa kungokolon kɔnɔ walisa Sitanɛ k'a kɔrɔbɔ .
text_b: Then Jesus was sent by the Spirit into the waste land to be tested by the Evil One .

text_a: O kɔ , Ni Senu ye Yesu ɲɛminɛ ka taa kungokolon kɔnɔ walisa Sitanɛ k'a kɔrɔbɔ .
text_b: Om angatai noddi i Yesus di Rusod do Kinorohingan do kuminaa do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan , om opogumbalan i' iyau do Rogon .

text_a: Then Jesus was sent by the Spirit into the waste land to be tested by the Evil One .
text_b: Om angatai noddi i Yesus di Rusod do Kinorohingan do kuminaa do hiri'd tana' do kowotuan , om opogumbalan i' iyau do Rogon .

text_a: Yesu ye tile binaani ni su binaani kɛ sun na , a ma dumuni kɛ , o kɔ , kɔngɔ y'a minɛ .
text_b: And after going without food for forty days and forty nights , he was in need of it .

text_a: Yesu ye tile binaani ni su binaani kɛ sun na , a ma dumuni kɛ , o kɔ , kɔngɔ y'a minɛ .
text_b: Om a' i Yesus minakan do solinaid dot apat nohopod o tadau om apat nohopod o totuong . Om louson tomod diri iyau .

text_a: And after going without food for forty days and forty nights , he was in need of it .
text_b: Om a' i Yesus minakan do solinaid dot apat nohopod o tadau om apat nohopod o totuong . Om louson tomod diri iyau .

text_a: Kɔrɔbɔlikɛla gɛrɛla a la k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Ni i ye Ala Denkɛ ye , a fɔ ko nin kabakurunw ka yɛlɛma ka kɛ nbuurukunw ye . »
text_b: And the Evil One came and said to him , If you are the Son of God , give the word for these stones to become bread .

text_a: Kɔrɔbɔlikɛla gɛrɛla a la k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Ni i ye Ala Denkɛ ye , a fɔ ko nin kabakurunw ka yɛlɛma ka kɛ nbuurukunw ye . »
text_b: Om rikot noddi i Rogon om boro-boros no di Yesus , “ Okon toi ko' Tanak ko'd Kinorohingan ? Suhuo' pogi' ilo watu do sumiliu'd roti , ” ka dau .

text_a: And the Evil One came and said to him , If you are the Son of God , give the word for these stones to become bread .
text_b: Om rikot noddi i Rogon om boro-boros no di Yesus , “ Okon toi ko' Tanak ko'd Kinorohingan ? Suhuo' pogi' ilo watu do sumiliu'd roti , ” ka dau .

text_a: Yesu y'a jaabi ko : « A sɛbɛnnen bɛ ko : ` Dumunifɛn dama tɛ mɔgɔ balo , nka kuma minnu bɛɛ bɛ bɔ Ala da la , a bɛ balo olu de la . ' »
text_b: But he made answer and said , It is in the Writings , Bread is not man's only need , but every word which comes out of the mouth of God .

text_a: Yesu y'a jaabi ko : « A sɛbɛnnen bɛ ko : ` Dumunifɛn dama tɛ mɔgɔ balo , nka kuma minnu bɛɛ bɛ bɔ Ala da la , a bɛ balo olu de la . ' »
text_b: Nga' boros kad i Yesus , “ Nokotulis no dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan o poingkaa : Okon i' ko' roti noo o kapasi'd tulun , suwai ko' iri nogi' i pointikid-tikid do boros di poboroson do Kinorohingan , ” ka dau .

text_a: But he made answer and said , It is in the Writings , Bread is not man's only need , but every word which comes out of the mouth of God .
text_b: Nga' boros kad i Yesus , “ Nokotulis no dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan o poingkaa : Okon i' ko' roti noo o kapasi'd tulun , suwai ko' iri nogi' i pointikid-tikid do boros di poboroson do Kinorohingan , ” ka dau .

text_a: O kɔ , Sitanɛ taara ni Yesu ye dugu senuma kɔnɔ k'a bila Alabatosoba kuncɛ ma ,
text_b: Then the Evil One took him to the holy town ; and he put him on the highest point of the Temple and said to him ,

text_a: O kɔ , Sitanɛ taara ni Yesu ye dugu senuma kɔnɔ k'a bila Alabatosoba kuncɛ ma ,
text_b: Om igitai po di Rogon i Yesus do minongoi do hilo'd Yorusalim , i bandar dot olidang . Om hirio' no di Rogon i Yesus id timpak di Walai'd Sasambayangan dot Agayo .

text_a: Then the Evil One took him to the holy town ; and he put him on the highest point of the Temple and said to him ,
text_b: Om igitai po di Rogon i Yesus do minongoi do hilo'd Yorusalim , i bandar dot olidang . Om hirio' no di Rogon i Yesus id timpak di Walai'd Sasambayangan dot Agayo .

text_a: k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Ni i ye Ala Denkɛ ye , i cun duguma , katuguni a sɛbɛnnen bɛ ko : ` Ala na i ko fɔ a ka mɛlɛkɛw ye , u na i minɛ u bolow la , walisa i sen kana na gosi kabakurun si la . ' »
text_b: If you are the Son of God , let yourself go down ; for it is in the Writings , He will give his angels care over you ; and , In their hands they will keep you up , so that your foot may not be crushed against a stone .

text_a: k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Ni i ye Ala Denkɛ ye , i cun duguma , katuguni a sɛbɛnnen bɛ ko : ` Ala na i ko fɔ a ka mɛlɛkɛw ye , u na i minɛ u bolow la , walisa i sen kana na gosi kabakurun si la . ' »
text_b: Om boros kaddi di Rogon dot id di Yesus , “ Okon toi ko' Tanak ko'd Kinorohingan ? Tuhun pogi' , tu' haro i' o nokotulis dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan do poingkaa , ‘ Suhuon indo do Kinorohingan i moloikat dau do mongintirung diya' , om kahangan ko indo diyolo' om a' i' kootung do watu o gakod nu , ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: If you are the Son of God , let yourself go down ; for it is in the Writings , He will give his angels care over you ; and , In their hands they will keep you up , so that your foot may not be crushed against a stone .
text_b: Om boros kaddi di Rogon dot id di Yesus , “ Okon toi ko' Tanak ko'd Kinorohingan ? Tuhun pogi' , tu' haro i' o nokotulis dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan do poingkaa , ‘ Suhuon indo do Kinorohingan i moloikat dau do mongintirung diya' , om kahangan ko indo diyolo' om a' i' kootung do watu o gakod nu , ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: Yesu y'a fɔ a ye ko : « A sɛbɛnnen bɛ fana ko : ` I kana i Matigi Ala kɔrɔbɔ . ' »
text_b: Jesus said to him , Again it is in the Writings , You may not put the Lord your God to the test .

text_a: Yesu y'a fɔ a ye ko : « A sɛbɛnnen bɛ fana ko : ` I kana i Matigi Ala kɔrɔbɔ . ' »
text_b: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Nga' haro i' o nokotulis dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' pogumbal do Tuhan i Kinorohingan nu , ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: Jesus said to him , Again it is in the Writings , You may not put the Lord your God to the test .
text_b: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Nga' haro i' o nokotulis dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' pogumbal do Tuhan i Kinorohingan nu , ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: Sitanɛ taara ni Yesu ye ko kura ka taa kulu jamanjan kan ka diɲɛ masayaw ni u bonya bɛɛ jira a la ,
text_b: Again , the Evil One took him up to a very high mountain , and let him see all the kingdoms of the world and the glory of them ;

text_a: Sitanɛ taara ni Yesu ye ko kura ka taa kulu jamanjan kan ka diɲɛ masayaw ni u bonya bɛɛ jira a la ,
text_b: Om igitai po kawagu di Rogon i Yesus do minongoi dot id iso' o nuluhon dit akawas kopio . Om potuduko' no di Rogon dot id dau o koinsanai'd pomorintaan do hiti'd pomogunan om koinsanai di kakayaan do hiri .

text_a: Again , the Evil One took him up to a very high mountain , and let him see all the kingdoms of the world and the glory of them ;
text_b: Om igitai po kawagu di Rogon i Yesus do minongoi dot id iso' o nuluhon dit akawas kopio . Om potuduko' no di Rogon dot id dau o koinsanai'd pomorintaan do hiti'd pomogunan om koinsanai di kakayaan do hiri .
