text_b: And he said to him , All these things will I give you , if you will go down on your face and give me worship .

text_a: k'a fɔ a ye ko : « Ni i b'i ɲɔngiri ne kɔrɔ ka ne bato , ne na ninnu bɛɛ di i ma . »
text_b: Om boros ka di Rogon dot id di Yesus , “ Patahakon ngai' ku nopo daa iti dot id diya' , ondung motud ko no do tumuku' doho' , ” ka dau .

text_a: And he said to him , All these things will I give you , if you will go down on your face and give me worship .
text_b: Om boros ka di Rogon dot id di Yesus , “ Patahakon ngai' ku nopo daa iti dot id diya' , ondung motud ko no do tumuku' doho' , ” ka dau .

text_a: Nka Yesu ko : « Taa ka bɔ yan , Sitanɛ , katuguni a sɛbɛnnen bɛ ko : ` I ka i Matigi Ala bato ka baara kɛ o kelenpe ye . ' »
text_b: Then said Jesus to him , Away , Satan : for it is in the Writings , Give worship to the Lord your God and be his servant only .

text_a: Nka Yesu ko : « Taa ka bɔ yan , Sitanɛ , katuguni a sɛbɛnnen bɛ ko : ` I ka i Matigi Ala bato ka baara kɛ o kelenpe ye . ' »
text_b: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Poggidu' no oi Gampamalid ! Nokotulis no dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan o poingkaa , ‘ Tuku' no dot id Tuhan , i Kinorohingan nu , om iyau noo pogobi-obian ! ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: Then said Jesus to him , Away , Satan : for it is in the Writings , Give worship to the Lord your God and be his servant only .
text_b: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Poggidu' no oi Gampamalid ! Nokotulis no dot id Buuk do Kinorohingan o poingkaa , ‘ Tuku' no dot id Tuhan , i Kinorohingan nu , om iyau noo pogobi-obian ! ’ ka , ” ka dau .

text_a: O kɔ , Sitanɛ taara . Mɛlɛkɛ dɔw nana Yesu mago ɲɛ .
text_b: Then the Evil One went away from him , and angels came and took care of him .

text_a: O kɔ , Sitanɛ taara . Mɛlɛkɛ dɔw nana Yesu mago ɲɛ .
text_b: Om tongkiad noddi di Yesus i Rogon . Om rikot no piro-piro moloikat do minongoi ponguhup di Yesus .

text_a: Then the Evil One went away from him , and angels came and took care of him .
text_b: Om tongkiad noddi di Yesus i Rogon . Om rikot no piro-piro moloikat do minongoi ponguhup di Yesus .

text_a: Yesu y'a mɛn tuma min na ko Yuhana bilara kaso la , a bɔra yen ka taa Galile jamana la .
text_b: Now when it came to his ears that John had been put in prison , he went away to Galilee ;

text_a: Yesu y'a mɛn tuma min na ko Yuhana bilara kaso la , a bɔra yen ka taa Galile jamana la .
text_b: Om korongou poddi i Yesus do nokogiil i Yohanis , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd Galilia .

text_a: Now when it came to his ears that John had been put in prison , he went away to Galilee ;
text_b: Om korongou poddi i Yesus do nokogiil i Yohanis , om pakayaai no dau do hilo'd Galilia .

text_a: A bɔra Nazarɛti dugu la , a taara i sigi Kapɛrnaum , o tun ye Galile ba da la dugu dɔ ye , Zabulɔn ni Nefitali jamana la .
text_b: And going away from Nazareth , he came and made his living-place in Capernaum , which is by the sea , in the country of Zebulun and Naphtali :

text_a: A bɔra Nazarɛti dugu la , a taara i sigi Kapɛrnaum , o tun ye Galile ba da la dugu dɔ ye , Zabulɔn ni Nefitali jamana la .
text_b: Om undaliu no iyau do mantad hilo'd Nasarit om ongoi no iyau iyon do hiri'd bandar do Kapornaum , i tid disan di Tasik Galilia , id watas do Sibulon om Naptali .

text_a: And going away from Nazareth , he came and made his living-place in Capernaum , which is by the sea , in the country of Zebulun and Naphtali :
text_b: Om undaliu no iyau do mantad hilo'd Nasarit om ongoi no iyau iyon do hiri'd bandar do Kapornaum , i tid disan di Tasik Galilia , id watas do Sibulon om Naptali .

text_a: O kɛra walisa kira Esayi ye min fɔ , o ka dafa , a ko :
text_b: So that the word of the prophet Isaiah might come true ,

text_a: O kɛra walisa kira Esayi ye min fɔ , o ka dafa , a ko :
text_b: Om kabayaai noddi i pinoboros di Nabi Yosaya , di nowonsoi di Yesus o miagal diri . Poingkaa o pinoboros di Nabi Yosaya ,

text_a: So that the word of the prophet Isaiah might come true ,
text_b: Om kabayaai noddi i pinoboros di Nabi Yosaya , di nowonsoi di Yesus o miagal diri . Poingkaa o pinoboros di Nabi Yosaya ,

text_a: « Zabulɔn jamana ni Nefitali jamana , baji da la , Jurdɛn ba kɔfɛ , siya wɛrɛw ka Galile .
text_b: The land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali , by the way of the sea , the other side of Jordan , Galilee of the Gentiles ,

text_a: « Zabulɔn jamana ni Nefitali jamana , baji da la , Jurdɛn ba kɔfɛ , siya wɛrɛw ka Galile .
text_b: “ Iri nopo tana' do Sibulon om tana' do Naptali , i ralan do kumaa hilo'd tasik , i tid soborong do Bawang do Yordan , iri no i pomogunan do Galilia , i tana' do tulun dot okon ko' Yohudi !

text_a: The land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali , by the way of the sea , the other side of Jordan , Galilee of the Gentiles ,
text_b: “ Iri nopo tana' do Sibulon om tana' do Naptali , i ralan do kumaa hilo'd tasik , i tid soborong do Bawang do Yordan , iri no i pomogunan do Galilia , i tana' do tulun dot okon ko' Yohudi !

text_a: Minnu sigilen tun bɛ dibi la , olu ye kɛnɛyeelenba ye . Minnu sigilen tun bɛ dibi la saya yɔrɔ la , kɛnɛyeelen bɔra olu ye . »
text_b: The people who were in the dark saw a great light , and to those in the land of the shade of death did the dawn come up .

text_a: Minnu sigilen tun bɛ dibi la , olu ye kɛnɛyeelenba ye . Minnu sigilen tun bɛ dibi la saya yɔrɔ la , kɛnɛyeelen bɔra olu ye . »
text_b: Kokito indo do tanawau di kosorong kopio i tulun di poingiyon dot id totuong ! Oulinahan indo do tanawau di kosorong kopio i tulun di poingiyon do hiri'd dasahawan do kapatayon ! ” ka .

text_a: The people who were in the dark saw a great light , and to those in the land of the shade of death did the dawn come up .
text_b: Kokito indo do tanawau di kosorong kopio i tulun di poingiyon dot id totuong ! Oulinahan indo do tanawau di kosorong kopio i tulun di poingiyon do hiri'd dasahawan do kapatayon ! ” ka .

text_a: Kabini o tuma la Yesu ye waajuli daminɛ . A tun b'a fɔ ko : « A' ye nimisa aw ka jurumuw la katuguni sankolo masaya surunyara . »
text_b: From that time Jesus went about preaching and saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin , for the kingdom of heaven is near .

text_a: Kabini o tuma la Yesu ye waajuli daminɛ . A tun b'a fɔ ko : « A' ye nimisa aw ka jurumuw la katuguni sankolo masaya surunyara . »
text_b: Om mantad poddi om popinsusui no i Yesus do poingkaa , “ Korologo kou nod momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka dau .

text_a: From that time Jesus went about preaching and saying , Let your hearts be turned from sin , for the kingdom of heaven is near .
text_b: Om mantad poddi om popinsusui no i Yesus do poingkaa , “ Korologo kou nod momonsoi'd dusa , tu' a' no alaid om korikot no Pomorintaan do surga ! ” ka dau .

text_a: Yesu taamatɔ Galile ba kɛrɛ fɛ , a ye balimakɛ fila ye minnu tun ye mɔnnikɛlaw ye , Simɔn min bɛ wele Piɛrɛ ani a balimakɛ Andre . U tun bɛ jɔ fili la baji la .
text_b: And when he was walking by the sea of Galilee , he saw two brothers , Simon , whose other name was Peter , and Andrew , his brother , who were putting a net into the sea ; for they were fishermen .

text_a: Yesu taamatɔ Galile ba kɛrɛ fɛ , a ye balimakɛ fila ye minnu tun ye mɔnnikɛlaw ye , Simɔn min bɛ wele Piɛrɛ ani a balimakɛ Andre . U tun bɛ jɔ fili la baji la .
text_b: Om tontok di manau-panau i Yesus do hiri'd tisan di Tasik Galilia , om kokito no dau o duwo tulun do monginginsada' di miobpinai . Iyolo' nopo om i Simun ( i pinungaranan dot i Pitrus ) om i Andarias , i tadi' dau . Om tontok nopoddi nga' maso diyolo' do mirrambot do hiri'd tasik .

text_a: And when he was walking by the sea of Galilee , he saw two brothers , Simon , whose other name was Peter , and Andrew , his brother , who were putting a net into the sea ; for they were fishermen .
text_b: Om tontok di manau-panau i Yesus do hiri'd tisan di Tasik Galilia , om kokito no dau o duwo tulun do monginginsada' di miobpinai . Iyolo' nopo om i Simun ( i pinungaranan dot i Pitrus ) om i Andarias , i tadi' dau . Om tontok nopoddi nga' maso diyolo' do mirrambot do hiri'd tasik .

text_a: Yesu y'a fɔ u ye ko : « A' ye tugu ne la , ne na aw kɛ mɔgɔ ɲininaw ye . »
text_b: And he said to them , Come after me , and I will make you fishers of men .

text_a: Yesu y'a fɔ u ye ko : « A' ye tugu ne la , ne na aw kɛ mɔgɔ ɲininaw ye . »
text_b: Om boros ka di Yesus dot id diyolo' , “ Tanud kou pogi' doho' , om tudukan ku i' iyokoyu do mamarambot do tulun , ” ka dau .

text_a: And he said to them , Come after me , and I will make you fishers of men .
text_b: Om boros ka di Yesus dot id diyolo' , “ Tanud kou pogi' doho' , om tudukan ku i' iyokoyu do mamarambot do tulun , ” ka dau .

text_a: U sinna ka u ka jɔw to yen ka tugu Yesu la .
text_b: And straight away they let go the nets and went after him .

text_a: U sinna ka u ka jɔw to yen ka tugu Yesu la .
text_b: Om olomus nopoddi iyolo' do tuminongkiad di rambot om tanud no di Yesus .

text_a: And straight away they let go the nets and went after him .
text_b: Om olomus nopoddi iyolo' do tuminongkiad di rambot om tanud no di Yesus .

text_a: A taara ɲɛfɛ tun ka balimakɛ fila wɛrɛ ye . Olu tun ye Zebede denkɛw Yakuba ni Yuhana ye . U ni u fa Zebede tun bɛ kurun kɔnɔ ka u ka jɔw kala . Yesu ye u wele .
text_b: And going on from there he saw two other brothers , James , the son of Zebedee , and John , his brother , in the boat with their father , stitching up their nets ; and he said , Come .

text_a: A taara ɲɛfɛ tun ka balimakɛ fila wɛrɛ ye . Olu tun ye Zebede denkɛw Yakuba ni Yuhana ye . U ni u fa Zebede tun bɛ kurun kɔnɔ ka u ka jɔw kala . Yesu ye u wele .
text_b: Om lombus po kawagu i Yesus do minamanau , om kokito no dau o duwo kawagu tulun do miobpinai . Iyolo' nopo nga' i Yakub om i Yohanis , i tangaanak di Sabidi . Om maso diyolo' om i tapa' diyolo' do monombir di rambot do hiri'd parau' . Om iyolo' nga' linohou i' di Yesus .

text_a: And going on from there he saw two other brothers , James , the son of Zebedee , and John , his brother , in the boat with their father , stitching up their nets ; and he said , Come .
text_b: Om lombus po kawagu i Yesus do minamanau , om kokito no dau o duwo kawagu tulun do miobpinai . Iyolo' nopo nga' i Yakub om i Yohanis , i tangaanak di Sabidi . Om maso diyolo' om i tapa' diyolo' do monombir di rambot do hiri'd parau' . Om iyolo' nga' linohou i' di Yesus .

text_a: U sinna ka kurun ni u fa to yen ka tugu Yesu la .
text_b: And they went straight from the boat and their father and came after him .

text_a: U sinna ka kurun ni u fa to yen ka tugu Yesu la .
text_b: Om diiri i' om diiri do tinongkiadan diyolo' i parau' om i tapa' diyolo' , om tanud no iyolo' di Yesus .

text_a: And they went straight from the boat and their father and came after him .
text_b: Om diiri i' om diiri do tinongkiadan diyolo' i parau' om i tapa' diyolo' , om tanud no iyolo' di Yesus .

text_a: Yesu tun bɛ yaala Galile jamana yɔrɔ bɛɛ la ka mɔgɔw kalan u ka Alabatosow kɔnɔ . A tun bɛ sankolo masaya Kibaru Duman fɔ . A tun bɛ bana sifa bɛɛ kɛnɛya ani mɔgɔw ka barikantanya bɛɛ .
text_b: And Jesus went about in all Galilee , teaching in their Synagogues and preaching the good news of the kingdom , and making well those who were ill with any disease among the people .

text_a: Yesu tun bɛ yaala Galile jamana yɔrɔ bɛɛ la ka mɔgɔw kalan u ka Alabatosow kɔnɔ . A tun bɛ sankolo masaya Kibaru Duman fɔ . A tun bɛ bana sifa bɛɛ kɛnɛya ani mɔgɔw ka barikantanya bɛɛ .
text_b: Om tongkop no i Yesus di pomogunan do Galilia . Om minonuduk iyau do hiri'd walai'd sasambayangan om pinopopinsusui iyau di Habar dot Osonong do Pomorintaan do Kinorohingan . Om ogumu' o tulun do liningasan dau do mantad id mogisuwayan o toruol .

text_a: And Jesus went about in all Galilee , teaching in their Synagogues and preaching the good news of the kingdom , and making well those who were ill with any disease among the people .
text_b: Om tongkop no i Yesus di pomogunan do Galilia . Om minonuduk iyau do hiri'd walai'd sasambayangan om pinopopinsusui iyau di Habar dot Osonong do Pomorintaan do Kinorohingan . Om ogumu' o tulun do liningasan dau do mantad id mogisuwayan o toruol .

text_a: Yesu tɔgɔ tun bɛ fɔ Siri jamana yɔrɔ bɛɛ la , o de la , mɔgɔw nana Yesu sɛgɛrɛ ni u ka banabaatɔw ye . Mɔgɔ minnu tɔɔrɔla bana sifa caman ni dimin caman fɛ , jinɛtɔw , kirikirimashyɛntɔw ani mɔgɔ fan fila salenw , u nana ni olu bɛɛ ye . Yesu ye u bɛɛ kɛnɛya .
text_b: And news of him went out through all Syria ; and they took to him all who were ill with different diseases and pains , those having evil spirits and those who were off their heads , and those who had no power of moving . And he made them well .

text_a: Yesu tɔgɔ tun bɛ fɔ Siri jamana yɔrɔ bɛɛ la , o de la , mɔgɔw nana Yesu sɛgɛrɛ ni u ka banabaatɔw ye . Mɔgɔ minnu tɔɔrɔla bana sifa caman ni dimin caman fɛ , jinɛtɔw , kirikirimashyɛntɔw ani mɔgɔ fan fila salenw , u nana ni olu bɛɛ ye . Yesu ye u bɛɛ kɛnɛya .
text_b: Om nokotongkop o habar di Yesus dot id do pomogunan do Siria , gisom dot ogumu' tomod diri o tulun do ruminikot dot id dau . Om pootodo' no diyolo' dot id dau o koinsanai'd tulun di mogisuayan o toruol om kosusaan . I tulun di norusadan do rusod dot araat , om i kakaran , om it a' koundaliu nga' liningasan ngai' nopo di Yesus .

text_a: And news of him went out through all Syria ; and they took to him all who were ill with different diseases and pains , those having evil spirits and those who were off their heads , and those who had no power of moving . And he made them well .
text_b: Om nokotongkop o habar di Yesus dot id do pomogunan do Siria , gisom dot ogumu' tomod diri o tulun do ruminikot dot id dau . Om pootodo' no diyolo' dot id dau o koinsanai'd tulun di mogisuayan o toruol om kosusaan . I tulun di norusadan do rusod dot araat , om i kakaran , om it a' koundaliu nga' liningasan ngai' nopo di Yesus .

text_a: Jamaba tugura a nɔfɛ ka bɔ Galile jamana ni Dekapole ni Jerusalɛm ni Jude jamana ani Jurdɛn ba kɔfɛ .
text_b: And there went after him great numbers from Galilee and Decapolis and Jerusalem and Judaea and from the other side of Jordan .

text_a: Jamaba tugura a nɔfɛ ka bɔ Galile jamana ni Dekapole ni Jerusalɛm ni Jude jamana ani Jurdɛn ba kɔfɛ .
text_b: Iri nopo tulun di minoyo' di Yesus do maso'ddi nga' ogumu' kopio . Haro mantad hilo'd Galilia , om haro mantad hilo'd Hopod o Bandar , om haro mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , Yudia , om haro po mantad id pomogunan dit id soborong do Yordan .

text_a: And there went after him great numbers from Galilee and Decapolis and Jerusalem and Judaea and from the other side of Jordan .
text_b: Iri nopo tulun di minoyo' di Yesus do maso'ddi nga' ogumu' kopio . Haro mantad hilo'd Galilia , om haro mantad hilo'd Hopod o Bandar , om haro mantad hilo'd Yorusalim , Yudia , om haro po mantad id pomogunan dit id soborong do Yordan .

text_a: Yesu ye jama ye tuma min na , a yɛlɛnna kulu kan k'i sigi . A ka kalandenw gɛrɛla a la ,
text_b: And seeing great masses of people he went up into the mountain ; and when he was seated his disciples came to him .

text_a: Yesu ye jama ye tuma min na , a yɛlɛnna kulu kan k'i sigi . A ka kalandenw gɛrɛla a la ,
text_b: Om soira' di nokito di Yesus i tulun dot ogumu'ddi , om takad no iyau do hiri'd nulu-nulu , om irikau no . Om rikot ngai' no i tumatanud dau dot id dau ,

text_a: And seeing great masses of people he went up into the mountain ; and when he was seated his disciples came to him .
text_b: Om soira' di nokito di Yesus i tulun dot ogumu'ddi , om takad no iyau do hiri'd nulu-nulu , om irikau no . Om rikot ngai' no i tumatanud dau dot id dau ,

text_a: a y'a daminɛ ka u kalan ko :
text_b: And with these words he gave them teaching , saying ,

text_a: a y'a daminɛ ka u kalan ko :
text_b: om timpuun no iyau do minonuduk diyolo' :

text_a: And with these words he gave them teaching , saying ,
text_b: om timpuun no iyau do minonuduk diyolo' :

text_a: « Minnu y'a dɔn ko u ye faantanw ye Ala ta fan fɛ , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni sankolo masaya ye u ta ye .
text_b: Happy are the poor in spirit : for the kingdom of heaven is theirs .

text_a: « Minnu y'a dɔn ko u ye faantanw ye Ala ta fan fɛ , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni sankolo masaya ye u ta ye .
text_b: Boros ka dau , “ Olumaag no i tulun di kopuriman do mosikin dot id suang do rusod ; tu' kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !

text_a: Happy are the poor in spirit : for the kingdom of heaven is theirs .
text_b: Boros ka dau , “ Olumaag no i tulun di kopuriman do mosikin dot id suang do rusod ; tu' kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !

text_a: « Minnu dusu kasilen don , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u dusuw na saalo .
text_b: Happy are those who are sad : for they will be comforted .

text_a: « Minnu dusu kasilen don , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u dusuw na saalo .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun di tumongob ; tu' insasamadan i' iyolo'd Kinorohingan !

text_a: Happy are those who are sad : for they will be comforted .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun di tumongob ; tu' insasamadan i' iyolo'd Kinorohingan !

text_a: « Minnu sabalilen don , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u na dugukolo sɔrɔ ciyɛn ye .
text_b: Happy are the gentle : for the earth will be their heritage .

text_a: « Minnu sabalilen don , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u na dugukolo sɔrɔ ciyɛn ye .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit osiriba' o ginawo ; tu' asanganu indo diyolo' iti pomogunan .

text_a: Happy are the gentle : for the earth will be their heritage .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit osiriba' o ginawo ; tu' asanganu indo diyolo' iti pomogunan .

text_a: « Tilennenya nege bɛ minnu na i n'a fɔ kɔngɔ ni minnɔgɔ , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u na wasa .
text_b: Happy are those whose heart's desire is for righteousness : for they will have their desire .

text_a: « Tilennenya nege bɛ minnu na i n'a fɔ kɔngɔ ni minnɔgɔ , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u na wasa .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit orohian do momonsoi'd korohian do Kinorohingan , do poinghalib mantad ko' korohiano' do minum ko' makan ; tu' pohubayaan indo i korohian do ginawo diyolo' .

text_a: Happy are those whose heart's desire is for righteousness : for they will have their desire .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit orohian do momonsoi'd korohian do Kinorohingan , do poinghalib mantad ko' korohiano' do minum ko' makan ; tu' pohubayaan indo i korohian do ginawo diyolo' .

text_a: « Makarikɛlaw ye dubadenw ye , katuguni makari na kɛ u la .
text_b: Happy are those who have mercy : for they will be given mercy .

text_a: « Makarikɛlaw ye dubadenw ye , katuguni makari na kɛ u la .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit osianan do tulun do suwai ; tu' iyolo' nga' kosianan indo do Kinorohingan !

text_a: Happy are those who have mercy : for they will be given mercy .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit osianan do tulun do suwai ; tu' iyolo' nga' kosianan indo do Kinorohingan !

text_a: « Minnu dusukunw jɛlen don , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u na Ala ye .
text_b: Happy are the clean in heart : for they will see God .

text_a: « Minnu dusukunw jɛlen don , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u na Ala ye .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit olidang o ginawo ; tu' kokito indo iyolo'd Kinorohingan .

text_a: Happy are the clean in heart : for they will see God .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit olidang o ginawo ; tu' kokito indo iyolo'd Kinorohingan .

text_a: « Minnu b'a ɲini hɛrɛ ka to mɔgɔw ni ɲɔgɔn cɛ , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u na wele Ala denw .
text_b: Happy are the peacemakers : for they will be named sons of God .

text_a: « Minnu b'a ɲini hɛrɛ ka to mɔgɔw ni ɲɔgɔn cɛ , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni u na wele Ala denw .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun di popiulud ; tu' roitan indo iyolo'd tangaanak do Kinorohingan !

text_a: Happy are the peacemakers : for they will be named sons of God .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun di popiulud ; tu' roitan indo iyolo'd tangaanak do Kinorohingan !

text_a: « Minnu tɔɔrɔla tilennenya kosɔn , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni sankolo masaya ye u ta ye .
text_b: Happy are those who are attacked on account of righteousness : for the kingdom of heaven will be theirs .

text_a: « Minnu tɔɔrɔla tilennenya kosɔn , olu ye dubadenw ye , katuguni sankolo masaya ye u ta ye .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit inggoriton tu' momonsoi iyolo'd korohian do Kinorohingan ; kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !

text_a: Happy are those who are attacked on account of righteousness : for the kingdom of heaven will be theirs .
text_b: Olumaag no i tulun dit inggoriton tu' momonsoi iyolo'd korohian do Kinorohingan ; kasanganu indo iyolo' do Pomorintaan do surga !

text_a: « Ni mɔgɔw bɛ aw neni , ka tugu aw nɔfɛ ka aw tɔɔrɔ , ka ko jugu caman nkalon da aw la ne kosɔn , o tuma la aw ye dubadenw ye .
text_b: Happy are you when men give you a bad name , and are cruel to you , and say all evil things against you falsely , because of me .

text_a: « Ni mɔgɔw bɛ aw neni , ka tugu aw nɔfɛ ka aw tɔɔrɔ , ka ko jugu caman nkalon da aw la ne kosɔn , o tuma la aw ye dubadenw ye .
text_b: Olumaag kou no dot indaraaton kou piya , om inggoriton , om pinsingudutan , dot i tumanud kou doho' o kopongiyo'ddian .

text_a: Happy are you when men give you a bad name , and are cruel to you , and say all evil things against you falsely , because of me .
text_b: Olumaag kou no dot indaraaton kou piya , om inggoriton , om pinsingudutan , dot i tumanud kou doho' o kopongiyo'ddian .

text_a: Aw ka ɲagali ka nisɔndiya kosɛbɛ haali , katuguni aw ka baraji ka bon sankolo la . Kira minnu tun bɛ aw ɲɛ , mɔgɔw ye olu fana tɔɔrɔ ten .
text_b: Be glad and full of joy ; for great is your reward in heaven : for so were the prophets attacked who were before you .

text_a: Aw ka ɲagali ka nisɔndiya kosɛbɛ haali , katuguni aw ka baraji ka bon sankolo la . Kira minnu tun bɛ aw ɲɛ , mɔgɔw ye olu fana tɔɔrɔ ten .
text_b: Tu' iri piro-piro nabi dit id gulu ko' iyokoyu nga' noinggorit i' do miagal diri . Kotood kou no om kooropod kou no kopio , tu' agayo i' o tisomuli' do nokoopi'd Tuhan do hilo'd surga do patahakon dokoyu , ” ka dau .

text_a: Be glad and full of joy ; for great is your reward in heaven : for so were the prophets attacked who were before you .
text_b: Tu' iri piro-piro nabi dit id gulu ko' iyokoyu nga' noinggorit i' do miagal diri . Kotood kou no om kooropod kou no kopio , tu' agayo i' o tisomuli' do nokoopi'd Tuhan do hilo'd surga do patahakon dokoyu , ” ka dau .

text_a: « Aw ye kɔgɔ ye diɲɛ la , nka ni kɔgɔ timiya bɔra a la , mun na a timiya tun ? A tɛ foyi ɲɛ tun fɔ ka fili kɛnɛma , mɔgɔw bɛ taama a kan .
text_b: You are the salt of the earth ; but if its taste goes from the salt , how will you make it salt again ? it is then good for nothing but to be put out and crushed under foot by men .

text_a: « Aw ye kɔgɔ ye diɲɛ la , nka ni kɔgɔ timiya bɔra a la , mun na a timiya tun ? A tɛ foyi ɲɛ tun fɔ ka fili kɛnɛma , mɔgɔw bɛ taama a kan .
text_b: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Iyokoyu no miagal do silaon dot id toinsanan o tulun do hiti'd pomogunan . Nga' ondung manau i silaon , om a' no kopio milo do mosin kawagu . Om aiso' no guna'ddi , suwai ko' pataamon poo , om pingulakan pondo'd tulun .

text_a: You are the salt of the earth ; but if its taste goes from the salt , how will you make it salt again ? it is then good for nothing but to be put out and crushed under foot by men .
text_b: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Iyokoyu no miagal do silaon dot id toinsanan o tulun do hiti'd pomogunan . Nga' ondung manau i silaon , om a' no kopio milo do mosin kawagu . Om aiso' no guna'ddi , suwai ko' pataamon poo , om pingulakan pondo'd tulun .

text_a: « Aw ye kɛnɛyeelen ye diɲɛ la . Dugu min sigilen bɛ kulu kan , o tɛ se ka dogo .
text_b: You are the light of the world . A town put on a hill may be seen by all .

text_a: « Aw ye kɛnɛyeelen ye diɲɛ la . Dugu min sigilen bɛ kulu kan , o tɛ se ka dogo .
text_b: Iyokoyu no miagal do tanawau diti pomogunan . Iri nopo bandar dit id timpak do nulu-nulu om a' no milo'd lisokon .

text_a: You are the light of the world . A town put on a hill may be seen by all .
text_b: Iyokoyu no miagal do tanawau diti pomogunan . Iri nopo bandar dit id timpak do nulu-nulu om a' no milo'd lisokon .

text_a: Mɔgɔ tɛ lanpa mana ka minɛn dɔ biri a da la , nka a b'a sigi fɛn dɔ kan , walisa a ka yeelen bɔ so kɔnɔ mɔgɔw bɛɛ ye .
text_b: And a burning light is not put under a vessel , but on its table ; so that its rays may be shining on all who are in the house .

text_a: Mɔgɔ tɛ lanpa mana ka minɛn dɔ biri a da la , nka a b'a sigi fɛn dɔ kan , walisa a ka yeelen bɔ so kɔnɔ mɔgɔw bɛɛ ye .
text_b: Aiso' i' o tulun di modtutud do lampung om tinggouban nogindod kakanan . Suwai ko' potimpakon i' dau i lampung diri dot id podtitimpakan kasai' do lampung , om otitihan ngai' indo o koinsanai'd tulun do hiri'd suang di walai .

text_a: And a burning light is not put under a vessel , but on its table ; so that its rays may be shining on all who are in the house .
text_b: Aiso' i' o tulun di modtutud do lampung om tinggouban nogindod kakanan . Suwai ko' potimpakon i' dau i lampung diri dot id podtitimpakan kasai' do lampung , om otitihan ngai' indo o koinsanai'd tulun do hiri'd suang di walai .

text_a: Aw ka yeelen ka bɔ mɔgɔw ɲɛ na o cogo la , walisa u ka aw ka kɛwale ɲumanw ye ka aw sankolola Fa bonya .
text_b: Even so let your light be shining before men , so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven .

text_a: Aw ka yeelen ka bɔ mɔgɔw ɲɛ na o cogo la , walisa u ka aw ka kɛwale ɲumanw ye ka aw sankolola Fa bonya .
text_b: Om iyo nogiddi tu' potitihon no kopio o tanawau dokoyu dot id tulun do suwai , om okito indo diyolo' i wonsoyon dokoyu dit osonong , om royohon nondo diyolo' i Tapa' dokoyu di hilo'd surga , ” ka dau .

text_a: Even so let your light be shining before men , so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father in heaven .
text_b: Om iyo nogiddi tu' potitihon no kopio o tanawau dokoyu dot id tulun do suwai , om okito indo diyolo' i wonsoyon dokoyu dit osonong , om royohon nondo diyolo' i Tapa' dokoyu di hilo'd surga , ” ka dau .

text_a: « Aw kana miiri ko ne nana sariya ni kiraw ka kalan ban . Ne ma na u ban , ne nana olu de dafa .
text_b: Let there be no thought that I have come to put an end to the law or the prophets . I have not come for destruction , but to make complete .

text_a: « Aw kana miiri ko ne nana sariya ni kiraw ka kalan ban . Ne ma na u ban , ne nana olu de dafa .
text_b: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Kada' kou pomusorou do kinorikatan ku nopo om mongoi pananus ngai' di Tourat di Musa om i ponudukan di nabi . Okon i' ko' mongoi pananus diri o kinorikatan ku , suwai ko' mongoi pamayaan di komoyon kopio'ddi .

text_a: Let there be no thought that I have come to put an end to the law or the prophets . I have not come for destruction , but to make complete .
text_b: Om boros ka di Yesus , “ Kada' kou pomusorou do kinorikatan ku nopo om mongoi pananus ngai' di Tourat di Musa om i ponudukan di nabi . Okon i' ko' mongoi pananus diri o kinorikatan ku , suwai ko' mongoi pamayaan di komoyon kopio'ddi .

text_a: Tiɲɛ la ne b'a fɔ aw ye ko , ka sankolo ni dugukolo to yen , hali sariya sɛbɛnden ncinin wala a ko misɛnmannin , o si tɛna ban , fo ka se fɛn bɛɛ laban tuma ma .
text_b: Truly I say to you , Till heaven and earth come to an end , not the smallest letter or part of a letter will in any way be taken from the law , till all things are done .

text_a: Tiɲɛ la ne b'a fɔ aw ye ko , ka sankolo ni dugukolo to yen , hali sariya sɛbɛnden ncinin wala a ko misɛnmannin , o si tɛna ban , fo ka se fɛn bɛɛ laban tuma ma .
text_b: Ilaai no dokoyu ! Do solinaid nopod haro o tawan om pomogunan , om iso' pod hurup ko' titik do hurup dit okooro' dot id Tourat nga' aiso' i' o tonuson , dot a' po angabayaan ngai' iri !

text_a: Truly I say to you , Till heaven and earth come to an end , not the smallest letter or part of a letter will in any way be taken from the law , till all things are done .
text_b: Ilaai no dokoyu ! Do solinaid nopod haro o tawan om pomogunan , om iso' pod hurup ko' titik do hurup dit okooro' dot id Tourat nga' aiso' i' o tonuson , dot a' po angabayaan ngai' iri !

text_a: O de kosɔn , mɔgɔ o mɔgɔ bɛ nin sariyaw bɛɛ la dɔgɔmannin kelen tiɲɛ ka mɔgɔw kalan ten , o na kɛ sankolo masaya la mɔgɔw bɛɛ la dɔgɔmannin ye . Nka min bɛ nin sariyaw mara ka mɔgɔw kalan ten , o na kɛ sankolo masaya la mɔgɔba ye .
text_b: Whoever then goes against the smallest of these laws , teaching men to do the same , will be named least in the kingdom of heaven ; but he who keeps the laws , teaching others to keep them , will be named great in the kingdom of heaven .

text_a: O de kosɔn , mɔgɔ o mɔgɔ bɛ nin sariyaw bɛɛ la dɔgɔmannin kelen tiɲɛ ka mɔgɔw kalan ten , o na kɛ sankolo masaya la mɔgɔw bɛɛ la dɔgɔmannin ye . Nka min bɛ nin sariyaw mara ka mɔgɔw kalan ten , o na kɛ sankolo masaya la mɔgɔba ye .
text_b: Iyo nopoddi , om isai nopo tulun di tumolibamban dot ongoiso' piya di toturan diri , dot iri piya daa i toturan dit okooro' , om i tulun di monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi do miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit aiso' kopio o ngaran-ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga . Nga' isai nopo tulun di tumanud di Tourat om i monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi'd miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit agayo o ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga .

text_a: Whoever then goes against the smallest of these laws , teaching men to do the same , will be named least in the kingdom of heaven ; but he who keeps the laws , teaching others to keep them , will be named great in the kingdom of heaven .
text_b: Iyo nopoddi , om isai nopo tulun di tumolibamban dot ongoiso' piya di toturan diri , dot iri piya daa i toturan dit okooro' , om i tulun di monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi do miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit aiso' kopio o ngaran-ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga . Nga' isai nopo tulun di tumanud di Tourat om i monuduk do tulun do suwai do momonsoi'd miagal diri , om osiliu nod tulun dit agayo o ngaran dot id suang do Pomorintaan do surga .

text_a: Ne b'a fɔ aw ye ko ni aw ka tilennenya ma tɛmɛn sariya karamɔgɔw ni Farisiɛnw ta kan , aw tɛ se ka don sankolo masaya la fewu .
text_b: For I say to you , If your righteousness is not greater than the righteousness of the scribes and Pharisees , you will never go into the kingdom of heaven .

text_a: Ne b'a fɔ aw ye ko ni aw ka tilennenya ma tɛmɛn sariya karamɔgɔw ni Farisiɛnw ta kan , aw tɛ se ka don sankolo masaya la fewu .
text_b: Iyo nopoddi , om soro-soroho' no dokoyu : Milo kou id sumuang di Pomorintaan do surga , ondung poimaha' o kotorodoko' dokoyu ko' i guru do Tourat om i tulun do Parisi , do momonsoi di korohian do Kinorohingan ! ” ka dau .

text_a: For I say to you , If your righteousness is not greater than the righteousness of the scribes and Pharisees , you will never go into the kingdom of heaven .
text_b: Iyo nopoddi , om soro-soroho' no dokoyu : Milo kou id sumuang di Pomorintaan do surga , ondung poimaha' o kotorodoko' dokoyu ko' i guru do Tourat om i tulun do Parisi , do momonsoi di korohian do Kinorohingan ! ” ka dau .

text_a: « Aw y'a mɛn ko a fɔra aw bɛnbaw ye ko : ` I kana mɔgɔ faga . Ko mɔgɔ o mɔgɔ bɛ a mɔgɔ ɲɔgɔn faga , o ka kan ni kiri ye . '
text_b: You have knowledge that it was said in old times , You may not put to death ; and , Whoever puts to death will be in danger of being judged :

text_a: « Aw y'a mɛn ko a fɔra aw bɛnbaw ye ko : ` I kana mɔgɔ faga . Ko mɔgɔ o mɔgɔ bɛ a mɔgɔ ɲɔgɔn faga , o ka kan ni kiri ye . '
text_b: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Koilo kou i' di ponudukan di taki-aki toko' do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' kou pamatai ; tu' isai nopo i mamatai om bisaraon no , ’ ka .

text_a: You have knowledge that it was said in old times , You may not put to death ; and , Whoever puts to death will be in danger of being judged :
text_b: Om boros ka kawagu di Yesus , “ Koilo kou i' di ponudukan di taki-aki toko' do poingkaa , ‘ Kada' kou pamatai ; tu' isai nopo i mamatai om bisaraon no , ’ ka .

text_a: Nka ne kɔni b'a fɔ aw ye ko mɔgɔ o mɔgɔ diminna a balima kɔrɔ , o ka kan ni kiri ye . Min bɛ a balima wele nalonma , kiritigɛ jamakulu ka kan ka kiri tigɛ o kan . Min b'a wele fatɔ , o ka kan ni jahanama tasuma ye .
text_b: But I say to you that everyone who is angry with his brother will be in danger of being judged ; and he who says to his brother , Raca , will be in danger from the Sanhedrin ; and whoever says , You foolish one , will be in danger of the hell of fire .

text_a: Nka ne kɔni b'a fɔ aw ye ko mɔgɔ o mɔgɔ diminna a balima kɔrɔ , o ka kan ni kiri ye . Min bɛ a balima wele nalonma , kiritigɛ jamakulu ka kan ka kiri tigɛ o kan . Min b'a wele fatɔ , o ka kan ni jahanama tasuma ye .
text_b: Nga' baino' nopo om poingkaa o doho'd poboroson dot id dokoyu : Isai nopo i tumogod do tulun do suwai , om bisaraon no ; om isai nopo i momolupu' do tulun do suwai , om mositi' nod bisaraon dot id toguang di momimisara' do tumanud di toturan do tugama' . Om isai nopo o momoros do , ‘ Basug ! ’ ka , do tulun do suwai o komoyon , om apatut no do pataamon do hilo'd tapui naraka .

text_a: But I say to you that everyone who is angry with his brother will be in danger of being judged ; and he who says to his brother , Raca , will be in danger from the Sanhedrin ; and whoever says , You foolish one , will be in danger of the hell of fire .
text_b: Nga' baino' nopo om poingkaa o doho'd poboroson dot id dokoyu : Isai nopo i tumogod do tulun do suwai , om bisaraon no ; om isai nopo i momolupu' do tulun do suwai , om mositi' nod bisaraon dot id toguang di momimisara' do tumanud di toturan do tugama' . Om isai nopo o momoros do , ‘ Basug ! ’ ka , do tulun do suwai o komoyon , om apatut no do pataamon do hilo'd tapui naraka .

text_a: I nalen saraka bɔ yɔrɔ la ka i ka saraka bɔ Ala ye , ni i hakili jiginna a la yen ko i ye i balima hakɛ ta ,
text_b: If then you are making an offering at the altar and there it comes to your mind that your brother has something against you ,

text_a: I nalen saraka bɔ yɔrɔ la ka i ka saraka bɔ Ala ye , ni i hakili jiginna a la yen ko i ye i balima hakɛ ta ,
text_b: Iyo nopoddi , om ondung haro o tiso' dokoyu di maso'd papatahak do porsombahan dot id Kinorohingan , om sigog indo dot osorou dau do haro o katagadan do tulun do suwai dot id dau ,

text_a: If then you are making an offering at the altar and there it comes to your mind that your brother has something against you ,
text_b: Iyo nopoddi , om ondung haro o tiso' dokoyu di maso'd papatahak do porsombahan dot id Kinorohingan , om sigog indo dot osorou dau do haro o katagadan do tulun do suwai dot id dau ,
